}
Output
"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n     3\u2192 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { IStringDictionary, INumberDictionary } from '../../../../base/common/collections.js';\n     7\u2192import { URI } from '../../../../base/common/uri.js';\n     8\u2192import { Event, Emitter } from '../../../../base/common/event.js';\n     9\u2192import { IDisposable, DisposableStore, Disposable } from '../../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\n    10\u2192\n    11\u2192import { IModelService } from '../../../../editor/common/services/model.js';\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192import { ILineMatcher, createLineMatcher, ProblemMatcher, IProblemMatch, ApplyToKind, IWatchingPattern, getResource } from './problemMatcher.js';\n    14\u2192import { IMarkerService, IMarkerData, MarkerSeverity } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\n    15\u2192import { generateUuid } from '../../../../base/common/uuid.js';\n    16\u2192import { IFileService } from '../../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\n    17\u2192import { isWindows } from '../../../../base/common/platform.js';\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192export const enum ProblemCollectorEventKind {\n    20\u2192\tBackgroundProcessingBegins = 'backgroundProcessingBegins',\n    21\u2192\tBackgroundProcessingEnds = 'backgroundProcessingEnds'\n    22\u2192}\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192export interface IProblemCollectorEvent {\n    25\u2192\tkind: ProblemCollectorEventKind;\n    26\u2192}\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192namespace IProblemCollectorEvent {\n    29\u2192\texport function create(kind: ProblemCollectorEventKind) {\n    30\u2192\t\treturn Object.freeze({ kind });\n    31\u2192\t}\n    32\u2192}\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192export interface IProblemMatcher {\n    35\u2192\tprocessLine(line: string): void;\n    36\u2192}\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192export abstract class AbstractProblemCollector extends Disposable implements IDisposable {\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192\tprivate matchers: INumberDictionary<ILineMatcher[]>;\n    41\u2192\tprivate activeMatcher: ILineMatcher | null;\n    42\u2192\tprotected _numberOfMatches: number;\n    43\u2192\tprivate _maxMarkerSeverity?: MarkerSeverity;\n    44\u2192\tprivate buffer: string[];\n    45\u2192\tprivate bufferLength: number;\n    46\u2192\tprivate openModels: IStringDictionary<boolean>;\n    47\u2192\tprotected readonly modelListeners = new DisposableStore();\n    48\u2192\tprivate tail: Promise<void> | undefined;\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192\t// [owner] -> ApplyToKind\n    51\u2192\tprotected applyToByOwner: Map<string, ApplyToKind>;\n    52\u2192\t// [owner] -> [resource] -> URI\n    53\u2192\tprivate resourcesToClean: Map<string, Map<string, URI>>;\n    54\u2192\t// [owner] -> [resource] -> [markerkey] -> markerData\n    55\u2192\tprivate markers: Map<string, Map<string, Map<string, IMarkerData>>>;\n    56\u2192\t// [owner] -> [resource] -> number;\n    57\u2192\tprivate deliveredMarkers: Map<string, Map<string, number>>;\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192\tprotected _onDidStateChange: Emitter<IProblemCollectorEvent>;\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192\tprotected readonly _onDidFindFirstMatch = new Emitter<void>();\n    62\u2192\treadonly onDidFindFirstMatch = this._onDidFindFirstMatch.event;\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192\tprotected readonly _onDidFindErrors = new Emitter<void>();\n    65\u2192\treadonly onDidFindErrors = this._onDidFindErrors.event;\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\tprotected readonly _onDidRequestInvalidateLastMarker = new Emitter<void>();\n    68\u2192\treadonly onDidRequestInvalidateLastMarker = this._onDidRequestInvalidateLastMarker.event;\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\tconstructor(public readonly problemMatchers: ProblemMatcher[], protected markerService: IMarkerService, protected modelService: IModelService, fileService?: IFileService) {\n    71\u2192\t\tsuper();\n    72\u2192\t\tthis.matchers = Object.create(null);\n    73\u2192\t\tthis.bufferLength = 1;\n    74\u2192\t\tproblemMatchers.map(elem => createLineMatcher(elem, fileService)).forEach((matcher) => {\n    75\u2192\t\t\tconst length = matcher.matchLength;\n    76\u2192\t\t\tif (length > this.bufferLength) {\n    77\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.bufferLength = length;\n    78\u2192\t\t\t}\n    79\u2192\t\t\tlet value = this.matchers[length];\n    80\u2192\t\t\tif (!value) {\n    81\u2192\t\t\t\tvalue = [];\n    82\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.matchers[length] = value;\n    83\u2192\t\t\t}\n    84\u2192\t\t\tvalue.push(matcher);\n    85\u2192\t\t});\n    86\u2192\t\tthis.buffer = [];\n    87\u2192\t\tthis.activeMatcher = null;\n    88\u2192\t\tthis._numberOfMatches = 0;\n    89\u2192\t\tthis._maxMarkerSeverity = undefined;\n    90\u2192\t\tthis.openModels = Object.create(null);\n    91\u2192\t\tthis.applyToByOwner = new Map<string, ApplyToKind>();\n    92\u2192\t\tfor (const problemMatcher of problemMatchers) {\n    93\u2192\t\t\tconst current = this.applyToByOwner.get(problemMatcher.owner);\n    94\u2192\t\t\tif (current === undefined) {\n    95\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.applyToByOwner.set(problemMatcher.owner, problemMatcher.applyTo);\n    96\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n    97\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.applyToByOwner.set(problemMatcher.owner, this.mergeApplyTo(current, problemMatcher.applyTo));\n    98\u2192\t\t\t}\n    99\u2192\t\t}\n   100\u2192\t\tthis.resourcesToClean = new Map<string, Map<string, URI>>();\n   101\u2192\t\tthis.markers = new Map<string, Map<string, Map<string, IMarkerData>>>();\n   102\u2192\t\tthis.deliveredMarkers = new Map<string, Map<string, number>>();\n   103\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.modelService.onModelAdded((model) => {\n   104\u2192\t\t\tthis.openModels[model.uri.toString()] = true;\n   105\u2192\t\t}, this, this.modelListeners));\n   106\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.modelService.onModelRemoved((model) => {\n   107\u2192\t\t\tdelete this.openModels[model.uri.toString()];\n   108\u2192\t\t}, this, this.modelListeners));\n   109\u2192\t\tthis.modelService.getModels().forEach(model => this.openModels[model.uri.toString()] = true);\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192\t\tthis._onDidStateChange = new Emitter();\n   112\u2192\t}\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192\tpublic get onDidStateChange(): Event<IProblemCollectorEvent> {\n   115\u2192\t\treturn this._onDidStateChange.event;\n   116\u2192\t}\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192\tpublic processLine(line: string) {\n   119\u2192\t\tif (this.tail) {\n   120\u2192\t\t\tconst oldTail = this.tail;\n   121\u2192\t\t\tthis.tail = oldTail.then(() => {\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\treturn this.processLineInternal(line);\n   123\u2192\t\t\t});\n   124\u2192\t\t} else {\n   125\u2192\t\t\tthis.tail = this.processLineInternal(line);\n   126\u2192\t\t}\n   127\u2192\t}\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192\tprotected abstract processLineInternal(line: string): Promise<void>;\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192\tpublic override dispose() {\n   132\u2192\t\tsuper.dispose();\n   133\u2192\t\tthis.modelListeners.dispose();\n   134\u2192\t}\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192\tpublic get numberOfMatches(): number {\n   137\u2192\t\treturn this._numberOfMatches;\n   138\u2192\t}\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\tpublic get maxMarkerSeverity(): MarkerSeverity | undefined {\n   141\u2192\t\treturn this._maxMarkerSeverity;\n   142\u2192\t}\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192\tprotected tryFindMarker(line: string): IProblemMatch | null {\n   145\u2192\t\tlet result: IProblemMatch | null = null;\n   146\u2192\t\tif (this.activeMatcher) {\n   147\u2192\t\t\tresult = this.activeMatcher.next(line);\n   148\u2192\t\t\tif (result) {\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.captureMatch(result);\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   151\u2192\t\t\t}\n   152\u2192\t\t\tthis.clearBuffer();\n   153\u2192\t\t\tthis.activeMatcher = null;\n   154\u2192\t\t}\n   155\u2192\t\tif (this.buffer.length < this.bufferLength) {\n   156\u2192\t\t\tthis.buffer.push(line);\n   157\u2192\t\t} else {\n   158\u2192\t\t\tconst end = this.buffer.length - 1;\n   159\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < end; i++) {\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.buffer[i] = this.buffer[i + 1];\n   161\u2192\t\t\t}\n   162\u2192\t\t\tthis.buffer[end] = line;\n   163\u2192\t\t}\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\t\tresult = this.tryMatchers();\n   166\u2192\t\tif (result) {\n   167\u2192\t\t\tthis.clearBuffer();\n   168\u2192\t\t}\n   169\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   170\u2192\t}\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192\tprotected async shouldApplyMatch(result: IProblemMatch): Promise<boolean> {\n   173\u2192\t\tswitch (result.description.applyTo) {\n   174\u2192\t\t\tcase ApplyToKind.allDocuments:\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\treturn true;\n   176\u2192\t\t\tcase ApplyToKind.openDocuments:\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\treturn !!this.openModels[(await result.resource).toString()];\n   178\u2192\t\t\tcase ApplyToKind.closedDocuments:\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\treturn !this.openModels[(await result.resource).toString()];\n   180\u2192\t\t\tdefault:\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\treturn true;\n   182\u2192\t\t}\n   183\u2192\t}\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192\tprivate mergeApplyTo(current: ApplyToKind, value: ApplyToKind): ApplyToKind {\n   186\u2192\t\tif (current === value || current === ApplyToKind.allDocuments) {\n   187\u2192\t\t\treturn current;\n   188\u2192\t\t}\n   189\u2192\t\treturn ApplyToKind.allDocuments;\n   190\u2192\t}\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192\tprivate tryMatchers(): IProblemMatch | null {\n   193\u2192\t\tthis.activeMatcher = null;\n   194\u2192\t\tconst length = this.buffer.length;\n   195\u2192\t\tfor (let startIndex = 0; startIndex < length; startIndex++) {\n   196\u2192\t\t\tconst candidates = this.matchers[length - startIndex];\n   197\u2192\t\t\tif (!candidates) {\n   198\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   199\u2192\t\t\t}\n   200\u2192\t\t\tfor (const matcher of candidates) {\n   201\u2192\t\t\t\tconst result = matcher.handle(this.buffer, startIndex);\n   202\u2192\t\t\t\tif (result.match) {\n   203\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.captureMatch(result.match);\n   204\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (result.continue) {\n   205\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.activeMatcher = matcher;\n   206\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   207\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn result.match;\n   208\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   209\u2192\t\t\t}\n   210\u2192\t\t}\n   211\u2192\t\treturn null;\n   212\u2192\t}\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192\tprivate captureMatch(match: IProblemMatch): void {\n   215\u2192\t\tthis._numberOfMatches++;\n   216\u2192\t\tif (this._maxMarkerSeverity === undefined || match.marker.severity > this._maxMarkerSeverity) {\n   217\u2192\t\t\tthis._maxMarkerSeverity = match.marker.severity;\n   218\u2192\t\t}\n   219\u2192\t}\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192\tprivate clearBuffer(): void {\n   222\u2192\t\tif (this.buffer.length > 0) {\n   223\u2192\t\t\tthis.buffer = [];\n   224\u2192\t\t}\n   225\u2192\t}\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192\tprotected recordResourcesToClean(owner: string): void {\n   228\u2192\t\tconst resourceSetToClean = this.getResourceSetToClean(owner);\n   229\u2192\t\tthis.markerService.read({ owner: owner }).forEach(marker => resourceSetToClean.set(marker.resource.toString(), marker.resource));\n   230\u2192\t}\n   231\u2192\n   232\u2192\tprotected recordResourceToClean(owner: string, resource: URI): void {\n   233\u2192\t\tthis.getResourceSetToClean(owner).set(resource.toString(), resource);\n   234\u2192\t}\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192\tprotected removeResourceToClean(owner: string, resource: string): void {\n   237\u2192\t\tconst resourceSet = this.resourcesToClean.get(owner);\n   238\u2192\t\tresourceSet?.delete(resource);\n   239\u2192\t}\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192\tprivate getResourceSetToClean(owner: string): Map<string, URI> {\n   242\u2192\t\tlet result = this.resourcesToClean.get(owner);\n   243\u2192\t\tif (!result) {\n   244\u2192\t\t\tresult = new Map<string, URI>();\n   245\u2192\t\t\tthis.resourcesToClean.set(owner, result);\n   246\u2192\t\t}\n   247\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   248\u2192\t}\n   249\u2192\n   250\u2192\tprotected cleanAllMarkers(): void {\n   251\u2192\t\tthis.resourcesToClean.forEach((value, owner) => {\n   252\u2192\t\t\tthis._cleanMarkers(owner, value);\n   253\u2192\t\t});\n   254\u2192\t\tthis.resourcesToClean = new Map<string, Map<string, URI>>();\n   255\u2192\t}\n   256\u2192\n   257\u2192\tprotected cleanMarkers(owner: string): void {\n   258\u2192\t\tconst toClean = this.resourcesToClean.get(owner);\n   259\u2192\t\tif (toClean) {\n   260\u2192\t\t\tthis._cleanMarkers(owner, toClean);\n   261\u2192\t\t\tthis.resourcesToClean.delete(owner);\n   262\u2192\t\t}\n   263\u2192\t}\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192\tprivate _cleanMarkers(owner: string, toClean: Map<string, URI>): void {\n   266\u2192\t\tconst uris: URI[] = [];\n   267\u2192\t\tconst applyTo = this.applyToByOwner.get(owner);\n   268\u2192\t\ttoClean.forEach((uri, uriAsString) => {\n   269\u2192\t\t\tif (\n   270\u2192\t\t\t\tapplyTo === ApplyToKind.allDocuments ||\n   271\u2192\t\t\t\t(applyTo === ApplyToKind.openDocuments && this.openModels[uriAsString]) ||\n   272\u2192\t\t\t\t(applyTo === ApplyToKind.closedDocuments && !this.openModels[uriAsString])\n   273\u2192\t\t\t) {\n   274\u2192\t\t\t\turis.push(uri);\n   275\u2192\t\t\t}\n   276\u2192\t\t});\n   277\u2192\t\tthis.markerService.remove(owner, uris);\n   278\u2192\t}\n   279\u2192\n   280\u2192\tprotected recordMarker(marker: IMarkerData, owner: string, resourceAsString: string): void {\n   281\u2192\t\tlet markersPerOwner = this.markers.get(owner);\n   282\u2192\t\tif (!markersPerOwner) {\n   283\u2192\t\t\tmarkersPerOwner = new Map<string, Map<string, IMarkerData>>();\n   284\u2192\t\t\tthis.markers.set(owner, markersPerOwner);\n   285\u2192\t\t}\n   286\u2192\t\tlet markersPerResource = markersPerOwner.get(resourceAsString);\n   287\u2192\t\tif (!markersPerResource) {\n   288\u2192\t\t\tmarkersPerResource = new Map<string, IMarkerData>();\n   289\u2192\t\t\tmarkersPerOwner.set(resourceAsString, markersPerResource);\n   290\u2192\t\t}\n   291\u2192\t\tconst key = IMarkerData.makeKeyOptionalMessage(marker, false);\n   292\u2192\t\tlet existingMarker;\n   293\u2192\t\tif (!markersPerResource.has(key)) {\n   294\u2192\t\t\tmarkersPerResource.set(key, marker);\n   295\u2192\t\t} else if (((existingMarker = markersPerResource.get(key)) !== undefined) && (existingMarker.message.length < marker.message.length) && isWindows) {\n   296\u2192\t\t\t// Most likely https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/77475\n   297\u2192\t\t\t// Heuristic dictates that when the key is the same and message is smaller, we have hit this limitation.\n   298\u2192\t\t\tmarkersPerResource.set(key, marker);\n   299\u2192\t\t}\n   300\u2192\t}\n   301\u2192\n   302\u2192\tprotected reportMarkers(): void {\n   303\u2192\t\tthis.markers.forEach((markersPerOwner, owner) => {\n   304\u2192\t\t\tconst deliveredMarkersPerOwner = this.getDeliveredMarkersPerOwner(owner);\n   305\u2192\t\t\tmarkersPerOwner.forEach((markers, resource) => {\n   306\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.deliverMarkersPerOwnerAndResourceResolved(owner, resource, markers, deliveredMarkersPerOwner);\n   307\u2192\t\t\t});\n   308\u2192\t\t});\n   309\u2192\t}\n   310\u2192\n   311\u2192\tprotected deliverMarkersPerOwnerAndResource(owner: string, resource: string): void {\n   312\u2192\t\tconst markersPerOwner = this.markers.get(owner);\n   313\u2192\t\tif (!markersPerOwner) {\n   314\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   315\u2192\t\t}\n   316\u2192\t\tconst deliveredMarkersPerOwner = this.getDeliveredMarkersPerOwner(owner);\n   317\u2192\t\tconst markersPerResource = markersPerOwner.get(resource);\n   318\u2192\t\tif (!markersPerResource) {\n   319\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   320\u2192\t\t}\n   321\u2192\t\tthis.deliverMarkersPerOwnerAndResourceResolved(owner, resource, markersPerResource, deliveredMarkersPerOwner);\n   322\u2192\t}\n   323\u2192\n   324\u2192\tprivate deliverMarkersPerOwnerAndResourceResolved(owner: string, resource: string, markers: Map<string, IMarkerData>, reported: Map<string, number>): void {\n   325\u2192\t\tif (markers.size !== reported.get(resource)) {\n   326\u2192\t\t\tconst toSet: IMarkerData[] = [];\n   327\u2192\t\t\tmarkers.forEach(value => toSet.push(value));\n   328\u2192\t\t\tthis.markerService.changeOne(owner, URI.parse(resource), toSet);\n   329\u2192\t\t\treported.set(resource, markers.size);\n   330\u2192\t\t}\n   331\u2192\t}\n   332\u2192\n   333\u2192\tprivate getDeliveredMarkersPerOwner(owner: string): Map<string, number> {\n   334\u2192\t\tlet result = this.deliveredMarkers.get(owner);\n   335\u2192\t\tif (!result) {\n   336\u2192\t\t\tresult = new Map<string, number>();\n   337\u2192\t\t\tthis.deliveredMarkers.set(owner, result);\n   338\u2192\t\t}\n   339\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   340\u2192\t}\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192\tprotected cleanMarkerCaches(): void {\n   343\u2192\t\tthis._numberOfMatches = 0;\n   344\u2192\t\tthis._maxMarkerSeverity = undefined;\n   345\u2192\t\tthis.markers.clear();\n   346\u2192\t\tthis.deliveredMarkers.clear();\n   347\u2192\t}\n   348\u2192\n   349\u2192\tpublic done(): void {\n   350\u2192\t\tthis.reportMarkers();\n   351\u2192\t\tthis.cleanAllMarkers();\n   352\u2192\t}\n   353\u2192}\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192export const enum ProblemHandlingStrategy {\n   356\u2192\tClean\n   357\u2192}\n   358\u2192\n   359\u2192export class StartStopProblemCollector extends AbstractProblemCollector implements IProblemMatcher {\n   360\u2192\tprivate owners: string[];\n   361\u2192\n   362\u2192\tprivate currentOwner: string | undefined;\n   363\u2192\tprivate currentResource: string | undefined;\n   364\u2192\n   365\u2192\tconstructor(problemMatchers: ProblemMatcher[], markerService: IMarkerService, modelService: IModelService, _strategy: ProblemHandlingStrategy = ProblemHandlingStrategy.Clean, fileService?: IFileService) {\n   366\u2192\t\tsuper(problemMatchers, markerService, modelService, fileService);\n   367\u2192\t\tconst ownerSet: { [key: string]: boolean } = Object.create(null);\n   368\u2192\t\tproblemMatchers.forEach(description => ownerSet[description.owner] = true);\n   369\u2192\t\tthis.owners = Object.keys(ownerSet);\n   370\u2192\t\tthis.owners.forEach((owner) => {\n   371\u2192\t\t\tthis.recordResourcesToClean(owner);\n   372\u2192\t\t});\n   373\u2192\t}\n   374\u2192\n   375\u2192\tprotected async processLineInternal(line: string): Promise<void> {\n   376\u2192\t\tconst markerMatch = this.tryFindMarker(line);\n   377\u2192\t\tif (!markerMatch) {\n   378\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   379\u2192\t\t}\n   380\u2192\n   381\u2192\t\tconst owner = markerMatch.description.owner;\n   382\u2192\t\tconst resource = await markerMatch.resource;\n   383\u2192\t\tconst resourceAsString = resource.toString();\n   384\u2192\t\tthis.removeResourceToClean(owner, resourceAsString);\n   385\u2192\t\tconst shouldApplyMatch = await this.shouldApplyMatch(markerMatch);\n   386\u2192\t\tif (shouldApplyMatch) {\n   387\u2192\t\t\tthis.recordMarker(markerMatch.marker, owner, resourceAsString);\n   388\u2192\t\t\tif (this.currentOwner !== owner || this.currentResource !== resourceAsString) {\n   389\u2192\t\t\t\tif (this.currentOwner && this.currentResource) {\n   390\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.deliverMarkersPerOwnerAndResource(this.currentOwner, this.currentResource);\n   391\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   392\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.currentOwner = owner;\n   393\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.currentResource = resourceAsString;\n   394\u2192\t\t\t}\n   395\u2192\t\t}\n   396\u2192\t}\n   397\u2192}\n   398\u2192\n   399\u2192interface IBackgroundPatterns {\n   400\u2192\tkey: string;\n   401\u2192\tmatcher: ProblemMatcher;\n   402\u2192\tbegin: IWatchingPattern;\n   403\u2192\tend: IWatchingPattern;\n   404\u2192}\n   405\u2192\n   406\u2192export class WatchingProblemCollector extends AbstractProblemCollector implements IProblemMatcher {\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192\tprivate backgroundPatterns: IBackgroundPatterns[];\n   409\u2192\n   410\u2192\t// workaround for https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/44018\n   411\u2192\tprivate _activeBackgroundMatchers: Set<string>;\n   412\u2192\n   413\u2192\t// Current State\n   414\u2192\tprivate currentOwner: string | undefined;\n   415\u2192\tprivate currentResource: string | undefined;\n   416\u2192\n   417\u2192\tprivate lines: string[] = [];\n   418\u2192\tpublic beginPatterns: RegExp[] = [];\n   419\u2192\tconstructor(problemMatchers: ProblemMatcher[], markerService: IMarkerService, modelService: IModelService, fileService?: IFileService) {\n   420\u2192\t\tsuper(problemMatchers, markerService, modelService, fileService);\n   421\u2192\t\tthis.resetCurrentResource();\n   422\u2192\t\tthis.backgroundPatterns = [];\n   423\u2192\t\tthis._activeBackgroundMatchers = new Set<string>();\n   424\u2192\t\tthis.problemMatchers.forEach(matcher => {\n   425\u2192\t\t\tif (matcher.watching) {\n   426\u2192\t\t\t\tconst key: string = generateUuid();\n   427\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.backgroundPatterns.push({\n   428\u2192\t\t\t\t\tkey,\n   429\u2192\t\t\t\t\tmatcher: matcher,\n   430\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbegin: matcher.watching.beginsPattern,\n   431\u2192\t\t\t\t\tend: matcher.watching.endsPattern\n   432\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n   433\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.beginPatterns.push(matcher.watching.beginsPattern.regexp);\n   434\u2192\t\t\t}\n   435\u2192\t\t});\n   436\u2192\n   437\u2192\t\tthis.modelListeners.add(this.modelService.onModelRemoved(modelEvent => {\n   438\u2192\t\t\tlet markerChanged: IDisposable | undefined =\n   439\u2192\t\t\t\tEvent.debounce(this.markerService.onMarkerChanged, (last: readonly URI[] | undefined, e: readonly URI[]) => {\n   440\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn (last ?? []).concat(e);\n   441\u2192\t\t\t\t}, 500, false, true)(async (markerEvent) => {\n   442\u2192\t\t\t\t\tmarkerChanged?.dispose();\n   443\u2192\t\t\t\t\tmarkerChanged = undefined;\n   444\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (!markerEvent || !markerEvent.includes(modelEvent.uri) || (this.markerService.read({ resource: modelEvent.uri }).length !== 0)) {\n   445\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n   446\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   447\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst oldLines = Array.from(this.lines);\n   448\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfor (const line of oldLines) {\n   449\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tawait this.processLineInternal(line);\n   450\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   451\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n   452\u2192\t\t\tsetTimeout(async () => {\n   453\u2192\t\t\t\t// Calling dispose below can trigger the debounce event (via flushOnListenerRemove), so we\n   454\u2192\t\t\t\t// have to unset markerChanged first to make sure the handler above doesn't dispose it again.\n   455\u2192\t\t\t\tconst _markerChanged = markerChanged;\n   456\u2192\t\t\t\tmarkerChanged = undefined;\n   457\u2192\t\t\t\t_markerChanged?.dispose();\n   458\u2192\t\t\t}, 600);\n   459\u2192\t\t}));\n   460\u2192\t}\n   461\u2192\n   462\u2192\tpublic aboutToStart(): void {\n   463\u2192\t\tfor (const background of this.backgroundPatterns) {\n   464\u2192\t\t\tif (background.matcher.watching && background.matcher.watching.activeOnStart) {\n   465\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._activeBackgroundMatchers.add(background.key);\n   466\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onDidStateChange.fire(IProblemCollectorEvent.create(ProblemCollectorEventKind.BackgroundProcessingBegins));\n   467\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.recordResourcesToClean(background.matcher.owner);\n   468\u2192\t\t\t}\n   469\u2192\t\t}\n   470\u2192\t}\n   471\u2192\n   472\u2192\tprotected async processLineInternal(line: string): Promise<void> {\n   473\u2192\t\tif (await this.tryBegin(line) || this.tryFinish(line)) {\n   474\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   475\u2192\t\t}\n   476\u2192\t\tthis.lines.push(line);\n   477\u2192\t\tconst markerMatch = this.tryFindMarker(line);\n   478\u2192\t\tif (!markerMatch) {\n   479\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   480\u2192\t\t}\n   481\u2192\t\tconst resource = await markerMatch.resource;\n   482\u2192\t\tconst owner = markerMatch.description.owner;\n   483\u2192\t\tconst resourceAsString = resource.toString();\n   484\u2192\t\tthis.removeResourceToClean(owner, resourceAsString);\n   485\u2192\t\tconst shouldApplyMatch = await this.shouldApplyMatch(markerMatch);\n   486\u2192\t\tif (shouldApplyMatch) {\n   487\u2192\t\t\tthis.recordMarker(markerMatch.marker, owner, resourceAsString);\n   488\u2192\t\t\tif (this.currentOwner !== owner || this.currentResource !== resourceAsString) {\n   489\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.reportMarkersForCurrentResource();\n   490\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.currentOwner = owner;\n   491\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.currentResource = resourceAsString;\n   492\u2192\t\t\t}\n   493\u2192\t\t}\n   494\u2192\t}\n   495\u2192\n   496\u2192\tpublic forceDelivery(): void {\n   497\u2192\t\tthis.reportMarkersForCurrentResource();\n   498\u2192\t}\n   499\u2192\n   500\u2192\tprivate async tryBegin(line: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   501\u2192\t\tlet result = false;\n   502\u2192\t\tfor (const background of this.backgroundPatterns) {\n   503\u2192\t\t\tconst matches = background.begin.regexp.exec(line);\n   504\u2192\t\t\tif (matches) {\n   505\u2192\t\t\t\tif (this._activeBackgroundMatchers.has(background.key)) {\n   506\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   507\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   508\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._activeBackgroundMatchers.add(background.key);\n   509\u2192\t\t\t\tresult = true;\n   510\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onDidFindFirstMatch.fire();\n   511\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.lines = [];\n   512\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.lines.push(line);\n   513\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onDidStateChange.fire(IProblemCollectorEvent.create(ProblemCollectorEventKind.BackgroundProcessingBegins));\n   514\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.cleanMarkerCaches();\n   515\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.resetCurrentResource();\n   516\u2192\t\t\t\tconst owner = background.matcher.owner;\n   517\u2192\t\t\t\tconst file = matches[background.begin.file!];\n   518\u2192\t\t\t\tif (file) {\n   519\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst resource = getResource(file, background.matcher);\n   520\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.recordResourceToClean(owner, await resource);\n   521\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   522\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.recordResourcesToClean(owner);\n   523\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   524\u2192\t\t\t}\n   525\u2192\t\t}\n   526\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   527\u2192\t}\n   528\u2192\n   529\u2192\tprivate tryFinish(line: string): boolean {\n   530\u2192\t\tlet result = false;\n   531\u2192\t\tfor (const background of this.backgroundPatterns) {\n   532\u2192\t\t\tconst matches = background.end.regexp.exec(line);\n   533\u2192\t\t\tif (matches) {\n   534\u2192\t\t\t\tif (this._numberOfMatches > 0) {\n   535\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._onDidFindErrors.fire();\n   536\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   537\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._onDidRequestInvalidateLastMarker.fire();\n   538\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   539\u2192\t\t\t\tif (this._activeBackgroundMatchers.has(background.key)) {\n   540\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._activeBackgroundMatchers.delete(background.key);\n   541\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.resetCurrentResource();\n   542\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._onDidStateChange.fire(IProblemCollectorEvent.create(ProblemCollectorEventKind.BackgroundProcessingEnds));\n   543\u2192\t\t\t\t\tresult = true;\n   544\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.lines.push(line);\n   545\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst owner = background.matcher.owner;\n   546\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.cleanMarkers(owner);\n   547\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.cleanMarkerCaches();\n   548\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   549\u2192\t\t\t}\n   550\u2192\t\t}\n   551\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   552\u2192\t}\n   553\u2192\n   554\u2192\tprivate resetCurrentResource(): void {\n   555\u2192\t\tthis.reportMarkersForCurrentResource();\n   556\u2192\t\tthis.currentOwner = undefined;\n   557\u2192\t\tthis.currentResource = undefined;\n   558\u2192\t}\n   559\u2192\n   560\u2192\tprivate reportMarkersForCurrentResource(): void {\n   561\u2192\t\tif (this.currentOwner && this.currentResource) {\n   562\u2192\t\t\tthis.deliverMarkersPerOwnerAndResource(this.currentOwner, this.currentResource);\n   563\u2192\t\t}\n   564\u2192\t}\n   565\u2192\n   566\u2192\tpublic override done(): void {\n   567\u2192\t\t[...this.applyToByOwner.keys()].forEach(owner => {\n   568\u2192\t\t\tthis.recordResourcesToClean(owner);\n   569\u2192\t\t});\n   570\u2192\t\tsuper.done();\n   571\u2192\t}\n   572\u2192\n   573\u2192\tpublic isWatching(): boolean {\n   574\u2192\t\treturn this.backgroundPatterns.length > 0;\n   575\u2192\t}\n   576\u2192}\n   577\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n     3\u2192 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { Disposable, IDisposable, toDisposable } from '../../../../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\n     7\u2192import { IMarkerData, IMarkerService } from '../../../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\n     8\u2192import { IRange } from '../../../../../../editor/common/core/range.js';\n     9\u2192import { ICellExecutionStateChangedEvent, IExecutionStateChangedEvent, INotebookExecutionStateService, NotebookExecutionType } from '../../../common/notebookExecutionStateService.js';\n    10\u2192import { IConfigurationService } from '../../../../../../platform/configuration/common/configuration.js';\n    11\u2192import { CellKind, NotebookSetting } from '../../../common/notebookCommon.js';\n    12\u2192import { INotebookEditor, INotebookEditorContribution } from '../../notebookBrowser.js';\n    13\u2192import { registerNotebookContribution } from '../../notebookEditorExtensions.js';\n    14\u2192import { Iterable } from '../../../../../../base/common/iterator.js';\n    15\u2192import { CodeCellViewModel } from '../../viewModel/codeCellViewModel.js';\n    16\u2192import { Event } from '../../../../../../base/common/event.js';\n    17\u2192import { IChatAgentService } from '../../../../chat/common/chatAgents.js';\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192export class CellDiagnostics extends Disposable implements INotebookEditorContribution {\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192\tstatic ID: string = 'workbench.notebook.cellDiagnostics';\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192\tprivate enabled = false;\n    24\u2192\tprivate listening = false;\n    25\u2192\tprivate diagnosticsByHandle: Map<number, IDisposable[]> = new Map();\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192\tconstructor(\n    28\u2192\t\tprivate readonly notebookEditor: INotebookEditor,\n    29\u2192\t\t@INotebookExecutionStateService private readonly notebookExecutionStateService: INotebookExecutionStateService,\n    30\u2192\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly markerService: IMarkerService,\n    31\u2192\t\t@IChatAgentService private readonly chatAgentService: IChatAgentService,\n    32\u2192\t\t@IConfigurationService private readonly configurationService: IConfigurationService\n    33\u2192\t) {\n    34\u2192\t\tsuper();\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192\t\tthis.updateEnabled();\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192\t\tthis._register(chatAgentService.onDidChangeAgents(() => this.updateEnabled()));\n    39\u2192\t\tthis._register(configurationService.onDidChangeConfiguration((e) => {\n    40\u2192\t\t\tif (e.affectsConfiguration(NotebookSetting.cellFailureDiagnostics)) {\n    41\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.updateEnabled();\n    42\u2192\t\t\t}\n    43\u2192\t\t}));\n    44\u2192\t}\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192\tprivate updateEnabled() {\n    47\u2192\t\tconst settingEnabled = this.configurationService.getValue(NotebookSetting.cellFailureDiagnostics);\n    48\u2192\t\tif (this.enabled && (!settingEnabled || Iterable.isEmpty(this.chatAgentService.getAgents()))) {\n    49\u2192\t\t\tthis.enabled = false;\n    50\u2192\t\t\tthis.clearAll();\n    51\u2192\t\t} else if (!this.enabled && settingEnabled && !Iterable.isEmpty(this.chatAgentService.getAgents())) {\n    52\u2192\t\t\tthis.enabled = true;\n    53\u2192\t\t\tif (!this.listening) {\n    54\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.listening = true;\n    55\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._register(Event.accumulate<ICellExecutionStateChangedEvent | IExecutionStateChangedEvent>(\n    56\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.notebookExecutionStateService.onDidChangeExecution, 200\n    57\u2192\t\t\t\t)((e) => this.handleChangeExecutionState(e)));\n    58\u2192\t\t\t}\n    59\u2192\t\t}\n    60\u2192\t}\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192\tprivate handleChangeExecutionState(changes: (ICellExecutionStateChangedEvent | IExecutionStateChangedEvent)[]) {\n    63\u2192\t\tif (!this.enabled) {\n    64\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n    65\u2192\t\t}\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\t\tconst handled = new Set<number>();\n    68\u2192\t\tfor (const e of changes.reverse()) {\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\t\t\tconst notebookUri = this.notebookEditor.textModel?.uri;\n    71\u2192\t\t\tif (e.type === NotebookExecutionType.cell && notebookUri && e.affectsNotebook(notebookUri) && !handled.has(e.cellHandle)) {\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\thandled.add(e.cellHandle);\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!!e.changed) {\n    74\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// cell is running\n    75\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.clear(e.cellHandle);\n    76\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n    77\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.setDiagnostics(e.cellHandle);\n    78\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    79\u2192\t\t\t}\n    80\u2192\t\t}\n    81\u2192\t}\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192\tprivate clearAll() {\n    84\u2192\t\tfor (const handle of this.diagnosticsByHandle.keys()) {\n    85\u2192\t\t\tthis.clear(handle);\n    86\u2192\t\t}\n    87\u2192\t}\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192\tpublic clear(cellHandle: number) {\n    90\u2192\t\tconst disposables = this.diagnosticsByHandle.get(cellHandle);\n    91\u2192\t\tif (disposables) {\n    92\u2192\t\t\tfor (const disposable of disposables) {\n    93\u2192\t\t\t\tdisposable.dispose();\n    94\u2192\t\t\t}\n    95\u2192\t\t\tthis.diagnosticsByHandle.delete(cellHandle);\n    96\u2192\t\t}\n    97\u2192\t}\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192\tprivate setDiagnostics(cellHandle: number) {\n   100\u2192\t\tif (this.diagnosticsByHandle.has(cellHandle)) {\n   101\u2192\t\t\t// multiple diagnostics per cell not supported for now\n   102\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   103\u2192\t\t}\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192\t\tconst cell = this.notebookEditor.getCellByHandle(cellHandle);\n   106\u2192\t\tif (!cell || cell.cellKind !== CellKind.Code) {\n   107\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   108\u2192\t\t}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192\t\tconst metadata = cell.model.internalMetadata;\n   111\u2192\t\tif (cell instanceof CodeCellViewModel && !metadata.lastRunSuccess && metadata?.error?.location) {\n   112\u2192\t\t\tconst disposables: IDisposable[] = [];\n   113\u2192\t\t\tconst errorLabel = metadata.error.name ? `${metadata.error.name}: ${metadata.error.message}` : metadata.error.message;\n   114\u2192\t\t\tconst marker = this.createMarkerData(errorLabel, metadata.error.location);\n   115\u2192\t\t\tthis.markerService.changeOne(CellDiagnostics.ID, cell.uri, [marker]);\n   116\u2192\t\t\tdisposables.push(toDisposable(() => this.markerService.changeOne(CellDiagnostics.ID, cell.uri, [])));\n   117\u2192\t\t\tcell.executionErrorDiagnostic.set(metadata.error, undefined);\n   118\u2192\t\t\tdisposables.push(toDisposable(() => cell.executionErrorDiagnostic.set(undefined, undefined)));\n   119\u2192\t\t\tdisposables.push(cell.model.onDidChangeOutputs(() => {\n   120\u2192\t\t\t\tif (cell.model.outputs.length === 0) {\n   121\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.clear(cellHandle);\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   123\u2192\t\t\t}));\n   124\u2192\t\t\tdisposables.push(cell.model.onDidChangeContent(() => {\n   125\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.clear(cellHandle);\n   126\u2192\t\t\t}));\n   127\u2192\t\t\tthis.diagnosticsByHandle.set(cellHandle, disposables);\n   128\u2192\t\t}\n   129\u2192\t}\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192\tprivate createMarkerData(message: string, location: IRange): IMarkerData {\n   132\u2192\t\treturn {\n   133\u2192\t\t\tseverity: 8,\n   134\u2192\t\t\tmessage: message,\n   135\u2192\t\t\tstartLineNumber: location.startLineNumber + 1,\n   136\u2192\t\t\tstartColumn: location.startColumn + 1,\n   137\u2192\t\t\tendLineNumber: location.endLineNumber + 1,\n   138\u2192\t\t\tendColumn: location.endColumn + 1,\n   139\u2192\t\t\tsource: 'Cell Execution Error'\n   140\u2192\t\t};\n   141\u2192\t}\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192\toverride dispose() {\n   144\u2192\t\tsuper.dispose();\n   145\u2192\t\tthis.clearAll();\n   146\u2192\t}\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192}\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192registerNotebookContribution(CellDiagnostics.ID, CellDiagnostics);\n   151\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
26. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/common/extHostFileSystemEventService.ts"
}
Output
"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n     3\u2192 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { Emitter, Event, AsyncEmitter, IWaitUntil, IWaitUntilData } from '../../../base/common/event.js';\n     7\u2192import { GLOBSTAR, GLOB_SPLIT, IRelativePattern, parse } from '../../../base/common/glob.js';\n     8\u2192import { URI } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\n     9\u2192import { ExtHostDocumentsAndEditors } from './extHostDocumentsAndEditors.js';\n    10\u2192import type * as vscode from 'vscode';\n    11\u2192import { ExtHostFileSystemEventServiceShape, FileSystemEvents, IMainContext, SourceTargetPair, IWorkspaceEditDto, IWillRunFileOperationParticipation, MainContext, IRelativePatternDto } from './extHost.protocol.js';\n    12\u2192import * as typeConverter from './extHostTypeConverters.js';\n    13\u2192import { Disposable, WorkspaceEdit } from './extHostTypes.js';\n    14\u2192import { IExtensionDescription } from '../../../platform/extensions/common/extensions.js';\n    15\u2192import { FileChangeFilter, FileOperation, IGlobPatterns } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\n    16\u2192import { CancellationToken } from '../../../base/common/cancellation.js';\n    17\u2192import { ILogService } from '../../../platform/log/common/log.js';\n    18\u2192import { IExtHostWorkspace } from './extHostWorkspace.js';\n    19\u2192import { Lazy } from '../../../base/common/lazy.js';\n    20\u2192import { ExtHostConfigProvider } from './extHostConfiguration.js';\n    21\u2192import { rtrim } from '../../../base/common/strings.js';\n    22\u2192import { normalizeWatcherPattern } from '../../../platform/files/common/watcher.js';\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192export interface FileSystemWatcherCreateOptions {\n    25\u2192\treadonly correlate: boolean;\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192\treadonly ignoreCreateEvents?: boolean;\n    28\u2192\treadonly ignoreChangeEvents?: boolean;\n    29\u2192\treadonly ignoreDeleteEvents?: boolean;\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192\treadonly excludes?: string[];\n    32\u2192}\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192class FileSystemWatcher implements vscode.FileSystemWatcher {\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192\tprivate readonly session = Math.random();\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidCreate = new Emitter<vscode.Uri>();\n    39\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidChange = new Emitter<vscode.Uri>();\n    40\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidDelete = new Emitter<vscode.Uri>();\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\tprivate _disposable: Disposable;\n    43\u2192\tprivate _config: number;\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192\tget ignoreCreateEvents(): boolean {\n    46\u2192\t\treturn Boolean(this._config & 0b001);\n    47\u2192\t}\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192\tget ignoreChangeEvents(): boolean {\n    50\u2192\t\treturn Boolean(this._config & 0b010);\n    51\u2192\t}\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192\tget ignoreDeleteEvents(): boolean {\n    54\u2192\t\treturn Boolean(this._config & 0b100);\n    55\u2192\t}\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192\tconstructor(mainContext: IMainContext, configuration: ExtHostConfigProvider, workspace: IExtHostWorkspace, extension: IExtensionDescription, dispatcher: Event<FileSystemEvents>, globPattern: string | IRelativePatternDto, options: FileSystemWatcherCreateOptions) {\n    58\u2192\t\tthis._config = 0;\n    59\u2192\t\tif (options.ignoreCreateEvents) {\n    60\u2192\t\t\tthis._config += 0b001;\n    61\u2192\t\t}\n    62\u2192\t\tif (options.ignoreChangeEvents) {\n    63\u2192\t\t\tthis._config += 0b010;\n    64\u2192\t\t}\n    65\u2192\t\tif (options.ignoreDeleteEvents) {\n    66\u2192\t\t\tthis._config += 0b100;\n    67\u2192\t\t}\n    68\u2192\n    69\u2192\t\tconst parsedPattern = parse(globPattern);\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192\t\t// 1.64.x behaviour change: given the new support to watch any folder\n    72\u2192\t\t// we start to ignore events outside the workspace when only a string\n    73\u2192\t\t// pattern is provided to avoid sending events to extensions that are\n    74\u2192\t\t// unexpected.\n    75\u2192\t\t// https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/3025\n    76\u2192\t\tconst excludeOutOfWorkspaceEvents = typeof globPattern === 'string';\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192\t\t// 1.84.x introduces new proposed API for a watcher to set exclude\n    79\u2192\t\t// rules. In these cases, we turn the file watcher into correlation\n    80\u2192\t\t// mode and ignore any event that does not match the correlation ID.\n    81\u2192\t\tconst excludeUncorrelatedEvents = options.correlate;\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192\t\tconst subscription = dispatcher(events => {\n    84\u2192\t\t\tif (typeof events.session === 'number' && events.session !== this.session) {\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\treturn; // ignore events from other file watchers that are in correlation mode\n    86\u2192\t\t\t}\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192\t\t\tif (excludeUncorrelatedEvents && typeof events.session === 'undefined') {\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\treturn; // ignore events from other non-correlating file watcher when we are in correlation mode\n    90\u2192\t\t\t}\n    91\u2192\n    92\u2192\t\t\tif (!options.ignoreCreateEvents) {\n    93\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const created of events.created) {\n    94\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst uri = URI.revive(created);\n    95\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (parsedPattern(uri.fsPath) && (!excludeOutOfWorkspaceEvents || workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(uri))) {\n    96\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis._onDidCreate.fire(uri);\n    97\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n    98\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    99\u2192\t\t\t}\n   100\u2192\t\t\tif (!options.ignoreChangeEvents) {\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const changed of events.changed) {\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst uri = URI.revive(changed);\n   103\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (parsedPattern(uri.fsPath) && (!excludeOutOfWorkspaceEvents || workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(uri))) {\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis._onDidChange.fire(uri);\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   106\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   107\u2192\t\t\t}\n   108\u2192\t\t\tif (!options.ignoreDeleteEvents) {\n   109\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const deleted of events.deleted) {\n   110\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst uri = URI.revive(deleted);\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (parsedPattern(uri.fsPath) && (!excludeOutOfWorkspaceEvents || workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(uri))) {\n   112\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis._onDidDelete.fire(uri);\n   113\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   114\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   115\u2192\t\t\t}\n   116\u2192\t\t});\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192\t\tthis._disposable = Disposable.from(this.ensureWatching(mainContext, workspace, configuration, extension, globPattern, options, options.correlate), this._onDidCreate, this._onDidChange, this._onDidDelete, subscription);\n   119\u2192\t}\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192\tprivate ensureWatching(mainContext: IMainContext, workspace: IExtHostWorkspace, configuration: ExtHostConfigProvider, extension: IExtensionDescription, globPattern: string | IRelativePatternDto, options: FileSystemWatcherCreateOptions, correlate: boolean | undefined): Disposable {\n   122\u2192\t\tconst disposable = Disposable.from();\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192\t\tif (typeof globPattern === 'string') {\n   125\u2192\t\t\treturn disposable; // workspace is already watched by default, no need to watch again!\n   126\u2192\t\t}\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192\t\tif (options.ignoreChangeEvents && options.ignoreCreateEvents && options.ignoreDeleteEvents) {\n   129\u2192\t\t\treturn disposable; // no need to watch if we ignore all events\n   130\u2192\t\t}\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192\t\tconst proxy = mainContext.getProxy(MainContext.MainThreadFileSystemEventService);\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192\t\tlet recursive = false;\n   135\u2192\t\tif (globPattern.pattern.includes(GLOBSTAR) || globPattern.pattern.includes(GLOB_SPLIT)) {\n   136\u2192\t\t\trecursive = true; // only watch recursively if pattern indicates the need for it\n   137\u2192\t\t}\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192\t\tconst excludes = options.excludes ?? [];\n   140\u2192\t\tlet includes: Array<string | IRelativePattern> | undefined = undefined;\n   141\u2192\t\tlet filter: FileChangeFilter | undefined;\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192\t\t// Correlated: adjust filter based on arguments\n   144\u2192\t\tif (correlate) {\n   145\u2192\t\t\tif (options.ignoreChangeEvents || options.ignoreCreateEvents || options.ignoreDeleteEvents) {\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\tfilter = FileChangeFilter.UPDATED | FileChangeFilter.ADDED | FileChangeFilter.DELETED;\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tif (options.ignoreChangeEvents) {\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfilter &= ~FileChangeFilter.UPDATED;\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192\t\t\t\tif (options.ignoreCreateEvents) {\n   153\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfilter &= ~FileChangeFilter.ADDED;\n   154\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192\t\t\t\tif (options.ignoreDeleteEvents) {\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfilter &= ~FileChangeFilter.DELETED;\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   159\u2192\t\t\t}\n   160\u2192\t\t}\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192\t\t// Uncorrelated: adjust includes and excludes based on settings\n   163\u2192\t\telse {\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\t\t\t// Automatically add `files.watcherExclude` patterns when watching\n   166\u2192\t\t\t// recursively to give users a chance to configure exclude rules\n   167\u2192\t\t\t// for reducing the overhead of watching recursively\n   168\u2192\t\t\tif (recursive && excludes.length === 0) {\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\tconst workspaceFolder = workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(URI.revive(globPattern.baseUri));\n   170\u2192\t\t\t\tconst watcherExcludes = configuration.getConfiguration('files', workspaceFolder).get<IGlobPatterns>('watcherExclude');\n   171\u2192\t\t\t\tif (watcherExcludes) {\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfor (const key in watcherExcludes) {\n   173\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (key && watcherExcludes[key] === true) {\n   174\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\texcludes.push(key);\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   176\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   178\u2192\t\t\t}\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192\t\t\t// Non-recursive watching inside the workspace will overlap with\n   181\u2192\t\t\t// our standard workspace watchers. To prevent duplicate events,\n   182\u2192\t\t\t// we only want to include events for files that are otherwise\n   183\u2192\t\t\t// excluded via `files.watcherExclude`. As such, we configure\n   184\u2192\t\t\t// to include each configured exclude pattern so that only those\n   185\u2192\t\t\t// events are reported that are otherwise excluded.\n   186\u2192\t\t\t// However, we cannot just use the pattern as is, because a pattern\n   187\u2192\t\t\t// such as `bar` for a exclude, will work to exclude any of\n   188\u2192\t\t\t// `<workspace path>/bar` but will not work as include for files within\n   189\u2192\t\t\t// `bar` unless a suffix of `/**` if added.\n   190\u2192\t\t\t// (https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/148245)\n   191\u2192\t\t\telse if (!recursive) {\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\tconst workspaceFolder = workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(URI.revive(globPattern.baseUri));\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\tif (workspaceFolder) {\n   194\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst watcherExcludes = configuration.getConfiguration('files', workspaceFolder).get<IGlobPatterns>('watcherExclude');\n   195\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (watcherExcludes) {\n   196\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const key in watcherExcludes) {\n   197\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (key && watcherExcludes[key] === true) {\n   198\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst includePattern = `${rtrim(key, '/')}/${GLOBSTAR}`;\n   199\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!includes) {\n   200\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tincludes = [];\n   201\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tincludes.push(normalizeWatcherPattern(workspaceFolder.uri.fsPath, includePattern));\n   204\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   205\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   206\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// Still ignore watch request if there are actually no configured\n   209\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// exclude rules, because in that case our default recursive watcher\n   210\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// should be able to take care of all events.\n   211\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (!includes || includes.length === 0) {\n   212\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn disposable;\n   213\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   214\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   215\u2192\t\t\t}\n   216\u2192\t\t}\n   217\u2192\n   218\u2192\t\tproxy.$watch(extension.identifier.value, this.session, globPattern.baseUri, { recursive, excludes, includes, filter }, Boolean(correlate));\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192\t\treturn Disposable.from({ dispose: () => proxy.$unwatch(this.session) });\n   221\u2192\t}\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192\tdispose() {\n   224\u2192\t\tthis._disposable.dispose();\n   225\u2192\t}\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192\tget onDidCreate(): Event<vscode.Uri> {\n   228\u2192\t\treturn this._onDidCreate.event;\n   229\u2192\t}\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192\tget onDidChange(): Event<vscode.Uri> {\n   232\u2192\t\treturn this._onDidChange.event;\n   233\u2192\t}\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192\tget onDidDelete(): Event<vscode.Uri> {\n   236\u2192\t\treturn this._onDidDelete.event;\n   237\u2192\t}\n   238\u2192}\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192interface IExtensionListener<E> {\n   241\u2192\textension: IExtensionDescription;\n   242\u2192\t(e: E): any;\n   243\u2192}\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192class LazyRevivedFileSystemEvents implements FileSystemEvents {\n   246\u2192\n   247\u2192\tconstructor(private readonly _events: FileSystemEvents) { }\n   248\u2192\n   249\u2192\treadonly session = this._events.session;\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192\tprivate _created = new Lazy(() => this._events.created.map(URI.revive) as URI[]);\n   252\u2192\tget created(): URI[] { return this._created.value; }\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192\tprivate _changed = new Lazy(() => this._events.changed.map(URI.revive) as URI[]);\n   255\u2192\tget changed(): URI[] { return this._changed.value; }\n   256\u2192\n   257\u2192\tprivate _deleted = new Lazy(() => this._events.deleted.map(URI.revive) as URI[]);\n   258\u2192\tget deleted(): URI[] { return this._deleted.value; }\n   259\u2192}\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192export class ExtHostFileSystemEventService implements ExtHostFileSystemEventServiceShape {\n   262\u2192\n   263\u2192\tprivate readonly _onFileSystemEvent = new Emitter<FileSystemEvents>();\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidRenameFile = new Emitter<vscode.FileRenameEvent>();\n   266\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidCreateFile = new Emitter<vscode.FileCreateEvent>();\n   267\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidDeleteFile = new Emitter<vscode.FileDeleteEvent>();\n   268\u2192\tprivate readonly _onWillRenameFile = new AsyncEmitter<vscode.FileWillRenameEvent>();\n   269\u2192\tprivate readonly _onWillCreateFile = new AsyncEmitter<vscode.FileWillCreateEvent>();\n   270\u2192\tprivate readonly _onWillDeleteFile = new AsyncEmitter<vscode.FileWillDeleteEvent>();\n   271\u2192\n   272\u2192\treadonly onDidRenameFile: Event<vscode.FileRenameEvent> = this._onDidRenameFile.event;\n   273\u2192\treadonly onDidCreateFile: Event<vscode.FileCreateEvent> = this._onDidCreateFile.event;\n   274\u2192\treadonly onDidDeleteFile: Event<vscode.FileDeleteEvent> = this._onDidDeleteFile.event;\n   275\u2192\n   276\u2192\tconstructor(\n   277\u2192\t\tprivate readonly _mainContext: IMainContext,\n   278\u2192\t\tprivate readonly _logService: ILogService,\n   279\u2192\t\tprivate readonly _extHostDocumentsAndEditors: ExtHostDocumentsAndEditors\n   280\u2192\t) {\n   281\u2192\t\t//\n   282\u2192\t}\n   283\u2192\n   284\u2192\t//--- file events\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192\tcreateFileSystemWatcher(workspace: IExtHostWorkspace, configProvider: ExtHostConfigProvider, extension: IExtensionDescription, globPattern: vscode.GlobPattern, options: FileSystemWatcherCreateOptions): vscode.FileSystemWatcher {\n   287\u2192\t\treturn new FileSystemWatcher(this._mainContext, configProvider, workspace, extension, this._onFileSystemEvent.event, typeConverter.GlobPattern.from(globPattern), options);\n   288\u2192\t}\n   289\u2192\n   290\u2192\t$onFileEvent(events: FileSystemEvents) {\n   291\u2192\t\tthis._onFileSystemEvent.fire(new LazyRevivedFileSystemEvents(events));\n   292\u2192\t}\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192\t//--- file operations\n   295\u2192\n   296\u2192\t$onDidRunFileOperation(operation: FileOperation, files: SourceTargetPair[]): void {\n   297\u2192\t\tswitch (operation) {\n   298\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.MOVE:\n   299\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onDidRenameFile.fire(Object.freeze({ files: files.map(f => ({ oldUri: URI.revive(f.source!), newUri: URI.revive(f.target) })) }));\n   300\u2192\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   301\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.DELETE:\n   302\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onDidDeleteFile.fire(Object.freeze({ files: files.map(f => URI.revive(f.target)) }));\n   303\u2192\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   304\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.CREATE:\n   305\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.COPY:\n   306\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onDidCreateFile.fire(Object.freeze({ files: files.map(f => URI.revive(f.target)) }));\n   307\u2192\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   308\u2192\t\t\tdefault:\n   309\u2192\t\t\t//ignore, dont send\n   310\u2192\t\t}\n   311\u2192\t}\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192\tgetOnWillRenameFileEvent(extension: IExtensionDescription): Event<vscode.FileWillRenameEvent> {\n   315\u2192\t\treturn this._createWillExecuteEvent(extension, this._onWillRenameFile);\n   316\u2192\t}\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192\tgetOnWillCreateFileEvent(extension: IExtensionDescription): Event<vscode.FileWillCreateEvent> {\n   319\u2192\t\treturn this._createWillExecuteEvent(extension, this._onWillCreateFile);\n   320\u2192\t}\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192\tgetOnWillDeleteFileEvent(extension: IExtensionDescription): Event<vscode.FileWillDeleteEvent> {\n   323\u2192\t\treturn this._createWillExecuteEvent(extension, this._onWillDeleteFile);\n   324\u2192\t}\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192\tprivate _createWillExecuteEvent<E extends IWaitUntil>(extension: IExtensionDescription, emitter: AsyncEmitter<E>): Event<E> {\n   327\u2192\t\treturn (listener, thisArg, disposables) => {\n   328\u2192\t\t\tconst wrappedListener: IExtensionListener<E> = function wrapped(e: E) { listener.call(thisArg, e); };\n   329\u2192\t\t\twrappedListener.extension = extension;\n   330\u2192\t\t\treturn emitter.event(wrappedListener, undefined, disposables);\n   331\u2192\t\t};\n   332\u2192\t}\n   333\u2192\n   334\u2192\tasync $onWillRunFileOperation(operation: FileOperation, files: SourceTargetPair[], timeout: number, token: CancellationToken): Promise<IWillRunFileOperationParticipation | undefined> {\n   335\u2192\t\tswitch (operation) {\n   336\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.MOVE:\n   337\u2192\t\t\t\treturn await this._fireWillEvent(this._onWillRenameFile, { files: files.map(f => ({ oldUri: URI.revive(f.source!), newUri: URI.revive(f.target) })) }, timeout, token);\n   338\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.DELETE:\n   339\u2192\t\t\t\treturn await this._fireWillEvent(this._onWillDeleteFile, { files: files.map(f => URI.revive(f.target)) }, timeout, token);\n   340\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.CREATE:\n   341\u2192\t\t\tcase FileOperation.COPY:\n   342\u2192\t\t\t\treturn await this._fireWillEvent(this._onWillCreateFile, { files: files.map(f => URI.revive(f.target)) }, timeout, token);\n   343\u2192\t\t}\n   344\u2192\t\treturn undefined;\n   345\u2192\t}\n   346\u2192\n   347\u2192\tprivate async _fireWillEvent<E extends IWaitUntil>(emitter: AsyncEmitter<E>, data: IWaitUntilData<E>, timeout: number, token: CancellationToken): Promise<IWillRunFileOperationParticipation | undefined> {\n   348\u2192\n   349\u2192\t\tconst extensionNames = new Set<string>();\n   350\u2192\t\tconst edits: [IExtensionDescription, WorkspaceEdit][] = [];\n   351\u2192\n   352\u2192\t\tawait emitter.fireAsync(data, token, async (thenable: Promise<unknown>, listener) => {\n   353\u2192\t\t\t// ignore all results except for WorkspaceEdits. Those are stored in an array.\n   354\u2192\t\t\tconst now = Date.now();\n   355\u2192\t\t\tconst result = await Promise.resolve(thenable);\n   356\u2192\t\t\tif (result instanceof WorkspaceEdit) {\n   357\u2192\t\t\t\tedits.push([(<IExtensionListener<E>>listener).extension, result]);\n   358\u2192\t\t\t\textensionNames.add((<IExtensionListener<E>>listener).extension.displayName ?? (<IExtensionListener<E>>listener).extension.identifier.value);\n   359\u2192\t\t\t}\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192\t\t\tif (Date.now() - now > timeout) {\n   362\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._logService.warn('SLOW file-participant', (<IExtensionListener<E>>listener).extension.identifier);\n   363\u2192\t\t\t}\n   364\u2192\t\t});\n   365\u2192\n   366\u2192\t\tif (token.isCancellationRequested) {\n   367\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n   368\u2192\t\t}\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192\t\tif (edits.length === 0) {\n   371\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n   372\u2192\t\t}\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192\t\t// concat all WorkspaceEdits collected via waitUntil-call and send them over to the renderer\n   375\u2192\t\tconst dto: IWorkspaceEditDto = { edits: [] };\n   376\u2192\t\tfor (const [, edit] of edits) {\n   377\u2192\t\t\tconst { edits } = typeConverter.WorkspaceEdit.from(edit, {\n   378\u2192\t\t\t\tgetTextDocumentVersion: uri => this._extHostDocumentsAndEditors.getDocument(uri)?.version,\n   379\u2192\t\t\t\tgetNotebookDocumentVersion: () => undefined,\n   380\u2192\t\t\t});\n   381\u2192\t\t\tdto.edits = dto.edits.concat(edits);\n   382\u2192\t\t}\n   383\u2192\t\treturn { edit: dto, extensionNames: Array.from(extensionNames) };\n   384\u2192\t}\n   385\u2192}\n   386\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

73\u2192\t\tthis._checkDisposed();\n    74\u2192\t\tlet toSync: vscode.Uri[] = [];\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192\t\tif (URI.isUri(first)) {\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192\t\t\tif (!diagnostics) {\n 85\u2192\t\t\tthis.#data.set(first, diagnostics.slice());\n    86\u2192\t\t\ttoSync = [first];\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192\t\t} else if (Array.isArray(first)) {\n    89\u2192\t\t\t// update many rows\n    90\u2192\t\t\ttoSync = [];\n    91\u2192\t\t\tlet lastUri: vscode.Uri | undefined;\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192\t\t\t// ensure stable-sort\n    94\u2192\t\t\tfirst = [...first].sort(DiagnosticCollection._compareIndexedTuplesByUri);\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192\t\t\tfor (const tuple of first) {\n    97\u2192\t\t\t\tconst [uri, diagnostics] = tuple;\n    98\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!lastUri || uri.toString() !== lastUri.toString()) {\n    99\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (lastUri && this.#data.get(lastUri)!.length === 0) {\n   100\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.#data.delete(lastUri);\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlastUri = uri;\n   103\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttoSync.push(uri);\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.#data.set(uri, []);\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!diagnostics) {\n   108\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// [Uri, undefined] means clear this\n   109\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst currentDiagnostics = this.#data.get(uri);\n   110\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (currentDiagnostics) {\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tcurrentDiagnostics.length = 0;\n   112\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   113\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   114\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst currentDiagnostics = this.#data.get(uri);\n   115\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcurrentDiagnostics?.push(...diagnostics);\n   116\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   117\u2192\t\t\t}\n   118\u2192\t\t}\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192\t\t// send event for extensions\n   121\u2192\t\tthis.#onDidChangeDiagnostics.fire(toSync);\n   122\u2192\n   123\u2192\t\t// compute change and send to main side\n   124\u2192\t\tif (!this.#proxy) {\n   125\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   126\u2192\t\t}\n   127\u2192\t\tconst entries: [URI, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n   128\u2192\t\tlet totalMarkerCount = 0;\n   129\u2192\t\tfor (const uri of toSync) {\n   130\u2192\t\t\tlet marker: IMarkerData[] = [];\n   131\u2192\t\t\tconst diagnostics = this.#data.get(uri);\n   132\u2192\t\t\tif (diagnostics) {\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\t// no more than N diagnostics per file\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\tif (diagnostics.length > this._maxDiagnosticsPerFile) {\n   136\u2192\t\t\t\t\tmarker = [];\n   137\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst order = [DiagnosticSeverity.Error, DiagnosticSeverity.Warning, DiagnosticSeverity.Information, DiagnosticSeverity.Hint];\n   138\u2192\t\t\t\t\torderLoop: for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\n   139\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const diagnostic of diagnostics) {\n   140\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (diagnostic.severity === order[i]) {\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst len = marker.push({ ...converter.Diagnostic.from(diagnostic), modelVersionId: this._modelVersionIdProvider(uri) });\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (len === this._maxDiagnosticsPerFile) {\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak orderLoop;\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// add 'signal' marker for showing omitted errors/warnings\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\t\tmarker.push({\n   151\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tseverity: MarkerSeverity.Info,\n   152\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: localize({ key: 'limitHit', comment: ['amount of errors/warning skipped due to limits'] }, \"Not showing {0} further errors and warnings.\", diagnostics.length - this._maxDiagnosticsPerFile),\n   153\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: marker[marker.length - 1].startLineNumber,\n   154\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tstartColumn: marker[marker.length - 1].startColumn,\n   155\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: = diagnostics.map(diag => ({ ...converter.Diagnostic.from(diag), modelVersionId: this._modelVersionIdProvider(uri) }));\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   161\u2192\t\t\t}\n   162\u2192\n   163\u2192\t\t\tentries.push([uri, marker]);\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\t\t\ttotalMarkerCount += marker.length;\n   166\u2192\t\t\tif (totalMarkerCount > this._maxDiagnosticsTotal) {\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\t// ignore markers that are above the limit\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   169\u2192\t\t\t}\n   170\u2192\t\t}\n   171\u2192\t\tthis.#proxy.$changeMany(this._owner, entries);\n   172\u2192\t}\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192\tdelete(uri: vscode.Uri): void {\n   175\u2192\t\tthis._checkDisposed();\n   176\u2192\t\tthis.#onDidChangeDiagnostics.fire([uri]);\n 202\u2192\tget(uri: URI): ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic> {\n   203\u2192\t\tthis._checkDisposed();\n   204\u2192\t\tconst result = this.#data.get(uri);\n   205\u2192\t\tif (Array.isArray(result)) {\n   206\u2192\t\t\treturn Object.freeze(result.slice(0));\n   207\u2192\t\t}\n   208\u2192\t\treturn [];\n   209\u2192\t}\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192\thas(uri: URI): boolean {\n   212\u2192\t\tthis._checkDisposed();\n   213\u2192\t\treturn Array.isArray(this.#data.get(uri));\n   214\u2192\t}\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192\tprivate _checkDisposed() {\n   217\u2192\t\tif (this._isDisposed) {\n   218\u2192\t\t\tthrow new Error('illegal state - object is disposed');\n   219\u2192\t\t}\n   220\u2192\t}\n   221\u2192\n   222\u2192\tprivate static _compareIndexedTuplesByUri(a: [vscode.Uri, readonly vscode.Diagnostic[]], b: [vscode.Uri, readonly vscode.Diagnostic[]]): number {\n   223\u2192\t\tif (a[0].toString() < b[0].toString()) {\n   224\u2192\t\t\treturn -1;\n   225\u2192\t\t} else if (a[0].toString() > b[0].toString()) {\n   226\u2192\t\t\treturn 1;\n   227\u2192\t\t} else {\n   228\u2192\t\t\treturn 0;\n   229\u2192\t\t}\n   230\u2192\t}\n   231\u2192}\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192export class ExtHostDiagnostics implements ExtHostDiagnosticsShape {\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192\tprivate static _idPool: number = 0;\n   236\u2192\tprivate static readonly _maxDiagnosticsPerFile: number = 1000;\n   237\u2192\tprivate static readonly _maxDiagnosticsTotal: number = 1.1 * this._maxDiagnosticsPerFile;\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192\tprivate readonly _proxy: MainThreadDiagnosticsShape;\n   240\u2192\tprivate readonly _collections = new Map<string, DiagnosticCollection>();\n   241\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidChangeDiagnostics = new DebounceEmitter<readonly vscode.Uri[]>({ merge: all => all.flat(), delay: 50 });\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192\tstatic _mapper(last: readonly vscode.Uri[]): { uris: readonly vscode.Uri[] } {\n   244\u2192\t\tconst map = new ResourceMap<vscode.Uri>();\n   245\u2192\t\tfor (const uri of last) {\n   246\u2192\t\t\tmap.set(uri, uri);\n   247\u2192\t\t}\n   248\u2192\t\treturn { uris: Object.freeze(Array.from(map.values())) };\n   249\u2192\t}\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192\treadonly onDidChangeDiagnostics: Event<vscode.DiagnosticChangeEvent> = Event.map(this._onDidChangeDiagnostics.event, ExtHostDiagnostics._mapper);\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192\tconstructor(\n   254\u2192\t\tmainContext: IMainContext,\n   255\u2192\t\t@ILogService private readonly _logService: ILogService,\n   256\u2192\t\t@IExtHostFileSystemInfo private readonly _fileSystemInfoService: IExtHostFileSystemInfo,\n   257\u2192\t\tprivate readonly _extHostDocumentsAndEditors: ExtHostDocumentsAndEditors,\n   258\u2192\t) {\n   259\u2192\t\tthis._proxy = mainContext.getProxy(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics);\n   260\u2192\t}\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192\tcreateDiagnosticCollection(extensionId: ExtensionIdentifier, name?: string): vscode.DiagnosticCollection {\n   263\u2192\n   264\u2192\t\tconst { _collections, _proxy, _onDidChangeDiagnostics, _logService, _fileSystemInfoService, _extHostDocumentsAndEditors } = this;\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192\t\tconst loggingProxy = new class implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n   267\u2192\t\t\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[] | undefined][]): void {\n   268\u2192\t\t\t\t_proxy.$changeMany(owner, entries);\n   269\u2192\t\t\t\t_logService.trace('[DiagnosticCollection] change many (extension, owner, uris)', extensionId.value, owner, entries.length === 0 ? 'CLEARING' : entries);\n   270\u2192\t\t\t}\n   271\u2192\t\t\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n   272\u2192\t\t\t\t_proxy.$clear(owner);\n   273\u2192\t\t\t\t_logService.trace('[DiagnosticCollection] remove all (extension, owner)', extensionId.value, owner);\n   274\u2192\t\t\t}\n   275\u2192\t\t\tdispose(): void {\n   276\u2192\t\t\t\t_proxy.dispose();\n   277\u2192\t\t\t}\n   278\u2192\t\t};\n   279\u2192\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192\t\tlet owner: string;\n   282\u2192\t\tif (!name) {\n   283\u2192\t\t\tname = '_generated_diagnostic_collection_name_#' + ExtHostDiagnostics._idPool++;\n   284\u2192\t\t\towner = name;\n   285\u2192\t\t} else if (!_collections.has(name)) {\n   286\u2192\t\t\towner = name;\n   287\u2192\t\t} else {\n   288\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.warn(`DiagnosticCollection with name '${name}' does already exist.`);\n   289\u2192\t\t\tdo {\n   290\u2192\t\t\t\towner = name + ExtHostDiagnostics._idPool++;\n   291\u2192\t\t\t} while (_collections.has(owner));\n   292\u2192\t\t}\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192\t\tconst result = new class extends DiagnosticCollection {\n   295\u2192\t\t\tconstructor() {\n   296\u2192\t\t\t\tsuper(\n   297\u2192\t\t\t\t\tname!, owner,\n   298\u2192\t\t\t\t\tExtHostDiagnostics._maxDiagnosticsTotal,\n   299\u2192\t\t\t\t\tExtHostDiagnostics._maxDiagnosticsPerFile,\n   300\u2192\t\t\t\t\turi => _extHostDocumentsAndEditors.getDocument(uri)?.version,\n   301\u2192\t\t\t\t\t_fileSystemInfoService.extUri, loggingProxy, _onDidChangeDiagnostics\n   302\u2192\t\t\t\t);\n   303\u2192\t\t\t\t_collections.set(owner, this);\n   304\u2192\t\t\t}\n   305\u2192\t\t\toverride dispose() {\n   306\u2192\t\t\t\tsuper.dispose();\n   307\u2192\t\t\t\t_collections.delete(owner);\n   308\u2192\t\t\t}\n   309\u2192\t\t};\n   310\u2192\n   311\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   312\u2192\t}\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192\tgetDiagnostics(resource: vscode.Uri): ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic>;\n   315\u2192\tgetDiagnostics(): ReadonlyArray<[vscode.Uri, ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic>]>;\n   316\u2192\tgetDiagnostics(resource?: vscode.Uri): ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic> | ReadonlyArray<[vscode.Uri, ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic>]>;\n   317\u2192\tgetDiagnostics(resource?: vscode.Uri): ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic> | ReadonlyArray<[vscode.Uri, ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic>]> {\n   318\u2192\t\tif (resource) {\n   319\u2192\t\t\treturn this._getDiagnostics(resource);\n   320\u2192\t\t} else {\n   321\u2192\t\t\tconst index = new Map<string, number>();\n   322\u2192\t\t\tconst res: [vscode.Uri, vscode.Diagnostic[]][] = [];\n   323\u2192\t\t\tfor (const collection of this._collections.values()) {\n   324\u2192\t\t\t\tcollection.forEach((uri, diagnostics) => {\n   325\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlet idx = index.get(uri.toString());\n   326\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (typeof idx === 'undefined') {\n   327\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tidx = res.length;\n   328\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tindex.set(uri.toString(), idx);\n   329\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tres.push([uri, []]);\n   330\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   331\u2192\t\t\t\t\tres[idx][1] = res[idx][1].concat(...diagnostics);\n   332\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n   333\u2192\t\t\t}\n   334\u2192\t\t\treturn res;\n   335\u2192\t\t}\n   336\u2192\t}\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192\tprivate _getDiagnostics(resource: vscode.Uri): ReadonlyArray<vscode.Diagnostic> {\n   339\u2192\t\tlet res: vscode.Diagnostic[] = [];\n   340\u2192\t\tfor (const collection of this._collections.values()) {\n   341\u2192\t\t\tif (collection.has(resource)) {\n   342\u2192\t\t\t\tres = res.concat(collection.get(resource));\n   343\u2192\t\t\t}\n   344\u2192\t\t}\n   345\u2192\t\treturn res;\n   346\u2192\t}\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192\tprivate _mirrorCollection: vscode.DiagnosticCollection | undefined;\n   349\u2192\n   350\u2192\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n   351\u2192\n   352\u2192\t\tif (!this._mirrorCollection) {\n   353\u2192\t\t\tconst name = '_generated_mirror';\n   354\u2192\t\t\tconst collection = new DiagnosticCollection(\n   355\u2192\t\t\t\tname, name,\n   356\u2192\t\t\t\tNumber.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER, // no limits because this collection is just a mirror of \"sanitized\" data\n   357\u2192\t\t\t\t_uri => undefined,\n   358\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._fileSystemInfoService.extUri, undefined, this._onDidChangeDiagnostics\n   359\u2192\t\t\t);\n   360\u2192\t\t\tthis._collections.set(name, collection);\n   361\u2192\t\t\tthis._mirrorCollection = collection;\n   362\u2192\t\t}\n   363\u2192\n   364\u2192\t\tfor (const [uri, markers] of data) {\n   365\u2192\t\t\tthis._mirrorCollection.set(URI.revive(uri), markers.map(converter.Diagnostic.to));\n   366\u2192\t\t}\n   367\u2192\t}\n   368\u2192}\n   369\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

implements IMarkerListProvider {\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192\tstatic readonly ID = 'workbench.contrib.markerListProvider';\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192\tprivate readonly _dispoables: IDisposable;\n markerNavigation.registerProvider(this);\n    31\u2192\t}\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192\tdispose() {\n    34\u2192\t\tthis._dispoables.dispose();\n    35\u2192\t}\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192\tgetMarkerList(resource: URI | undefined): MarkerList | undefined {\n    38\u2192\t\tif (!resource) {\n    39\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n    40\u2192\t\t}\n    41\u2192\t\tconst data = CellUri.parse(resource);\n    42\u2192\t\tif (!data) {\n    43\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n    44\u2192\t\t}\n    45\u2192\t\treturn new MarkerList(uri => {\n    46\u2192\t\t\tconst otherData = CellUri.parse(uri);\n    47\u2192\t\t\treturn otherData?.notebook.toString() === data.notebook.toString();\n    48\u2192\t\t}, this._markerService, this._configService);\n    49\u2192\t}\n    50\u2192}\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192class NotebookMarkerDecorationContribution extends Disposable implements INotebookEditorContribution {\n    53\u2192\tstatic id: string = 'workbench.notebook.markerDecoration';\n    54\u2192\tprivate _markersOverviewRulerDecorations: string[] = [];\n    55\u2192\tconstructor(\n    56\u2192\t\tprivate readonly _notebookEditor: INotebookEditor,\n    57\u2192\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService\n    58\u2192\t) {\n    59\u2192\t\tsuper();\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192\t\tthis._update();\n    62\u2192\t\tthis._register(this._notebookEditor.onDidChangeModel(() => this._update()));\n    63\u2192\t\tthis._register(this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(e => {\n    64\u2192\t\t\tif (e.some(uri => this._notebookEditor.getCellsInRange().some(cell => isEqual(cell.uri, uri)))) {\n    65\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._update();\n    66\u2192\t\t\t}\n    67\u2192\t\t}));\n    68\u2192\t}\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\t@throttle(100)\n    71\u2192\tprivate _update() {\n    72\u2192\t\tif (!this._notebookEditor.hasModel()) {\n    73\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n    74\u2192\t\t}\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192\t\tconst cellDecorations: INotebookDeltaDecoration[] = [];\n    77\u2192\t\tthis._notebookEditor.getCellsInRange().forEach(cell => {\n    78\u2192\t\t\tconst marker = this._markerService.read({ resource: cell.uri, severities: MarkerSeverity.Error | MarkerSeverity.Warning });\n    79\u2192\t\t\tmarker.forEach(m => {\n    80\u2192\t\t\t\tconst color = m.severity === MarkerSeverity.Error ? editorErrorForeground : editorWarningForeground;\n    81\u2192\t\t\t\tconst range = { startLineNumber: m.startLineNumber, startColumn: m.startColumn, endLineNumber: m.endLineNumber, endColumn: m.endColumn };\n    82\u2192\t\t\t\tcellDecorations.push({\n    83\u2192\t\t\t\t\thandle: cell.handle,\n    84\u2192\t\t\t\t\toptions: {\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\toverviewRuler: {\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcolor: color,\n    87\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmodelRanges: [range],\n    88\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tincludeOutput: false,\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tposition: NotebookOverviewRulerLane.Right\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n    92\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n    93\u2192\t\t\t});\n    94\u2192\t\t});\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192\t\tthis._markersOverviewRulerDecorations = this._notebookEditor.deltaCellDecorations(this._markersOverviewRulerDecorations, cellDecorations);\n    97\u2192\t}\n    98\u2192}\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192registerWorkbenchContribution2(MarkerListProvider.ID, MarkerListProvider, WorkbenchPhase.BlockRestore);\n   101\u2192\n {
  "file": {
    "content": "/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\nimport { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\n\n@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics)\nexport class MainThreadDiagnostics implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n\n\tprivate readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();\n\n\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;\n\tprivate readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;\n\n\tconstructor(\n\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,\n\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n\t) {\n\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n\n\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n\t}\n\n\tdispose(): void {\n\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n\t\t\tif (allMarkerData.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, []]);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tconst forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));\n\t\t\t\tif (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (data.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n\t\tfor (const entry of entries) {\n\t\t\tconst [uri, markers] = entry;\n\t\t\tif (markers) {\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const relatedInformation of marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trelatedInformation.resource = URI.revive(relatedInformation.resource);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.code && typeof marker.code !== 'string') {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmarker.code.target = URI.revive(marker.code.target);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(URI.revive(uri)), markers);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.add(owner);\n\t}\n\n\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n\t\tthis._markerService.changeAll(owner, []);\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.delete(owner);\n\t}\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts",
    "numLines": 80,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 80
  },
  "type": "text"
}
