See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { URI } from './uri.js';\n     7\u2192\n     8\u2192export function getOrSet<K, V>(map: Map<K, V>, key: K, value: V): V {\n     9\u2192\tlet result = map.get(key);\n    10\u2192\tif (result === undefined) {\n    11\u2192\t\tresult = value;\n    12\u2192\t\tmap.set(key, result);\n    13\u2192\t}\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192\treturn result;\n    16\u2192}\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192export function mapToString<K, V>(map: Map<K, V>): string {\n    19\u2192\tconst entries: string[] = [];\n    20\u2192\tmap.forEach((value, key) => {\n    21\u2192\t\tentries.push(`${key} => ${value}`);\n    22\u2192\t});\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192\treturn `Map(${map.size}) {${entries.join(', ')}}`;\n    25\u2192}\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192export function setToString<K>(set: Set<K>): string {\n    28\u2192\tconst entries: K[] = [];\n    29\u2192\tset.forEach(value => {\n    30\u2192\t\tentries.push(value);\n    31\u2192\t});\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192\treturn `Set(${set.size}) {${entries.join(', ')}}`;\n    34\u2192}\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192interface ResourceMapKeyFn {\n    37\u2192\t(resource: URI): string;\n    38\u2192}\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192class ResourceMapEntry<T> {\n    41\u2192\tconstructor(readonly uri: URI, readonly value: T) { }\n    42\u2192}\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192function isEntries<T>(arg: ResourceMap<T> | ResourceMapKeyFn | readonly (readonly [URI, T])[] | undefined): arg is readonly (readonly [URI, T])[] {\n    45\u2192\treturn Array.isArray(arg);\n    46\u2192}\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192export class ResourceMap<T> implements Map<URI, T> {\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192\tprivate static readonly defaultToKey = (resource: URI) => resource.toString();\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192\treadonly [Symbol.toStringTag] = 'ResourceMap';\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192\tprivate readonly map: Map<string, ResourceMapEntry<T>>;\n    55\u2192\tprivate readonly toKey: ResourceMapKeyFn;\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192\t/**\n    58\u2192\t *\n    59\u2192\t * @param toKey Custom uri identity function, e.g use an existing `IExtUri#getComparison`-util\n    60\u2192\t */\n    61\u2192\tconstructor(toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn);\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192\t/**\n    64\u2192\t *\n    65\u2192\t * @param other Another resource which this maps is created from\n    66\u2192\t * @param toKey Custom uri identity function, e.g use an existing `IExtUri#getComparison`-util\n    67\u2192\t */\n    68\u2192\tconstructor(other?: ResourceMap<T>, toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn);\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\t/**\n    71\u2192\t *\n    72\u2192\t * @param other Another resource which this maps is created from\n    73\u2192\t * @param toKey Custom uri identity function, e.g use an existing `IExtUri#getComparison`-util\n    74\u2192\t */\n    75\u2192\tconstructor(entries?: readonly (readonly [URI, T])[], toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn);\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192\tconstructor(arg?: ResourceMap<T> | ResourceMapKeyFn | readonly (readonly [URI, T])[], toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn) {\n    78\u2192\t\tif (arg instanceof ResourceMap) {\n    79\u2192\t\t\tthis.map = new Map(arg.map);\n    80\u2192\t\t\tthis.toKey = toKey ?? ResourceMap.defaultToKey;\n    81\u2192\t\t} else if (isEntries(arg)) {\n    82\u2192\t\t\tthis.map = new Map();\n    83\u2192\t\t\tthis.toKey = toKey ?? ResourceMap.defaultToKey;\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192\t\t\tfor (const [resource, value] of arg) {\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.set(resource, value);\n    87\u2192\t\t\t}\n    88\u2192\t\t} else {\n    89\u2192\t\t\tthis.map = new Map();\n    90\u2192\t\t\tthis.toKey = arg ?? ResourceMap.defaultToKey;\n    91\u2192\t\t}\n    92\u2192\t}\n    93\u2192\n    94\u2192\tset(resource: URI, value: T): this {\n    95\u2192\t\tthis.map.set(this.toKey(resource), new ResourceMapEntry(resource, value));\n    96\u2192\t\treturn this;\n    97\u2192\t}\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192\tget(resource: URI): T | undefined {\n   100\u2192\t\treturn this.map.get(this.toKey(resource))?.value;\n   101\u2192\t}\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192\thas(resource: URI): boolean {\n   104\u2192\t\treturn this.map.has(this.toKey(resource));\n   105\u2192\t}\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192\tget size(): number {\n   108\u2192\t\treturn this.map.size;\n   109\u2192\t}\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192\tclear(): void {\n   112\u2192\t\tthis.map.clear();\n   113\u2192\t}\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192\tdelete(resource: URI): boolean {\n   116\u2192\t\treturn this.map.delete(this.toKey(resource));\n   117\u2192\t}\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192\tforEach(clb: (value: T, key: URI, map: Map<URI, T>) => void, thisArg?: any): void {\n   120\u2192\t\tif (typeof thisArg !== 'undefined') {\n   121\u2192\t\t\tclb = clb.bind(thisArg);\n   122\u2192\t\t}\n   123\u2192\t\tfor (const [_, entry] of this.map) {\n   124\u2192\t\t\tclb(entry.value, entry.uri, <any>this);\n   125\u2192\t\t}\n   126\u2192\t}\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192\t*values(): IterableIterator<T> {\n   129\u2192\t\tfor (const entry of this.map.values()) {\n   130\u2192\t\t\tyield entry.value;\n   131\u2192\t\t}\n   132\u2192\t}\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192\t*keys(): IterableIterator<URI> {\n   135\u2192\t\tfor (const entry of this.map.values()) {\n   136\u2192\t\t\tyield entry.uri;\n   137\u2192\t\t}\n   138\u2192\t}\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\t*entries(): IterableIterator<[URI, T]> {\n   141\u2192\t\tfor (const entry of this.map.values()) {\n   142\u2192\t\t\tyield [entry.uri, entry.value];\n   143\u2192\t\t}\n   144\u2192\t}\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192\t*[Symbol.iterator](): IterableIterator<[URI, T]> {\n   147\u2192\t\tfor (const [, entry] of this.map) {\n   148\u2192\t\t\tyield [entry.uri, entry.value];\n   149\u2192\t\t}\n   150\u2192\t}\n   151\u2192}\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192export class ResourceSet implements Set<URI> {\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192\treadonly [Symbol.toStringTag]: string = 'ResourceSet';\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192\tprivate readonly _map: ResourceMap<URI>;\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192\tconstructor(toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn);\n   160\u2192\tconstructor(entries: readonly URI[], toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn);\n   161\u2192\tconstructor(entriesOrKey?: readonly URI[] | ResourceMapKeyFn, toKey?: ResourceMapKeyFn) {\n   162\u2192\t\tif (!entriesOrKey || typeof entriesOrKey === 'function') {\n   163\u2192\t\t\tthis._map = new ResourceMap(entriesOrKey);\n   164\u2192\t\t} else {\n   165\u2192\t\t\tthis._map = new ResourceMap(toKey);\n   166\u2192\t\t\tentriesOrKey.forEach(this.add, this);\n   167\u2192\t\t}\n   168\u2192\t}\n   169\u2192\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192\tget size(): number {\n   172\u2192\t\treturn this._map.size;\n   173\u2192\t}\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192\tadd(value: URI): this {\n   176\u2192\t\tthis._map.set(value, value);\n   177\u2192\t\treturn this;\n   178\u2192\t}\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192\tclear(): void {\n   181\u2192\t\tthis._map.clear();\n   182\u2192\t}\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192\tdelete(value: URI): boolean {\n   185\u2192\t\treturn this._map.delete(value);\n   186\u2192\t}\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192\tforEach(callbackfn: (value: URI, value2: URI, set: Set<URI>) => void, thisArg?: any): void {\n   189\u2192\t\tthis._map.forEach((_value, key) => callbackfn.call(thisArg, key, key, this));\n   190\u2192\t}\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192\thas(value: URI): boolean {\n   193\u2192\t\treturn this._map.has(value);\n   194\u2192\t}\n   195\u2192\n   196\u2192\tentries(): IterableIterator<[URI, URI]> {\n   197\u2192\t\treturn this._map.entries();\n   198\u2192\t}\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192\tkeys(): IterableIterator<URI> {\n   201\u2192\t\treturn this._map.keys();\n   202\u2192\t}\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192\tvalues(): IterableIterator<URI> {\n   205\u2192\t\treturn this._map.keys();\n   206\u2192\t}\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192\t[Symbol.iterator](): IterableIterator<URI> {\n   209\u2192\t\treturn this.keys();\n   210\u2192\t}\n   211\u2192}\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192interface Item<K, V> {\n   215\u2192\tprevious: Item<K, V> | undefined;\n   216\u2192\tnext: Item<K, V> | undefined;\n   217\u2192\tkey: K;\n   218\u2192\tvalue: V;\n   219\u2192}\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192export const enum Touch {\n   222\u2192\tNone = 0,\n   223\u2192\tAsOld = 1,\n   224\u2192\tAsNew = 2\n   225\u2192}\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192export class LinkedMap<K, V> implements Map<K, V> {\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192\treadonly [Symbol.toStringTag] = 'LinkedMap';\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192\tprivate _map: Map<K, Item<K, V>>;\n   232\u2192\tprivate _head: Item<K, V> | undefined;\n   233\u2192\tprivate _tail: Item<K, V> | undefined;\n   234\u2192\tprivate _size: number;\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192\tprivate _state: number;\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192\tconstructor() {\n   239\u2192\t\tthis._map = new Map<K, Item<K, V>>();\n   240\u2192\t\tthis._head = undefined;\n   241\u2192\t\tthis._tail = undefined;\n   242\u2192\t\tthis._size = 0;\n   243\u2192\t\tthis._state = 0;\n   244\u2192\t}\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192\tclear(): void {\n   247\u2192\t\tthis._map.clear();\n   248\u2192\t\tthis._head = undefined;\n   249\u2192\t\tthis._tail = undefined;\n   250\u2192\t\tthis._size = 0;\n   251\u2192\t\tthis._state++;\n   252\u2192\t}\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192\tisEmpty(): boolean {\n   255\u2192\t\treturn !this._head && !this._tail;\n   256\u2192\t}\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192\tget size(): number {\n   259\u2192\t\treturn this._size;\n   260\u2192\t}\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192\tget first(): V | undefined {\n   263\u2192\t\treturn this._head?.value;\n   264\u2192\t}\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192\tget last(): V | undefined {\n   267\u2192\t\treturn this._tail?.value;\n   268\u2192\t}\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192\thas(key: K): boolean {\n   271\u2192\t\treturn this._map.has(key);\n   272\u2192\t}\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192\tget(key: K, touch: Touch = Touch.None): V | undefined {\n   275\u2192\t\tconst item = this._map.get(key);\n   276\u2192\t\tif (!item) {\n   277\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n   278\u2192\t\t}\n   279\u2192\t\tif (touch !== Touch.None) {\n   280\u2192\t\t\tthis.touch(item, touch);\n   281\u2192\t\t}\n   282\u2192\t\treturn item.value;\n   283\u2192\t}\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192\tset(key: K, value: V, touch: Touch = Touch.None): this {\n   286\u2192\t\tlet item = this._map.get(key);\n   287\u2192\t\tif (item) {\n   288\u2192\t\t\titem.value = value;\n   289\u2192\t\t\tif (touch !== Touch.None) {\n   290\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.touch(item, touch);\n   291\u2192\t\t\t}\n   292\u2192\t\t} else {\n   293\u2192\t\t\titem = { key, value, next: undefined, previous: undefined };\n   294\u2192\t\t\tswitch (touch) {\n   295\u2192\t\t\t\tcase Touch.None:\n   296\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.addItemLast(item);\n   297\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   298\u2192\t\t\t\tcase Touch.AsOld:\n   299\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.addItemFirst(item);\n   300\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   301\u2192\t\t\t\tcase Touch.AsNew:\n   302\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.addItemLast(item);\n   303\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   304\u2192\t\t\t\tdefault:\n   305\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.addItemLast(item);\n   306\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   307\u2192\t\t\t}\n   308\u2192\t\t\tthis._map.set(key, item);\n   309\u2192\t\t\tthis._size++;\n   310\u2192\t\t}\n   311\u2192\t\treturn this;\n   312\u2192\t}\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192\tdelete(key: K): boolean {\n   315\u2192\t\treturn !!this.remove(key);\n   316\u2192\t}\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192\tremove(key: K): V | undefined {\n   319\u2192\t\tconst item = this._map.get(key);\n   320\u2192\t\tif (!item) {\n   321\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n   322\u2192\t\t}\n   323\u2192\t\tthis._map.delete(key);\n   324\u2192\t\tthis.removeItem(item);\n   325\u2192\t\tthis._size--;\n   326\u2192\t\treturn item.value;\n   327\u2192\t}\n   328\u2192\n   329\u2192\tshift(): V | undefined {\n   330\u2192\t\tif (!this._head && !this._tail) {\n   331\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n   332\u2192\t\t}\n   333\u2192\t\tif (!this._head || !this._tail) {\n   334\u2192\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   335\u2192\t\t}\n   336\u2192\t\tconst item = this._head;\n   337\u2192\t\tthis._map.delete(item.key);\n   338\u2192\t\tthis.removeItem(item);\n   339\u2192\t\tthis._size--;\n   340\u2192\t\treturn item.value;\n   341\u2192\t}\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192\tforEach(callbackfn: (value: V, key: K, map: LinkedMap<K, V>) => void, thisArg?: any): void {\n   344\u2192\t\tconst state = this._state;\n   345\u2192\t\tlet current = this._head;\n   346\u2192\t\twhile (current) {\n   347\u2192\t\t\tif (thisArg) {\n   348\u2192\t\t\t\tcallbackfn.bind(thisArg)(current.value, current.key, this);\n   349\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   350\u2192\t\t\t\tcallbackfn(current.value, current.key, this);\n   351\u2192\t\t\t}\n   352\u2192\t\t\tif (this._state !== state) {\n   353\u2192\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(`LinkedMap got modified during iteration.`);\n   354\u2192\t\t\t}\n   355\u2192\t\t\tcurrent = current.next;\n   356\u2192\t\t}\n   357\u2192\t}\n   358\u2192\n   359\u2192\tkeys(): IterableIterator<K> {\n   360\u2192\t\tconst map = this;\n   361\u2192\t\tconst state = this._state;\n   362\u2192\t\tlet current = this._head;\n   363\u2192\t\tconst iterator: IterableIterator<K> = {\n   364\u2192\t\t\t[Symbol.iterator]() {\n   365\u2192\t\t\t\treturn iterator;\n   366\u2192\t\t\t},\n   367\u2192\t\t\tnext(): IteratorResult<K> {\n   368\u2192\t\t\t\tif (map._state !== state) {\n   369\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(`LinkedMap got modified during iteration.`);\n   370\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   371\u2192\t\t\t\tif (current) {\n   372\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst result = { value: current.key, done: false };\n   373\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcurrent = current.next;\n   374\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   375\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   376\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn { value: undefined, done: true };\n   377\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   378\u2192\t\t\t}\n   379\u2192\t\t};\n   380\u2192\t\treturn iterator;\n   381\u2192\t}\n   382\u2192\n   383\u2192\tvalues(): IterableIterator<V> {\n   384\u2192\t\tconst map = this;\n   385\u2192\t\tconst state = this._state;\n   386\u2192\t\tlet current = this._head;\n   387\u2192\t\tconst iterator: IterableIterator<V> = {\n   388\u2192\t\t\t[Symbol.iterator]() {\n   389\u2192\t\t\t\treturn iterator;\n   390\u2192\t\t\t},\n   391\u2192\t\t\tnext(): IteratorResult<V> {\n   392\u2192\t\t\t\tif (map._state !== state) {\n   393\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(`LinkedMap got modified during iteration.`);\n   394\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   395\u2192\t\t\t\tif (current) {\n   396\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst result = { value: current.value, done: false };\n   397\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcurrent = current.next;\n   398\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   399\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   400\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn { value: undefined, done: true };\n   401\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   402\u2192\t\t\t}\n   403\u2192\t\t};\n   404\u2192\t\treturn iterator;\n   405\u2192\t}\n   406\u2192\n   407\u2192\tentries(): IterableIterator<[K, V]> {\n   408\u2192\t\tconst map = this;\n   409\u2192\t\tconst state = this._state;\n   410\u2192\t\tlet current = this._head;\n   411\u2192\t\tconst iterator: IterableIterator<[K, V]> = {\n   412\u2192\t\t\t[Symbol.iterator]() {\n   413\u2192\t\t\t\treturn iterator;\n   414\u2192\t\t\t},\n   415\u2192\t\t\tnext(): IteratorResult<[K, V]> {\n   416\u2192\t\t\t\tif (map._state !== state) {\n   417\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(`LinkedMap got modified during iteration.`);\n   418\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   419\u2192\t\t\t\tif (current) {\n   420\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst result: IteratorResult<[K, V]> = { value: [current.key, current.value], done: false };\n   421\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcurrent = current.next;\n   422\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   423\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   424\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn { value: undefined, done: true };\n   425\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   426\u2192\t\t\t}\n   427\u2192\t\t};\n   428\u2192\t\treturn iterator;\n   429\u2192\t}\n   430\u2192\n   431\u2192\t[Symbol.iterator](): IterableIterator<[K, V]> {\n   432\u2192\t\treturn this.entries();\n   433\u2192\t}\n   434\u2192\n   435\u2192\tprotected trimOld(newSize: number) {\n   436\u2192\t\tif (newSize >= this.size) {\n   437\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   438\u2192\t\t}\n   439\u2192\t\tif (newSize === 0) {\n   440\u2192\t\t\tthis.clear();\n   441\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   442\u2192\t\t}\n   443\u2192\t\tlet current = this._head;\n   444\u2192\t\tlet currentSize = this.size;\n   445\u2192\t\twhile (current && currentSize > newSize) {\n   446\u2192\t\t\tthis._map.delete(current.key);\n   447\u2192\t\t\tcurrent = current.next;\n   448\u2192\t\t\tcurrentSize--;\n   449\u2192\t\t}\n   450\u2192\t\tthis._head = current;\n   451\u2192\t\tthis._size = currentSize;\n   452\u2192\t\tif (current) {\n   453\u2192\t\t\tcurrent.previous = undefined;\n   454\u2192\t\t}\n   455\u2192\t\tthis._state++;\n   456\u2192\t}\n   457\u2192\n   458\u2192\tprotected trimNew(newSize: number) {\n   459\u2192\t\tif (newSize >= this.size) {\n   460\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   461\u2192\t\t}\n   462\u2192\t\tif (newSize === 0) {\n   463\u2192\t\t\tthis.clear();\n   464\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   465\u2192\t\t}\n   466\u2192\t\tlet current = this._tail;\n   467\u2192\t\tlet currentSize = this.size;\n   468\u2192\t\twhile (current && currentSize > newSize) {\n   469\u2192\t\t\tthis._map.delete(current.key);\n   470\u2192\t\t\tcurrent = current.previous;\n   471\u2192\t\t\tcurrentSize--;\n   472\u2192\t\t}\n   473\u2192\t\tthis._tail = current;\n   474\u2192\t\tthis._size = currentSize;\n   475\u2192\t\tif (current) {\n   476\u2192\t\t\tcurrent.next = undefined;\n   477\u2192\t\t}\n   478\u2192\t\tthis._state++;\n   479\u2192\t}\n   480\u2192\n   481\u2192\tprivate addItemFirst(item: Item<K, V>): void {\n   482\u2192\t\t// First time Insert\n   483\u2192\t\tif (!this._head && !this._tail) {\n   484\u2192\t\t\tthis._tail = item;\n   485\u2192\t\t} else if (!this._head) {\n   486\u2192\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   487\u2192\t\t} else {\n   488\u2192\t\t\titem.next = this._head;\n   489\u2192\t\t\tthis._head.previous = item;\n   490\u2192\t\t}\n   491\u2192\t\tthis._head = item;\n   492\u2192\t\tthis._state++;\n   493\u2192\t}\n   494\u2192\n   495\u2192\tprivate addItemLast(item: Item<K, V>): void {\n   496\u2192\t\t// First time Insert\n   497\u2192\t\tif (!this._head && !this._tail) {\n   498\u2192\t\t\tthis._head = item;\n   499\u2192\t\t} else if (!this._tail) {\n   500\u2192\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   501\u2192\t\t} else {\n   502\u2192\t\t\titem.previous = this._tail;\n   503\u2192\t\t\tthis._tail.next = item;\n   504\u2192\t\t}\n   505\u2192\t\tthis._tail = item;\n   506\u2192\t\tthis._state++;\n   507\u2192\t}\n   508\u2192\n   509\u2192\tprivate removeItem(item: Item<K, V>): void {\n   510\u2192\t\tif (item === this._head && item === this._tail) {\n   511\u2192\t\t\tthis._head = undefined;\n   512\u2192\t\t\tthis._tail = undefined;\n   513\u2192\t\t}\n   514\u2192\t\telse if (item === this._head) {\n   515\u2192\t\t\t// This can only happen if size === 1 which is handled\n   516\u2192\t\t\t// by the case above.\n   517\u2192\t\t\tif (!item.next) {\n   518\u2192\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   519\u2192\t\t\t}\n   520\u2192\t\t\titem.next.previous = undefined;\n   521\u2192\t\t\tthis._head = item.next;\n   522\u2192\t\t}\n   523\u2192\t\telse if (item === this._tail) {\n   524\u2192\t\t\t// This can only happen if size === 1 which is handled\n   525\u2192\t\t\t// by the case above.\n   526\u2192\t\t\tif (!item.previous) {\n   527\u2192\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   528\u2192\t\t\t}\n   529\u2192\t\t\titem.previous.next = undefined;\n   530\u2192\t\t\tthis._tail = item.previous;\n   531\u2192\t\t}\n   532\u2192\t\telse {\n   533\u2192\t\t\tconst next = item.next;\n   534\u2192\t\t\tconst previous = item.previous;\n   535\u2192\t\t\tif (!next || !previous) {\n   536\u2192\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   537\u2192\t\t\t}\n   538\u2192\t\t\tnext.previous = previous;\n   539\u2192\t\t\tprevious.next = next;\n   540\u2192\t\t}\n   541\u2192\t\titem.next = undefined;\n   542\u2192\t\titem.previous = undefined;\n   543\u2192\t\tthis._state++;\n   544\u2192\t}\n   545\u2192\n   546\u2192\tprivate touch(item: Item<K, V>, touch: Touch): void {\n   547\u2192\t\tif (!this._head || !this._tail) {\n   548\u2192\t\t\tthrow new Error('Invalid list');\n   549\u2192\t\t}\n   550\u2192\t\tif ((touch !== Touch.AsOld && touch !== Touch.AsNew)) {\n   551\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   552\u2192\t\t}\n   553\u2192\n   554\u2192\t\tif (touch === Touch.AsOld) {\n   555\u2192\t\t\tif (item === this._head) {\n   556\u2192\t\t\t\treturn;\n   557\u2192\t\t\t}\n   558\u2192\n   559\u2192\t\t\tconst next = item.next;\n   560\u2192\t\t\tconst previous = item.previous;\n   561\u2192\n   562\u2192\t\t\t// Unlink the item\n   563\u2192\t\t\tif (item === this._tail) {\n   564\u2192\t\t\t\t// previous must be defined since item was not head but is tail\n   565\u2192\t\t\t\t// So there are more than on item in the map\n   566\u2192\t\t\t\tprevious!.next = undefined;\n   567\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._tail = previous;\n   568\u2192\t\t\t}\n   569\u2192\t\t\telse {\n   570\u2192\t\t\t\t// Both next and previous are not undefined since item was neither head nor tail.\n   571\u2192\t\t\t\tnext!.previous = previous;\n   572\u2192\t\t\t\tprevious!.next = next;\n   573\u2192\t\t\t}\n   574\u2192\n   575\u2192\t\t\t// Insert the node at head\n   576\u2192\t\t\titem.previous = undefined;\n   577\u2192\t\t\titem.next = this._head;\n   578\u2192\t\t\tthis._head.previous = item;\n   579\u2192\t\t\tthis._head = item;\n   580\u2192\t\t\tthis._state++;\n   581\u2192\t\t} else if (touch === Touch.AsNew) {\n   582\u2192\t\t\tif (item === this._tail) {\n   583\u2192\t\t\t\treturn;\n   584\u2192\t\t\t}\n   585\u2192\n   586\u2192\t\t\tconst next = item.next;\n   587\u2192\t\t\tconst previous = item.previous;\n   588\u2192\n   589\u2192\t\t\t// Unlink the item.\n   590\u2192\t\t\tif (item === this._head) {\n   591\u2192\t\t\t\t// next must be defined since item was not tail but is head\n   592\u2192\t\t\t\t// So there are more than on item in the map\n   593\u2192\t\t\t\tnext!.previous = undefined;\n   594\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._head = next;\n   595\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   596\u2192\t\t\t\t// Both next and previous are not undefined since item was neither head nor tail.\n   597\u2192\t\t\t\tnext!.previous = previous;\n   598\u2192\t\t\t\tprevious!.next = next;\n   599\u2192\t\t\t}\n   600\u2192\t\t\titem.next = undefined;\n   601\u2192\t\t\titem.previous = this._tail;\n   602\u2192\t\t\tthis._tail.next = item;\n   603\u2192\t\t\tthis._tail = item;\n   604\u2192\t\t\tthis._state++;\n   605\u2192\t\t}\n   606\u2192\t}\n   607\u2192\n   608\u2192\ttoJSON(): [K, V][] {\n   609\u2192\t\tconst data: [K, V][] = [];\n   610\u2192\n   611\u2192\t\tthis.forEach((value, key) => {\n   612\u2192\t\t\tdata.push([key, value]);\n   613\u2192\t\t});\n   614\u2192\n   615\u2192\t\treturn data;\n   616\u2192\t}\n   617\u2192\n   618\u2192\tfromJSON(data: [K, V][]): void {\n   619\u2192\t\tthis.clear();\n   620\u2192\n   621\u2192\t\tfor (const [key, value] of data) {\n   622\u2192\t\t\tthis.set(key, value);\n   623\u2192\t\t}\n   624\u2192\t}\n   625\u2192}\n   626\u2192\n   627\u2192abstract class Cache<K, V> extends LinkedMap<K, V> {\n   628\u2192\n   629\u2192\tprotected _limit: number;\n   630\u2192\tprotected _ratio: number;\n   631\u2192\n   632\u2192\tconstructor(limit: number, ratio: number = 1) {\n   633\u2192\t\tsuper();\n   634\u2192\t\tthis._limit = limit;\n   635\u2192\t\tthis._ratio = Math.min(Math.max(0, ratio), 1);\n   636\u2192\t}\n   637\u2192\n   638\u2192\tget limit(): number {\n   639\u2192\t\treturn this._limit;\n   640\u2192\t}\n   641\u2192\n   642\u2192\tset limit(limit: number) {\n   643\u2192\t\tthis._limit = limit;\n   644\u2192\t\tthis.checkTrim();\n   645\u2192\t}\n   646\u2192\n   647\u2192\tget ratio(): number {\n   648\u2192\t\treturn this._ratio;\n   649\u2192\t}\n   650\u2192\n   651\u2192\tset ratio(ratio: number) {\n   652\u2192\t\tthis._ratio = Math.min(Math.max(0, ratio), 1);\n   653\u2192\t\tthis.checkTrim();\n   654\u2192\t}\n   655\u2192\n   656\u2192\toverride get(key: K, touch: Touch = Touch.AsNew): V | undefined {\n   657\u2192\t\treturn super.get(key, touch);\n   658\u2192\t}\n   659\u2192\n   660\u2192\tpeek(key: K): V | undefined {\n   661\u2192\t\treturn super.get(key, Touch.None);\n   662\u2192\t}\n   663\u2192\n   664\u2192\toverride set(key: K, value: V): this {\n   665\u2192\t\tsuper.set(key, value, Touch.AsNew);\n   666\u2192\t\treturn this;\n   667\u2192\t}\n   668\u2192\n   669\u2192\tprotected checkTrim() {\n   670\u2192\t\tif (this.size > this._limit) {\n   671\u2192\t\t\tthis.trim(Math.round(this._limit * this._ratio));\n   672\u2192\t\t}\n   673\u2192\t}\n   674\u2192\n   675\u2192\tprotected abstract trim(newSize: number): void;\n   676\u2192}\n   677\u2192\n   678\u2192export class LRUCache<K, V> extends Cache<K, V> {\n   679\u2192\n   680\u2192\tconstructor(limit: number, ratio: number = 1) {\n   681\u2192\t\tsuper(limit, ratio);\n   682\u2192\t}\n   683\u2192\n   684\u2192\tprotected override trim(newSize: number) {\n   685\u2192\t\tthis.trimOld(newSize);\n   686\u2192\t}\n   687\u2192\n   688\u2192\toverride set(key: K, value: V): this {\n   689\u2192\t\tsuper.set(key, value);\n   690\u2192\t\tthis.checkTrim();\n   691\u2192\t\treturn this;\n   692\u2192\t}\n   693\u2192}\n   694\u2192\n   695\u2192export class MRUCache<K, V> extends Cache<K, V> {\n   696\u2192\n   697\u2192\tconstructor(limit: number, ratio: number = 1) {\n   698\u2192\t\tsuper(limit, ratio);\n   699\u2192\t}\n   700\u2192\n   701\u2192\tprotected override trim(newSize: number) {\n   702\u2192\t\tthis.trimNew(newSize);\n   703\u2192\t}\n   704\u2192\n   705\u2192\toverride set(key: K, value: V): this {\n   706\u2192\t\tif (this._limit <= this.size && !this.has(key)) {\n   707\u2192\t\t\tthis.trim(Math.round(this._limit * this._ratio) - 1);\n   708\u2192\t\t}\n   709\u2192\n   710\u2192\t\tsuper.set(key, value);\n   711\u2192\t\treturn this;\n   712\u2192\t}\n   713\u2192}\n   714\u2192\n   715\u2192export class CounterSet<T> {\n   716\u2192\n   717\u2192\tprivate map = new Map<T, number>();\n   718\u2192\n   719\u2192\tadd(value: T): CounterSet<T> {\n   720\u2192\t\tthis.map.set(value, (this.map.get(value) || 0) + 1);\n   721\u2192\t\treturn this;\n   722\u2192\t}\n   723\u2192\n   724\u2192\tdelete(value: T): boolean {\n   725\u2192\t\tlet counter = this.map.get(value) || 0;\n   726\u2192\n   727\u2192\t\tif (counter === 0) {\n   728\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   729\u2192\t\t}\n   730\u2192\n   731\u2192\t\tcounter--;\n   732\u2192\n   733\u2192\t\tif (counter === 0) {\n   734\u2192\t\t\tthis.map.delete(value);\n   735\u2192\t\t} else {\n   736\u2192\t\t\tthis.map.set(value, counter);\n   737\u2192\t\t}\n   738\u2192\n   739\u2192\t\treturn true;\n   740\u2192\t}\n   741\u2192\n   742\u2192\thas(value: T): boolean {\n   743\u2192\t\treturn this.map.has(value);\n   744\u2192\t}\n   745\u2192}\n   746\u2192\n   747\u2192/**\n   748\u2192 * A map that allows access both by keys and values.\n   749\u2192 * **NOTE**: values need to be unique.\n   750\u2192 */\n   751\u2192export class BidirectionalMap<K, V> {\n   752\u2192\n   753\u2192\tprivate readonly _m1 = new Map<K, V>();\n   754\u2192\tprivate readonly _m2 = new Map<V, K>();\n   755\u2192\n   756\u2192\tconstructor(entries?: readonly (readonly [K, V])[]) {\n   757\u2192\t\tif (entries) {\n   758\u2192\t\t\tfor (const [key, value] of entries) {\n   759\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.set(key, value);\n   760\u2192\t\t\t}\n   761\u2192\t\t}\n   762\u2192\t}\n   763\u2192\n   764\u2192\tclear(): void {\n   765\u2192\t\tthis._m1.clear();\n   766\u2192\t\tthis._m2.clear();\n   767\u2192\t}\n   768\u2192\n   769\u2192\tset(key: K, value: V): void {\n   770\u2192\t\tthis._m1.set(key, value);\n   771\u2192\t\tthis._m2.set(value, key);\n   772\u2192\t}\n   773\u2192\n   774\u2192\tget(key: K): V | undefined {\n   775\u2192\t\treturn this._m1.get(key);\n   776\u2192\t}\n   777\u2192\n   778\u2192\tgetKey(value: V): K | undefined {\n   779\u2192\t\treturn this._m2.get(value);\n   780\u2192\t}\n   781\u2192\n   782\u2192\tdelete(key: K): boolean {\n   783\u2192\t\tconst value = this._m1.get(key);\n   784\u2192\t\tif (value === undefined) {\n   785\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   786\u2192\t\t}\n   787\u2192\t\tthis._m1.delete(key);\n   788\u2192\t\tthis._m2.delete(value);\n   789\u2192\t\treturn true;\n   790\u2192\t}\n   791\u2192\n   792\u2192\tforEach(callbackfn: (value: V, key: K, map: BidirectionalMap<K, V>) => void, thisArg?: any): void {\n   793\u2192\t\tthis._m1.forEach((value, key) => {\n   794\u2192\t\t\tcallbackfn.call(thisArg, value, key, this);\n   795\u2192\t\t});\n   796\u2192\t}\n   797\u2192\n   798\u2192\tkeys(): IterableIterator<K> {\n   799\u2192\t\treturn this._m1.keys();\n   800\u2192\t}\n   801\u2192\n   802\u2192\tvalues(): IterableIterator<V> {\n   803\u2192\t\treturn this._m1.values();\n   804\u2192\t}\n   805\u2192}\n   806\u2192\n   807\u2192export class SetMap<K, V> {\n   808\u2192\n   809\u2192\tprivate map = new Map<K, Set<V>>();\n   810\u2192\n   811\u2192\tadd(key: K, value: V): void {\n   812\u2192\t\tlet values = this.map.get(key);\n   813\u2192\n   814\u2192\t\tif (!values) {\n   815\u2192\t\t\tvalues = new Set<V>();\n   816\u2192\t\t\tthis.map.set(key, values);\n   817\u2192\t\t}\n   818\u2192\n   819\u2192\t\tvalues.add(value);\n   820\u2192\t}\n   821\u2192\n   822\u2192\tdelete(key: K, value: V): void {\n   823\u2192\t\tconst values = this.map.get(key);\n   824\u2192\n   825\u2192\t\tif (!values) {\n   826\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   827\u2192\t\t}\n   828\u2192\n   829\u2192\t\tvalues.delete(value);\n   830\u2192\n   831\u2192\t\tif (values.size === 0) {\n   832\u2192\t\t\tthis.map.delete(key);\n   833\u2192\t\t}\n   834\u2192\t}\n   835\u2192\n   836\u2192\tforEach(key: K, fn: (value: V) => void): void {\n   837\u2192\t\tconst values = this.map.get(key);\n   838\u2192\n   839\u2192\t\tif (!values) {\n   840\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   841\u2192\t\t}\n   842\u2192\n   843\u2192\t\tvalues.forEach(fn);\n   844\u2192\t}\n   845\u2192\n   846\u2192\tget(key: K): ReadonlySet<V> {\n   847\u2192\t\tconst values = this.map.get(key);\n   848\u2192\t\tif (!values) {\n   849\u2192\t\t\treturn new Set<V>();\n   850\u2192\t\t}\n   851\u2192\t\treturn values;\n   852\u2192\t}\n   853\u2192}\n   854\u2192\n   855\u2192export function mapsStrictEqualIgnoreOrder(a: Map<unknown, unknown>, b: Map<unknown, unknown>): boolean {\n   856\u2192\tif (a === b) {\n   857\u2192\t\treturn true;\n   858\u2192\t}\n   859\u2192\n   860\u2192\tif (a.size !== b.size) {\n   861\u2192\t\treturn false;\n   862\u2192\t}\n   863\u2192\n   864\u2192\tfor (const [key, value] of a) {\n   865\u2192\t\tif (!b.has(key) || b.get(key) !== value) {\n   866\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   867\u2192\t\t}\n   868\u2192\t}\n   869\u2192\n   870\u2192\tfor (const [key] of b) {\n   871\u2192\t\tif (!a.has(key)) {\n   872\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   873\u2192\t\t}\n   874\u2192\t}\n   875\u2192\n   876\u2192\treturn true;\n   877\u2192}\n   878\u2192\n   879\u2192/**\n   880\u2192 * A map that is addressable with 2 separate keys. This is useful in high performance scenarios\n   881\u2192 * where creating a composite key whenever the data is accessed is too expensive.\n   882\u2192 */\n   883\u2192export class TwoKeyMap<TFirst extends string | number, TSecond extends string | number, TValue> {\n   884\u2192\tprivate _data: { [key: string | number]: { [key: string | number]: TValue | undefined } | undefined } = {};\n   885\u2192\n   886\u2192\tpublic set(first: TFirst, second: TSecond, value: TValue): void {\n   887\u2192\t\tif (!this._data[first]) {\n   888\u2192\t\t\tthis._data[first] = {};\n   889\u2192\t\t}\n   890\u2192\t\tthis._data[first as string | number]![second] = value;\n   891\u2192\t}\n   892\u2192\n   893\u2192\tpublic get(first: TFirst, second: TSecond): TValue | undefined {\n   894\u2192\t\treturn this._data[first as string | number]?.[second];\n   895\u2192\t}\n   896\u2192\n   897\u2192\tpublic clear(): void {\n   898\u2192\t\tthis._data = {};\n   899\u2192\t}\n   900\u2192\n   901\u2192\tpublic *values(): IterableIterator<TValue> {\n   902\u2192\t\tfor (const first in this._data) {\n   903\u2192\t\t\tfor (const second in this._data[first]) {\n   904\u2192\t\t\t\tconst value = this._data[first]![second];\n   905\u2192\t\t\t\tif (value) {\n   906\u2192\t\t\t\t\tyield value;\n   907\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   908\u2192\t\t\t}\n   909\u2192\t\t}\n   910\u2192\t}\n   911\u2192}\n   912\u2192\n   913\u2192/**\n   914\u2192 * A map that is addressable with 3 separate keys. This is useful in high performance scenarios\n   915\u2192 * where creating a composite key whenever the data is accessed is too expensive.\n   916\u2192 */\n   917\u2192export class ThreeKeyMap<TFirst extends string | number, TSecond extends string | number, TThird extends string | number, TValue> {\n   918\u2192\tprivate _data: { [key: string | number]: TwoKeyMap<TSecond, TThird, TValue> | undefined } = {};\n   919\u2192\n   920\u2192\tpublic set(first: TFirst, second: TSecond, third: TThird, value: TValue): void {\n   921\u2192\t\tif (!this._data[first]) {\n   922\u2192\t\t\tthis._data[first] = new TwoKeyMap();\n   923\u2192\t\t}\n   924\u2192\t\tthis._data[first as string | number]!.set(second, third, value);\n   925\u2192\t}\n   926\u2192\n   927\u2192\tpublic get(first: TFirst, second: TSecond, third: TThird): TValue | undefined {\n   928\u2192\t\treturn this._data[first as string | number]?.get(second, third);\n   929\u2192\t}\n   930\u2192\n   931\u2192\tpublic clear(): void {\n   932\u2192\t\tthis._data = {};\n   933\u2192\t}\n   934\u2192\n   935\u2192\tpublic *values(): IterableIterator<TValue> {\n   936\u2192\t\tfor (const first in this._data) {\n   937\u2192\t\t\tfor (const value of this._data[first]!.values()) {\n   938\u2192\t\t\t\tif (value) {\n   939\u2192\t\t\t\t\tyield value;\n   940\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   941\u2192\t\t\t}\n   942\u2192\t\t}\n   943\u2192\t}\n   944\u2192}\n   945\u2192\n   946\u2192/**\n   947\u2192 * A map that is addressable with 4 separate keys. This is useful in high performance scenarios\n   948\u2192 * where creating a composite key whenever the data is accessed is too expensive.\n   949\u2192 */\n   950\u2192export class FourKeyMap<TFirst extends string | number, TSecond extends string | number, TThird extends string | number, TFourth extends string | number, TValue> {\n   951\u2192\tprivate _data: TwoKeyMap<TFirst, TSecond, TwoKeyMap<TThird, TFourth, TValue>> = new TwoKeyMap();\n   952\u2192\n   953\u2192\tpublic set(first: TFirst, second: TSecond, third: TThird, fourth: TFourth, value: TValue): void {\n   954\u2192\t\tif (!this._data.get(first, second)) {\n   955\u2192\t\t\tthis._data.set(first, second, new TwoKeyMap());\n   956\u2192\t\t}\n   957\u2192\t\tthis._data.get(first, second)!.set(third, fourth, value);\n   958\u2192\t}\n   959\u2192\n   960\u2192\tpublic get(first: TFirst, second: TSecond, third: TThird, fourth: TFourth): TValue | undefined {\n   961\u2192\t\treturn this._data.get(first, second)?.get(third, fourth);\n   962\u2192\t}\n   963\u2192\n   964\u2192\tpublic clear(): void {\n   965\u2192\t\tthis._data.clear();\n   966\u2192\t}\n   967\u2192}\n   968\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

URI } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadFileSystemEventService)\n    28\u2192export class MainThreadFileSystemEventService implements MainThreadFileSystemEventServiceShape {\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192\tstatic readonly MementoKeyAdditionalEdits = `file.particpants.additionalEdits`;\n    31\u2192\n    32\u2192\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostFileSystemEventServiceShape;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192\tprivate readonly _listener = new DisposableStore();\n    35\u2192\tprivate readonly _watches = new DisposableMap<number>();\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192\tconstructor(\n    38\u2192\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n    39\u2192\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n    40\u2192\t\t@IWorkingCopyFileService workingCopyFileService: IWorkingCopyFileService,\n    41\u2192\t\t@IBulkEditService bulkEditService: IBulkEditService,\n    42\u2192\t\t@IProgressService progressService: IProgressService,\n    43\u2192\t\t@IDialogService dialogService: IDialogService,\n    44\u2192\t\t@IStorageService storageService: IStorageService,\n    45\u2192\t\t@ILogService logService: ILogService,\n    46\u2192\t\t@IEnvironmentService envService: IEnvironmentService,\n    47\u2192\t\t@IUriIdentityService uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n    48\u2192\t\t@ILogService private readonly _logService: ILogService,\n    49\u2192\t) {\n    50\u2192\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostFileSystemEventService);\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192\t\tthis._listener.add(_fileService.onDidFilesChange(event => {\n    53\u2192\t\t\tthis._proxy.$onFileEvent({\n    54\u2192\t\t\t\tcreated: event.rawAdded,\n    55\u2192\t\t\t\tchanged: event.rawUpdated,\n    56\u2192\t\t\t\tdeleted: event.rawDeleted\n    57\u2192\t\t\t});\n    58\u2192\t\t}));\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192\t\tconst that = this;\n    61\u2192\t\tconst fileOperationParticipant = new class implements IWorkingCopyFileOperationParticipant {\n    62\u2192\t\t\tasync participate(files: SourceTargetPair[], operation: FileOperation, undoInfo: IFileOperationUndoRedoInfo | undefined, timeout: number, token: CancellationToken) {\n    63\u2192\t\t\t\tif (undoInfo?.isUndoing) {\n    64\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n    65\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\t\t\t\tconst cts = new CancellationTokenSource(token);\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\tconst timer = setTimeout(() => cts.cancel(), timeout);\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\t\t\t\tconst data = await progressService.withProgress({\n    71\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlocation: ProgressLocation.Notification,\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttitle: this._progressLabel(operation),\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcancellable: true,\n    74\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdelay: Math.min(timeout / 2, 3000)\n    75\u2192\t\t\t\t}, () => {\n    76\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// race extension host event delivery against timeout AND user-cancel\n    77\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst onWillEvent = that._proxy.$onWillRunFileOperation(operation, files, timeout, cts.token);\n    78\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn raceCancellation(onWillEvent, cts.token);\n    79\u2192\t\t\t\t}, () => {\n    80\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// user-cancel\n    81\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcts.cancel();\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192\t\t\t\t}).finally(() => {\n    84\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcts.dispose();\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\t\tclearTimeout(timer);\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!data || data.edit.edits.length === 0) {\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// cancelled, no reply, or no edits\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192\t\t\t\tconst needsConfirmation = data.edit.edits.some(edit => edit.metadata?.needsConfirmation);\n    94\u2192\t\t\t\tlet showPreview = storageService.getBoolean(MainThreadFileSystemEventService.MementoKeyAdditionalEdits, StorageScope.PROFILE);\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192\t\t\t\tif (envService.extensionTestsLocationURI) {\n    97\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// don't show dialog in tests\n    98\u2192\t\t\t\t\tshowPreview = false;\n    99\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   100\u2192\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\tif (showPreview === undefined) {\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// show a user facing message\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlet message: string;\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (data.extensionNames.length === 1) {\n   106\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (operation === FileOperation.CREATE) {\n   107\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.create', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file creation\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   108\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.COPY) {\n   109\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.copy', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file copy\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   110\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.MOVE) {\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.move', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file move\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   112\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else /* if (operation === FileOperation.DELETE) */ {\n   113\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.delete', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file deletion\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   114\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   115\u2192\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n   116\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (operation === FileOperation.CREATE) {\n   117\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.create', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file creation\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   118\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.COPY) {\n   119\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.copy', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file copy\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   120\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.MOVE) {\n   121\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.move', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file move\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else /* if (operation === FileOperation.DELETE) */ {\n   123\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.delete', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file deletion\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   124\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   125\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (needsConfirmation) {\n   128\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// edit which needs confirmation -> always show dialog\n   129\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst { confirmed } = await dialogService.confirm({\n   130\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: Severity.Info,\n   131\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage,\n   132\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tprimaryButton: localize('preview', \"Show &&Preview\"),\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcancelButton: localize('cancel', \"Skip Changes\")\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tshowPreview = true;\n   136\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!confirmed) {\n   137\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// no changes wanted\n   138\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n   139\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   140\u2192\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// choice\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tenum Choice {\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOK = 0,\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPreview = 1,\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tCancel = 2\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst { result, checkboxChecked } = await dialogService.prompt<Choice>({\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: Severity.Info,\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage,\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbuttons: [\n   151\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n   152\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlabel: localize({ key: 'ok', comment: ['&& denotes a mnemonic'] }, \"&&OK\"),\n   153\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: () => Choice.OK\n   154\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   155\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n   156\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlabel: localize({ key: 'preview', comment: ['&& denotes a mnemonic'] }, \"Show &&Preview\"),\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: () => Choice.Preview\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   159\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t],\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcancelButton: {\n   161\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlabel: localize('cancel', \"Skip Changes\"),\n   162\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: () => Choice.Cancel\n   163\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   164\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcheckbox: { label: localize('again', \"Do not ask me again\") }\n   165\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n   166\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (result === Choice.Cancel) {\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// no changes wanted, don't persist cancel option\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   170\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tshowPreview = result === Choice.Preview;\n   171\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (checkboxChecked) {\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstorageService.store(MainThreadFileSystemEventService.MementoKeyAdditionalEdits, showPreview, StorageScope.PROFILE, StorageTarget.USER);\n   173\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   174\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\tlogService.info('[onWill-handler] applying additional workspace edit from extensions', data.extensionNames);\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\tawait bulkEditService.apply(\n   180\u2192\t\t\t\t\treviveWorkspaceEditDto(data.edit, uriIdentService),\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\t\t{ undoRedoGroupId: undoInfo?.undoRedoGroupId, showPreview }\n   182\u2192\t\t\t\t);\n   183\u2192\t\t\t}\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192\t\t\tprivate _progressLabel(operation: FileOperation): string {\n   186\u2192\t\t\t\tswitch (operation) {\n   187\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.CREATE:\n   188\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-create', \"Running 'File Create' participants...\");\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.MOVE:\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-rename', \"Running 'File Rename' participants...\");\n   191\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.COPY:\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-copy', \"Running 'File Copy' participants...\");\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.DELETE:\n   194\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-delete', \"Running 'File Delete' participants...\");\n   195\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.WRITE:\n   196\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-write', \"Running 'File Write' participants...\");\n   197\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   198\u2192\t\t\t}\n   199\u2192\t\t};\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192\t\t// BEFORE file operation\n   202\u2192\t\tthis._listener.add(workingCopyFileService.addFileOperationParticipant(fileOperationParticipant));\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192\t\t// AFTER file operation\n   205\u2192\t\tthis._listener.add(workingCopyFileService.onDidRunWorkingCopyFileOperation(e => this._proxy.$onDidRunFileOperation(e.operation, e.files)));\n   206\u2192\t}\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192\tasync $watch(extensionId: string, session: number, resource: UriComponents, unvalidatedOpts: IWatchOptions, correlate: boolean): Promise<void> {\n   209\u2192\t\tconst uri = URI.revive(resource);\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192\t\tconst opts: IWatchOptions = {\n   212\u2192\t\t\t...unvalidatedOpts\n   213\u2192\t\t};\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192\t\t// Convert a recursive watcher to a flat watcher if the path\n   216\u2192\t\t// turns out to not be a folder. Recursive watching is only\n   217\u2192\t\t// possible on folders, so we help all file watchers by checking\n   218\u2192\t\t// early.\n   219\u2192\t\tif (opts.recursive) {\n   220\u2192\t\t\ttry {\n   221\u2192\t\t\t\tconst stat = await this._fileService.stat(uri);\n   222\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!stat.isDirectory) {\n   223\u2192\t\t\t\t\topts.recursive = false;\n   224\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   225\u2192\t\t\t} catch (error) {\n   226\u2192\t\t\t\t// ignore\n   227\u2192\t\t\t}\n   228\u2192\t\t}\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192\t\t// Correlated file watching: use an exclusive `createWatcher()`\n   231\u2192\t\tif (correlate) {\n   232\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.trace(`MainThreadFileSystemEventService#$watch(): request to start watching correlated (extension: ${extensionId}, path: ${uri.toString(true)}, recursive: ${opts.recursive}, session: ${session}, excludes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.excludes)}, includes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.includes)})`);\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192\t\t\tconst watcherDisposables = new DisposableStore();\n   235\u2192\t\t\tconst subscription = watcherDisposables.add(this._fileService.createWatcher(uri, opts));\n   236\u2192\t\t\twatcherDisposables.add(subscription.onDidChange(event => {\n   237\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._proxy.$onFileEvent({\n   238\u2192\t\t\t\t\tsession,\n   239\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcreated: event.rawAdded,\n   240\u2192\t\t\t\t\tchanged: event.rawUpdated,\n   241\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdeleted: event.rawDeleted\n   242\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n   243\u2192\t\t\t}));\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192\t\t\tthis._watches.set(session, watcherDisposables);\n   246\u2192\t\t}\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192\t\t// Uncorrelated file watching: via shared `watch()`\n   249\u2192\t\telse {\n   250\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.trace(`MainThreadFileSystemEventService#$watch(): request to start watching uncorrelated (extension: ${extensionId}, path: ${uri.toString(true)}, recursive: ${opts.recursive}, session: ${session}, excludes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.excludes)}, includes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.includes)})`);\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192\t\t\tconst subscription = this._fileService.watch(uri, opts);\n   253\u2192\t\t\tthis._watches.set(session, subscription);\n   254\u2192\t\t}\n   255\u2192\t}\n   256\u2192\n   257\u2192\t$unwatch(session: number): void {\n   258\u2192\t\tif (this._watches.has(session)) {\n   259\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.trace(`MainThreadFileSystemEventService#$unwatch(): request to stop watching (session: ${session})`);\n   260\u2192\t\t\tthis._watches.deleteAndDispose(session);\n   261\u2192\t\t}\n   262\u2192\t}\n   263\u2192\n   264\u2192\tdispose(): void {\n   265\u2192\t\tthis._listener.dispose();\n   266\u2192\t\tthis._watches.dispose();\n   267\u2192\t}\n   268\u2192}\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192registerAction2(class ResetMemento extends Action2 {\n   271\u2192\tconstructor() {\n   272\u2192\t\tsuper({\n   273\u2192\t\t\tid: 'files.participants.resetChoice',\n   274\u2192\t\t\ttitle: {\n   275\u2192\t\t\t\tvalue: localize('label', \"Reset choice for 'File operation needs preview'\"),\n   276\u2192\t\t\t\toriginal: `Reset choice for 'File operation needs preview'`\n   277\u2192\t\t\t},\n   278\u2192\t\t\tf1: true\n   279\u2192\t\t});\n   280\u2192\t}\n   281\u2192\trun(accessor: ServicesAccessor) {\n   282\u2192\t\taccessor.get(IStorageService).remove(MainThreadFileSystemEventService.MementoKeyAdditionalEdits, StorageScope.PROFILE);\n   283\u2192\t}\n   284\u2192});\n   285\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
97. Read @ -

implements MainThreadFileSystemEventServiceShape {\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192\tstatic readonly MementoKeyAdditionalEdits = `file.particpants.additionalEdits`;\n    31\u2192\n    32\u2192\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostFileSystemEventServiceShape;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192\tprivate readonly _listener = new DisposableStore();\n    35\u2192\tprivate readonly _watches = new DisposableMap<number>();\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192\tconstructor(\n    38\u2192\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n    39\u2192\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n    40\u2192\t\t@IWorkingCopyFileService workingCopyFileService: IWorkingCopyFileService,\n    41\u2192\t\t@IBulkEditService bulkEditService: IBulkEditService,\n    42\u2192\t\t@IProgressService progressService: IProgressService,\n    43\u2192\t\t@IDialogService dialogService: IDialogService,\n    44\u2192\t\t@IStorageService storageService: IStorageService,\n    45\u2192\t\t@ILogService logService: ILogService,\n    46\u2192\t\t@IEnvironmentService envService: IEnvironmentService,\n    47\u2192\t\t@IUriIdentityService uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n    48\u2192\t\t@ILogService private readonly _logService: ILogService,\n    49\u2192\t) {\n    50\u2192\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostFileSystemEventService);\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192\t\tthis._listener.add(_fileService.onDidFilesChange(event => {\n    53\u2192\t\t\tthis._proxy.$onFileEvent({\n    54\u2192\t\t\t\tcreated: event.rawAdded,\n    55\u2192\t\t\t\tchanged: event.rawUpdated,\n    56\u2192\t\t\t\tdeleted: event.rawDeleted\n    57\u2192\t\t\t});\n    58\u2192\t\t}));\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192\t\tconst that = this;\n    61\u2192\t\tconst fileOperationParticipant = new class implements IWorkingCopyFileOperationParticipant {\n    62\u2192\t\t\tasync participate(files: SourceTargetPair[], operation: FileOperation, undoInfo: IFileOperationUndoRedoInfo | undefined, timeout: number, token: CancellationToken) {\n    63\u2192\t\t\t\tif (undoInfo?.isUndoing) {\n    64\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n    65\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\t\t\t\tconst cts = new CancellationTokenSource(token);\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\tconst timer = setTimeout(() => cts.cancel(), timeout);\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\t\t\t\tconst data = await progressService.withProgress({\n    71\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlocation: ProgressLocation.Notification,\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttitle: this._progressLabel(operation),\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcancellable: true,\n    74\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdelay: Math.min(timeout / 2, 3000)\n    75\u2192\t\t\t\t}, () => {\n    76\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// race extension host event delivery against timeout AND user-cancel\n    77\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst onWillEvent = that._proxy.$onWillRunFileOperation(operation, files, timeout, cts.token);\n    78\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn raceCancellation(onWillEvent, cts.token);\n    79\u2192\t\t\t\t}, () => {\n    80\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// user-cancel\n    81\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcts.cancel();\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192\t\t\t\t}).finally(() => {\n    84\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcts.dispose();\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\t\tclearTimeout(timer);\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!data || data.edit.edits.length === 0) {\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// cancelled, no reply, or no edits\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192\t\t\t\tconst needsConfirmation = data.edit.edits.some(edit => edit.metadata?.needsConfirmation);\n    94\u2192\t\t\t\tlet showPreview = storageService.getBoolean(MainThreadFileSystemEventService.MementoKeyAdditionalEdits, StorageScope.PROFILE);\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192\t\t\t\tif (envService.extensionTestsLocationURI) {\n    97\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// don't show dialog in tests\n    98\u2192\t\t\t\t\tshowPreview = false;\n    99\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   100\u2192\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\tif (showPreview === undefined) {\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// show a user facing message\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlet message: string;\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (data.extensionNames.length === 1) {\n   106\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (operation === FileOperation.CREATE) {\n   107\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.create', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file creation\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   108\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.COPY) {\n   109\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.copy', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file copy\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   110\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.MOVE) {\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.move', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file move\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   112\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else /* if (operation === FileOperation.DELETE) */ {\n   113\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize('ask.1.delete', \"Extension '{0}' wants to make refactoring changes with this file deletion\", data.extensionNames[0]);\n   114\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   115\u2192\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n   116\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (operation === FileOperation.CREATE) {\n   117\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.create', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file creation\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   118\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.COPY) {\n   119\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.copy', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file copy\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   120\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if (operation === FileOperation.MOVE) {\n   121\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.move', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file move\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} else /* if (operation === FileOperation.DELETE) */ {\n   123\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage = localize({ key: 'ask.N.delete', comment: ['{0} is a number, e.g \"3 extensions want...\"'] }, \"{0} extensions want to make refactoring changes with this file deletion\", data.extensionNames.length);\n   124\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   125\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (needsConfirmation) {\n   128\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// edit which needs confirmation -> always show dialog\n   129\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst { confirmed } = await dialogService.confirm({\n   130\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: Severity.Info,\n   131\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage,\n   132\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tprimaryButton: localize('preview', \"Show &&Preview\"),\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcancelButton: localize('cancel', \"Skip Changes\")\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tshowPreview = true;\n   136\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!confirmed) {\n   137\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// no changes wanted\n   138\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n   139\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   140\u2192\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// choice\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tenum Choice {\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOK = 0,\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPreview = 1,\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tCancel = 2\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst { result, checkboxChecked } = await dialogService.prompt<Choice>({\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: Severity.Info,\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage,\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbuttons: [\n   151\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n   152\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlabel: localize({ key: 'ok', comment: ['&& denotes a mnemonic'] }, \"&&OK\"),\n   153\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: () => Choice.OK\n   154\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   155\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n   156\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlabel: localize({ key: 'preview', comment: ['&& denotes a mnemonic'] }, \"Show &&Preview\"),\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: () => Choice.Preview\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   159\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t],\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcancelButton: {\n   161\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlabel: localize('cancel', \"Skip Changes\"),\n   162\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: () => Choice.Cancel\n   163\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   164\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcheckbox: { label: localize('again', \"Do not ask me again\") }\n   165\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n   166\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (result === Choice.Cancel) {\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// no changes wanted, don't persist cancel option\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   170\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tshowPreview = result === Choice.Preview;\n   171\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (checkboxChecked) {\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstorageService.store(MainThreadFileSystemEventService.MementoKeyAdditionalEdits, showPreview, StorageScope.PROFILE, StorageTarget.USER);\n   173\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   174\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\tlogService.info('[onWill-handler] applying additional workspace edit from extensions', data.extensionNames);\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\tawait bulkEditService.apply(\n   180\u2192\t\t\t\t\treviveWorkspaceEditDto(data.edit, uriIdentService),\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\t\t{ undoRedoGroupId: undoInfo?.undoRedoGroupId, showPreview }\n   182\u2192\t\t\t\t);\n   183\u2192\t\t\t}\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192\t\t\tprivate _progressLabel(operation: FileOperation): string {\n   186\u2192\t\t\t\tswitch (operation) {\n   187\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.CREATE:\n   188\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-create', \"Running 'File Create' participants...\");\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.MOVE:\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-rename', \"Running 'File Rename' participants...\");\n   191\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.COPY:\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-copy', \"Running 'File Copy' participants...\");\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.DELETE:\n   194\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-delete', \"Running 'File Delete' participants...\");\n   195\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcase FileOperation.WRITE:\n   196\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn localize('msg-write', \"Running 'File Write' participants...\");\n   197\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   198\u2192\t\t\t}\n   199\u2192\t\t};\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192\t\t// BEFORE file operation\n   202\u2192\t\tthis._listener.add(workingCopyFileService.addFileOperationParticipant(fileOperationParticipant));\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192\t\t// AFTER file operation\n   205\u2192\t\tthis._listener.add(workingCopyFileService.onDidRunWorkingCopyFileOperation(e => this._proxy.$onDidRunFileOperation(e.operation, e.files)));\n   206\u2192\t}\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192\tasync $watch(extensionId: string, session: number, resource: UriComponents, unvalidatedOpts: IWatchOptions, correlate: boolean): Promise<void> {\n   209\u2192\t\tconst uri = URI.revive(resource);\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192\t\tconst opts: IWatchOptions = {\n   212\u2192\t\t\t...unvalidatedOpts\n   213\u2192\t\t};\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192\t\t// Convert a recursive watcher to a flat watcher if the path\n   216\u2192\t\t// turns out to not be a folder. Recursive watching is only\n   217\u2192\t\t// possible on folders, so we help all file watchers by checking\n   218\u2192\t\t// early.\n   219\u2192\t\tif (opts.recursive) {\n   220\u2192\t\t\ttry {\n   221\u2192\t\t\t\tconst stat = await this._fileService.stat(uri);\n   222\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!stat.isDirectory) {\n   223\u2192\t\t\t\t\topts.recursive = false;\n   224\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   225\u2192\t\t\t} catch (error) {\n   226\u2192\t\t\t\t// ignore\n   227\u2192\t\t\t}\n   228\u2192\t\t}\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192\t\t// Correlated file watching: use an exclusive `createWatcher()`\n   231\u2192\t\tif (correlate) {\n   232\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.trace(`MainThreadFileSystemEventService#$watch(): request to start watching correlated (extension: ${extensionId}, path: ${uri.toString(true)}, recursive: ${opts.recursive}, session: ${session}, excludes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.excludes)}, includes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.includes)})`);\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192\t\t\tconst watcherDisposables = new DisposableStore();\n   235\u2192\t\t\tconst subscription = watcherDisposables.add(this._fileService.createWatcher(uri, opts));\n   236\u2192\t\t\twatcherDisposables.add(subscription.onDidChange(event => {\n   237\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._proxy.$onFileEvent({\n   238\u2192\t\t\t\t\tsession,\n   239\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcreated: event.rawAdded,\n   240\u2192\t\t\t\t\tchanged: event.rawUpdated,\n   241\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdeleted: event.rawDeleted\n   242\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n   243\u2192\t\t\t}));\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192\t\t\tthis._watches.set(session, watcherDisposables);\n   246\u2192\t\t}\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192\t\t// Uncorrelated file watching: via shared `watch()`\n   249\u2192\t\telse {\n   250\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.trace(`MainThreadFileSystemEventService#$watch(): request to start watching uncorrelated (extension: ${extensionId}, path: ${uri.toString(true)}, recursive: ${opts.recursive}, session: ${session}, excludes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.excludes)}, includes: ${JSON.stringify(opts.includes)})`);\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192\t\t\tconst subscription = this._fileService.watch(uri, opts);\n   253\u2192\t\t\tthis._watches.set(session, subscription);\n   254\u2192\t\t}\n   255\u2192\t}\n   256\u2192\n   257\u2192\t$unwatch(session: number): void {\n   258\u2192\t\tif (this._watches.has(session)) {\n   259\u2192\t\t\tthis._logService.trace(`MainThreadFileSystemEventService#$unwatch(): request to stop watching (session: ${session})`);\n   260\u2192\t\t\tthis._watches.deleteAndDispose(session);\n   261\u2192\t\t}\n   262\u2192\t}\n   263\u2192\n   264\u2192\tdispose(): void {\n   265\u2192\t\tthis._listener.dispose();\n   266\u2192\t\tthis._watches.dispose();\n   267\u2192\t}\n   268\u2192}\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192registerAction2(class ResetMemento extends Action2 {\n   271\u2192\tconstructor() {\n   272\u2192\t\tsuper({\n   273\u2192\t\t\tid: 'files.participants.resetChoice',\n   274\u2192\t\t\ttitle: {\n   275\u2192\t\t\t\tvalue: localize('label', \"Reset choice for 'File operation needs preview'\"),\n   276\u2192\t\t\t\toriginal: `Reset choice for 'File operation needs preview'`\n   277\u2192\t\t\t},\n   278\u2192\t\t\tf1: true\n   279\u2192\t\t});\n   280\u2192\t}\n   281\u2192\trun(accessor: ServicesAccessor) {\n   282\u2192\t\taccessor.get(IStorageService).remove(MainThreadFileSystemEventService.MementoKeyAdditionalEdits, StorageScope.PROFILE);\n   283\u2192\t}\n   284\u2192});\n   285\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
98. Read @ -

IEditorGroupsService,\n    60\u2192\t\t@ITextFileService private readonly textFileService: ITextFileService,\n    61\u2192\t\t@IExplorerService private readonly explorerService: IExplorerService,\n    62\u2192\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly uriIdentityService: IUriIdentityService,\n    63\u2192\t\t@IPathService private readonly pathService: IPathService,\n    64\u2192\t\t@IConfigurationService private readonly configurationService: IConfigurationService,\n    65\u2192\t\t@IPreferencesService protected readonly preferencesService: IPreferencesService,\n    66\u2192\t\t@IHostService private readonly hostService: IHostService,\n    67\u2192\t\t@IFilesConfigurationService private readonly filesConfigurationService: IFilesConfigurationService\n    68\u2192\t) {\n    69\u2192\t\tsuper(TextFileEditor.ID, group, telemetryService, instantiationService, storageService, textResourceConfigurationService, themeService, editorService, editorGroupService, fileService);\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192\t\t// Clear view state for deleted files\n    72\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.fileService.onDidFilesChange(e => this.onDidFilesChange(e)));\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192\t\t// Move view state for moved files\n    75\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.fileService.onDidRunOperation(e => this.onDidRunOperation(e)));\n    76\u2192\t}\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192\tprivate onDidFilesChange(e: FileChangesEvent): void {\n    79\u2192\t\tfor (const resource of e.rawDeleted) {\n    80\u2192\t\t\tthis.clearEditorViewState(resource);\n    81\u2192\t\t}\n    82\u2192\t}\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192\tprivate onDidRunOperation(e: FileOperationEvent): void {\n    85\u2192\t\tif (e.operation === FileOperation.MOVE && e.target) {\n    86\u2192\t\t\tthis.moveEditorViewState(e.resource, e.target.resource, this.uriIdentityService.extUri);\n    87\u2192\t\t}\n    88\u2192\t}\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192\toverride getTitle(): string {\n    91\u2192\t\tif (this.input) {\n    92\u2192\t\t\treturn this.input.getName();\n    93\u2192\t\t}\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192\t\treturn localize('textFileEditor', \"Text File Editor\");\n    96\u2192\t}\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192\toverride get input(): FileEditorInput | undefined {\n    99\u2192\t\treturn this._input as FileEditorInput;\n   100\u2192\t}\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192\toverride async setInput(input: FileEditorInput, options: IFileEditorInputOptions | undefined, context: IEditorOpenContext, token: CancellationToken): Promise<void> {\n   103\u2192\t\tmark('code/willSetInputToTextFileEditor');\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192\t\t// Set input and resolve\n   106\u2192\t\tawait super.setInput(input, options, context, token);\n   107\u2192\t\ttry {\n   108\u2192\t\t\tconst resolvedModel = await input.resolve(options);\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192\t\t\t// Check for cancellation\n   111\u2192\t\t\tif (token.isCancellationRequested) {\n   112\u2192\t\t\t\treturn;\n   113\u2192\t\t\t}\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192\t\t\t// There is a special case where the text editor has to handle binary\n   116\u2192\t\t\t// file editor input: if a binary file has been resolved and cached\n   117\u2192\t\t\t// before, it maybe an actual instance of BinaryEditorModel. In this\n   118\u2192\t\t\t// case our text editor has to open this model using the binary editor.\n   119\u2192\t\t\t// We return early in this case.\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192\t\t\tif (resolvedModel instanceof BinaryEditorModel) {\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\treturn this.openAsBinary(input, options);\n   123\u2192\t\t\t}\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192\t\t\tconst textFileModel = resolvedModel;\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192\t\t\t// Editor\n   128\u2192\t\t\tconst control = assertIsDefined(this.editorControl);\n   129\u2192\t\t\tcontrol.setModel(textFileModel.textEditorModel);\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192\t\t\t// Restore view state (unless provided by options)\n   132\u2192\t\t\tif (!isTextEditorViewState(options?.viewState)) {\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\tconst editorViewState = this.loadEditorViewState(input, context);\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\tif (editorViewState) {\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (options?.selection) {\n   136\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\teditorViewState.cursorState = []; // prevent duplicate selections via options\n   137\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcontrol.restoreViewState(editorViewState);\n   140\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   141\u2192\t\t\t}\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192\t\t\t// Apply options to editor if any\n   144\u2192\t\t\tif (options) {\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\tapplyTextEditorOptions(options, control, ScrollType.Immediate);\n   146\u2192\t\t\t}\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192\t\t\t// Since the resolved model provides information about being readonly\n   149\u2192\t\t\t// or not, we apply it here to the editor even though the editor input\n   150\u2192\t\t\t// was already asked for being readonly or not. The rationale is that\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

76\u2192\t}\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192\tprivate onDidFilesChange(e: FileChangesEvent): void {\n    79\u2192\t\tfor (const resource of e.rawDeleted) {\n (e.operation === FileOperation.MOVE && e.target) {\n    86\u2192\t\t\tthis.moveEditorViewState(e.resource, e.target.resource, this.uriIdentityService.extUri);\n    87\u2192\t\t}\n    88\u2192\t}\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192\toverride getTitle(): string {\n    91\u2192\t\tif (this.input) {\n    92\u2192\t\t\treturn this.input.getName();\n    93\u2192\t\t}\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192\t\treturn localize('textFileEditor', \"Text File Editor\");\n    96\u2192\t}\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192\toverride get input(): FileEditorInput | undefined {\n    99\u2192\t\treturn this._input as string;\n    34\u2192\tstartLineNumber: number;\n    35\u2192\tstartColumn: number;\n    36\u2192\tendLineNumber: number;\n    37\u2192\tendColumn: number;\n    38\u2192}\n    39\u2192\n 47\u2192\tInfo = 2,\n    48\u2192\tWarning = 4,\n    49\u2192\tError = 8,\n    50\u2192}\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192export namespace MarkerSeverity {\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192\texport function compare(a: MarkerSeverity, b: MarkerSeverity): number {\n    55\u2192\t\treturn b - a;\n    56\u2192\t}\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192\tconst _displayStrings: { [value: number]: string } = Object.create(null);\n    59\u2192\t_displayStrings[MarkerSeverity.Error] = localize('sev.error', \"Error\");\n    60\u2192\t_displayStrings[MarkerSeverity.Warning] = localize('sev.warning', \"Warning\");\n    61\u2192\t_displayStrings[MarkerSeverity.Info] = localize('sev.info', \"Info\");\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192\texport function toString(a: MarkerSeverity): string {\n    64\u2192\t\treturn _displayStrings[a] || '';\n    65\u2192\t}\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\texport function fromSeverity(severity: Severity): MarkerSeverity {\n    68\u2192\t\tswitch (severity) {\n    69\u2192\t\t\tcase Severity.Error: return MarkerSeverity.Error;\n    70\u2192\t\t\tcase Severity.Warning: return MarkerSeverity.Warning;\n    71\u2192\t\t\tcase Severity.Info: return MarkerSeverity.Info;\n    72\u2192\t\t\tcase Severity.Ignore: return MarkerSeverity.Hint;\n    73\u2192\t\t}\n    74\u2192\t}\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192\texport function toSeverity(severity: MarkerSeverity): Severity {\n    77\u2192\t\tswitch (severity) {\n    78\u2192\t\t\tcase MarkerSeverity.Error: return Severity.Error;\n    79\u2192\t\t\tcase MarkerSeverity.Warning: return Severity.Warning;\n    80\u2192\t\t\tcase MarkerSeverity.Info: return Severity.Info;\n    81\u2192\t\t\tcase MarkerSeverity.Hint: return Severity.Ignore;\n    82\u2192\t\t}\n    83\u2192\t}\n    84\u2192}\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192/**\n    87\u2192 * A structure defining a problem/warning/etc.\n    88\u2192 */\n    89\u2192export interface IMarkerData {\n    90\u2192\tcode?: string | { value: string; target: URI };\n    91\u2192\tseverity: MarkerSeverity;\n    92\u2192\tmessage: string;\n    93\u2192\tsource?: string;\n    94\u2192\tstartLineNumber: number;\n    95\u2192\tstartColumn: number;\n    96\u2192\tendLineNumber: number;\n    97\u2192\tendColumn: number;\n    98\u2192\tmodelVersionId?: number;\n    99\u2192\trelatedInformation?: IRelatedInformation[];\n   100\u2192\ttags?: MarkerTag[];\n   101\u2192}\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192export interface IResourceMarker {\n   104\u2192\tresource: URI;\n   105\u2192\tmarker: IMarkerData;\n   106\u2192}\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192export interface IMarker {\n   109\u2192\towner: string;\n   110\u2192\tresource: URI;\n   111\u2192\tseverity: MarkerSeverity;\n   112\u2192\tcode?: string | { value: string; target: URI };\n   113\u2192\tmessage: string;\n   114\u2192\tsource?: string;\n   115\u2192\tstartLineNumber: number;\n   116\u2192\tstartColumn: number;\n   117\u2192\tendLineNumber: number;\n   118\u2192\tendColumn: number;\n   119\u2192\tmodelVersionId?: number;\n   120\u2192\trelatedInformation?: IRelatedInformation[];\n   121\u2192\ttags?: MarkerTag[];\n   122\u2192}\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192export interface MarkerStatistics {\n   125\u2192\terrors: number;\n   126\u2192\twarnings: number;\n   127\u2192\tinfos: number;\n   128\u2192\tunknowns: number;\n   129\u2192}\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192export namespace IMarkerData {\n   132\u2192\tconst emptyString = '';\n   133\u2192\texport function makeKey(markerData: IMarkerData): string {\n   134\u2192\t\treturn makeKeyOptionalMessage(markerData, true);\n   135\u2192\t}\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192\texport function makeKeyOptionalMessage(markerData: IMarkerData, useMessage: boolean): string {\n   138\u2192\t\tconst result: string[] = [emptyString];\n   139\u2192\t\tif (markerData.source) {\n   140\u2192\t\t\tresult.push(markerData.source.replace('\u00a6', '\\\\\u00a6'));\n   141\u2192\t\t} else {\n   142\u2192\t\t\tresult.push(emptyString);\n   143\u2192\t\t}\n   144\u2192\t\tif (markerData.code) {\n   145\u2192\t\t\tif (typeof markerData.code === 'string') {\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.push(markerData.code.replace('\u00a6', '\\\\\u00a6'));\n   147\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.push(markerData.code.value.replace('\u00a6', '\\\\\u00a6'));\n   149\u2192\t\t\t}\n   150\u2192\t\t} else {\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

14\u2192@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics)\n    15\u2192export class MainThreadDiagnostics implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192\tprivate readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;\n    20\u2192\tprivate readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;\n    21\u2192\tprivate readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192\tconstructor(\n    24\u2192\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n    25\u2192\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: 28\u2192\t) {\n    29\u2192\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n    32\u2192\t\tthis._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);\n    33\u2192\t}\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192\tdispose(): void {\n    36\u2192\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n    37\u2192\t\tthis._fileListener.dispose();\n    38\u2192\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n    39\u2192\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n    40\u2192\t}\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n    43\u2192\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n    44\u2192\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n    45\u2192\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware.
