6\u2192import { isFalsyOrEmpty, isNonEmptyArray } from '../../../base/common/arrays.js';\n     7\u2192import { DebounceEmitter } from '../../../base/common/event.js';\n     8\u2192import { Iterable } from '../../../base/common/iterator.js';\n     9\u2192import { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\n    10\u2192import { ResourceMap } from '../../../base/common/map.js';\n    11\u2192import { Schemas } from '../../../base/common/network.js';\n    12\u2192import { URI } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\n    13\u2192import { IMarker, IMarkerData, IMarkerService, IResourceMarker, MarkerSeverity, MarkerStatistics } from './markers.js';\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192export const unsupportedSchemas = new Set([\n    16\u2192\tSchemas.inMemory,\n    17\u2192\tSchemas.vscodeSourceControl,\n    18\u2192\tSchemas.walkThrough,\n    19\u2192\tSchemas.walkThroughSnippet,\n    20\u2192\tSchemas.vscodeChatCodeBlock,\n    21\u2192]);\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192class DoubleResourceMap<V> {\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192\tprivate _byResource = new ResourceMap<Map<string, V>>();\n    26\u2192\tprivate _byOwner = new Map<string, ResourceMap<V>>();\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192\tset(resource: URI, owner: string, value: V) {\n    29\u2192\t\tlet ownerMap = this._byResource.get(resource);\n    30\u2192\t\tif (!ownerMap) {\n    31\u2192\t\t\townerMap = new Map();\n    32\u2192\t\t\tthis._byResource.set(resource, ownerMap);\n    33\u2192\t\t}\n    34\u2192\t\townerMap.set(owner, value);\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192\t\tlet resourceMap = this._byOwner.get(owner);\n    37\u2192\t\tif (!resourceMap) {\n    38\u2192\t\t\tresourceMap = new ResourceMap();\n    39\u2192\t\t\tthis._byOwner.set(owner, resourceMap);\n    40\u2192\t\t}\n    41\u2192\t\tresourceMap.set(resource, value);\n    42\u2192\t}\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192\tget(resource: URI, owner: string): V | undefined {\n    45\u2192\t\tconst ownerMap = this._byResource.get(resource);\n    46\u2192\t\treturn ownerMap?.get(owner);\n    47\u2192\t}\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192\tdelete(resource: URI, owner: string): boolean {\n    50\u2192\t\tlet removedA = false;\n    51\u2192\t\tlet removedB = false;\n    52\u2192\t\tconst ownerMap = this._byResource.get(resource);\n    53\u2192\t\tif (ownerMap) {\n    54\u2192\t\t\tremovedA = ownerMap.delete(owner);\n    55\u2192\t\t}\n    56\u2192\t\tconst resourceMap = this._byOwner.get(owner);\n    57\u2192\t\tif (resourceMap) {\n    58\u2192\t\t\tremovedB = resourceMap.delete(resource);\n    59\u2192\t\t}\n    60\u2192\t\tif (removedA !== removedB) {\n    61\u2192\t\t\tthrow new Error('illegal state');\n    62\u2192\t\t}\n    63\u2192\t\treturn removedA && removedB;\n    64\u2192\t}\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192\tvalues(key?: URI | string): Iterable<V> {\n    67\u2192\t\tif (typeof key === 'string') {\n    68\u2192\t\t\treturn this._byOwner.get(key)?.values() ?? Iterable.empty();\n    69\u2192\t\t}\n    70\u2192\t\tif (URI.isUri(key)) {\n    71\u2192\t\t\treturn this._byResource.get(key)?.values() ?? Iterable.empty();\n    72\u2192\t\t}\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192\t\treturn Iterable.map(Iterable.concat(...this._byOwner.values()), map => map[1]);\n    75\u2192\t}\n    76\u2192}\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192class MarkerStats implements MarkerStatistics {\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192\terrors: number = 0;\n    81\u2192\tinfos: number = 0;\n    82\u2192\twarnings: number = 0;\n    83\u2192\tunknowns: number = 0;\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192\tprivate readonly _data = new ResourceMap<MarkerStatistics>();\n    86\u2192\tprivate readonly _service: IMarkerService;\n    87\u2192\tprivate readonly _subscription: IDisposable;\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192\tconstructor(service: IMarkerService) {\n    90\u2192\t\tthis._service = service;\n    91\u2192\t\tthis._subscription = service.onMarkerChanged(this._update, this);\n    92\u2192\t}\n    93\u2192\n    94\u2192\tdispose(): void {\n    95\u2192\t\tthis._subscription.dispose();\n    96\u2192\t}\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192\tprivate _update(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n    99\u2192\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n   100\u2192\t\t\tconst oldStats = this._data.get(resource);\n   101\u2192\t\t\tif (oldStats) {\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._substract(oldStats);\n   103\u2192\t\t\t}\n   104\u2192\t\t\tconst newStats = this._resourceStats(resource);\n   105\u2192\t\t\tthis._add(newStats);\n   106\u2192\t\t\tthis._data.set(resource, newStats);\n   107\u2192\t\t}\n   108\u2192\t}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192\tprivate _resourceStats(resource: URI): MarkerStatistics {\n   111\u2192\t\tconst result: MarkerStatistics = { errors: 0, warnings: 0, infos: 0, unknowns: 0 };\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192\t\t// TODO this is a hack\n   114\u2192\t\tif (unsupportedSchemas.has(resource.scheme)) {\n   115\u2192\t\t\treturn result;\n   116\u2192\t\t}\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192\t\tfor (const { severity } of this._service.read({ resource })) {\n   119\u2192\t\t\tif (severity === MarkerSeverity.Error) {\n   120\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.errors += 1;\n   121\u2192\t\t\t} else if (severity === MarkerSeverity.Warning) {\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.warnings += 1;\n   123\u2192\t\t\t} else if (severity === MarkerSeverity.Info) {\n   124\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.infos += 1;\n   125\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   126\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.unknowns += 1;\n   127\u2192\t\t\t}\n   128\u2192\t\t}\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192\t\treturn result;\n   131\u2192\t}\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192\tprivate _substract(op: MarkerStatistics) {\n   134\u2192\t\tthis.errors -= op.errors;\n   135\u2192\t\tthis.warnings -= op.warnings;\n   136\u2192\t\tthis.infos -= op.infos;\n   137\u2192\t\tthis.unknowns -= op.unknowns;\n   138\u2192\t}\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\tprivate _add(op: MarkerStatistics) {\n   141\u2192\t\tthis.errors += op.errors;\n   142\u2192\t\tthis.warnings += op.warnings;\n   143\u2192\t\tthis.infos += op.infos;\n   144\u2192\t\tthis.unknowns += op.unknowns;\n   145\u2192\t}\n   146\u2192}\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192export class MarkerService implements IMarkerService {\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192\tdeclare readonly _serviceBrand: undefined;\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192\tprivate readonly _onMarkerChanged = new DebounceEmitter<readonly URI[]>({\n   153\u2192\t\tdelay: 0,\n   154\u2192\t\tmerge: MarkerService._merge\n   155\u2192\t});\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192\treadonly onMarkerChanged = this._onMarkerChanged.event;\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192\tprivate readonly _data = new DoubleResourceMap<IMarker[]>();\n   160\u2192\tprivate readonly _stats = new MarkerStats(this);\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192\tdispose(): void {\n   163\u2192\t\tthis._stats.dispose();\n   164\u2192\t\tthis._onMarkerChanged.dispose();\n   165\u2192\t}\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192\tgetStatistics(): MarkerStatistics {\n   168\u2192\t\treturn this._stats;\n   169\u2192\t}\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192\tremove(owner: string, resources: URI[]): void {\n   172\u2192\t\tfor (const resource of resources || []) {\n   173\u2192\t\t\tthis.changeOne(owner, resource, []);\n   174\u2192\t\t}\n   175\u2192\t}\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192\tchangeOne(owner: string, resource: URI, markerData: IMarkerData[]): void {\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192\t\tif (isFalsyOrEmpty(markerData)) {\n   180\u2192\t\t\t// remove marker for this (owner,resource)-tuple\n   181\u2192\t\t\tconst removed = this._data.delete(resource, owner);\n   182\u2192\t\t\tif (removed) {\n   183\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._onMarkerChanged.fire([resource]);\n   184\u2192\t\t\t}\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192\t\t} else {\n   187\u2192\t\t\t// insert marker for this (owner,resource)-tuple\n   188\u2192\t\t\tconst markers: IMarker[] = [];\n   189\u2192\t\t\tfor (const data of markerData) {\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\tconst marker = MarkerService._toMarker(owner, resource, data);\n   191\u2192\t\t\t\tif (marker) {\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\t\tmarkers.push(marker);\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   194\u2192\t\t\t}\n   195\u2192\t\t\tthis._data.set(resource, owner, markers);\n   196\u2192\t\t\tthis._onMarkerChanged.fire([resource]);\n   197\u2192\t\t}\n   198\u2192\t}\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192\tprivate static _toMarker(owner: string, resource: URI, data: IMarkerData): IMarker | undefined {\n   201\u2192\t\tlet {\n   202\u2192\t\t\tcode, severity,\n   203\u2192\t\t\tmessage, source,\n   204\u2192\t\t\tstartLineNumber, startColumn, endLineNumber, endColumn,\n   205\u2192\t\t\trelatedInformation,\n   206\u2192\t\t\ttags,\n   207\u2192\t\t} = data;\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192\t\tif (!message) {\n   210\u2192\t\t\treturn undefined;\n   211\u2192\t\t}\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192\t\t// santize data\n   214\u2192\t\tstartLineNumber = startLineNumber > 0 ? startLineNumber : 1;\n   215\u2192\t\tstartColumn = startColumn > 0 ? startColumn : 1;\n   216\u2192\t\tendLineNumber = endLineNumber >= startLineNumber ? endLineNumber : startLineNumber;\n   217\u2192\t\tendColumn = endColumn > 0 ? endColumn : startColumn;\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192\t\treturn {\n   220\u2192\t\t\tresource,\n   221\u2192\t\t\towner,\n   222\u2192\t\t\tcode,\n   223\u2192\t\t\tseverity,\n   224\u2192\t\t\tmessage,\n   225\u2192\t\t\tsource,\n   226\u2192\t\t\tstartLineNumber,\n   227\u2192\t\t\tstartColumn,\n   228\u2192\t\t\tendLineNumber,\n   229\u2192\t\t\tendColumn,\n   230\u2192\t\t\trelatedInformation,\n   231\u2192\t\t\ttags,\n   232\u2192\t\t};\n   233\u2192\t}\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192\tchangeAll(owner: string, data: IResourceMarker[]): void {\n   236\u2192\t\tconst changes: URI[] = [];\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192\t\t// remove old marker\n   239\u2192\t\tconst existing = this._data.values(owner);\n   240\u2192\t\tif (existing) {\n   241\u2192\t\t\tfor (const data of existing) {\n   242\u2192\t\t\t\tconst first = Iterable.first(data);\n   243\u2192\t\t\t\tif (first) {\n   244\u2192\t\t\t\t\tchanges.push(first.resource);\n   245\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._data.delete(first.resource, owner);\n   246\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   247\u2192\t\t\t}\n   248\u2192\t\t}\n   249\u2192\n   250\u2192\t\t// add new markers\n   251\u2192\t\tif (isNonEmptyArray(data)) {\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192\t\t\t// group by resource\n   254\u2192\t\t\tconst groups = new ResourceMap<IMarker[]>();\n   255\u2192\t\t\tfor (const { resource, marker: markerData } of data) {\n   256\u2192\t\t\t\tconst marker = MarkerService._toMarker(owner, resource, markerData);\n   257\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!marker) {\n   258\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// filter bad markers\n   259\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   260\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   261\u2192\t\t\t\tconst array = groups.get(resource);\n   262\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!array) {\n   263\u2192\t\t\t\t\tgroups.set(resource, [marker]);\n   264\u2192\t\t\t\t\tchanges.push(resource);\n   265\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   266\u2192\t\t\t\t\tarray.push(marker);\n   267\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   268\u2192\t\t\t}\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192\t\t\t// insert all\n   271\u2192\t\t\tfor (const [resource, value] of groups) {\n   272\u2192\t\t\t\tthis._data.set(resource, owner, value);\n   273\u2192\t\t\t}\n   274\u2192\t\t}\n   275\u2192\n   276\u2192\t\tif (changes.length > 0) {\n   277\u2192\t\t\tthis._onMarkerChanged.fire(changes);\n   278\u2192\t\t}\n   279\u2192\t}\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192\tread(filter: { owner?: string; resource?: URI; severities?: number; take?: number } = Object.create(null)): IMarker[] {\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192\t\tlet { owner, resource, severities, take } = filter;\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192\t\tif (!take || take < 0) {\n   286\u2192\t\t\ttake = -1;\n   287\u2192\t\t}\n   288\u2192\n   289\u2192\t\tif (owner && resource) {\n   290\u2192\t\t\t// exactly one owner AND resource\n   291\u2192\t\t\tconst data = this._data.get(resource, owner);\n   292\u2192\t\t\tif (!data) {\n   293\u2192\t\t\t\treturn [];\n   294\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   295\u2192\t\t\t\tconst result: IMarker[] = [];\n   296\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of data) {\n   297\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (MarkerService._accept(marker, severities)) {\n   298\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst newLen = result.push(marker);\n   299\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (take > 0 && newLen === take) {\n   300\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   301\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   302\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   303\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   304\u2192\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   305\u2192\t\t\t}\n   306\u2192\n   307\u2192\t\t} else if (!owner && !resource) {\n   308\u2192\t\t\t// all\n   309\u2192\t\t\tconst result: IMarker[] = [];\n   310\u2192\t\t\tfor (const markers of this._data.values()) {\n   311\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const data of markers) {\n   312\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (MarkerService._accept(data, severities)) {\n   313\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst newLen = result.push(data);\n   314\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (take > 0 && newLen === take) {\n   315\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   316\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   317\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   318\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   319\u2192\t\t\t}\n   320\u2192\t\t\treturn result;\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192\t\t} else {\n   323\u2192\t\t\t// of one resource OR owner\n   324\u2192\t\t\tconst iterable = this._data.values(resource ?? owner!);\n   325\u2192\t\t\tconst result: IMarker[] = [];\n   326\u2192\t\t\tfor (const markers of iterable) {\n   327\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const data of markers) {\n   328\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (MarkerService._accept(data, severities)) {\n   329\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst newLen = result.push(data);\n   330\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (take > 0 && newLen === take) {\n   331\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   332\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   333\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   334\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   335\u2192\t\t\t}\n   336\u2192\t\t\treturn result;\n   337\u2192\t\t}\n   338\u2192\t}\n   339\u2192\n   340\u2192\tprivate static _accept(marker: IMarker, severities?: number): boolean {\n   341\u2192\t\treturn severities === undefined || (severities & marker.severity) === marker.severity;\n   342\u2192\t}\n   343\u2192\n   344\u2192\t// --- event debounce logic\n   345\u2192\n   346\u2192\tprivate static _merge(all: (readonly URI[])[]): URI[] {\n   347\u2192\t\tconst set = new ResourceMap<boolean>();\n   348\u2192\t\tfor (const array of all) {\n   349\u2192\t\t\tfor (const item of array) {\n   350\u2192\t\t\t\tset.set(item, true);\n   351\u2192\t\t\t}\n   352\u2192\t\t}\n   353\u2192\t\treturn Array.from(set.keys());\n   354\u2192\t}\n   355\u2192}\n   356\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

providers\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192export const IFileService = createDecorator<IFileService>('fileService');\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192export interface IFileService {\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192\treadonly _serviceBrand: undefined;\n    31\u2192\n    32\u2192\t/**\n    33\u2192\t * An event that is fired when a file system provider is added or removed\n    34\u2192\t */\n    35\u2192\treadonly onDidChangeFileSystemProviderRegistrations: Event<IFileSystemProviderRegistrationEvent>;\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192\t/**\n    38\u2192\t * An event that is fired when a registered file system provider changes its capabilities.\n    39\u2192\t */\n    40\u2192\treadonly onDidChangeFileSystemProviderCapabilities: Event<IFileSystemProviderCapabilitiesChangeEvent>;\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\t/**\n    43\u2192\t * An event that is fired when a file system provider is about to be activated. Listeners\n    44\u2192\t * can join this event with a long running promise to help in the activation process.\n    45\u2192\t */\n    46\u2192\treadonly onWillActivateFileSystemProvider: Event<IFileSystemProviderActivationEvent>;\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192\t/**\n    49\u2192\t * Registers a file system provider for a certain scheme.\n    50\u2192\t */\n    51\u2192\tregisterProvider(scheme: string, provider: IFileSystemProvider): IDisposable;\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192\t/**\n    54\u2192\t * Returns a file system provider for a certain scheme.\n    55\u2192\t */\n    56\u2192\tgetProvider(scheme: string): IFileSystemProvider | undefined;\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192\t/**\n    59\u2192\t * Tries to activate a provider with the given scheme.\n    60\u2192\t */\n    61\u2192\tactivateProvider(scheme: string): Promise<void>;\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192\t/**\n    64\u2192\t * Checks if this file service can handle the given resource by\n    65\u2192\t * first activating any extension that wants to be activated\n    66\u2192\t * on the provided resource scheme to include extensions that\n    67\u2192\t * contribute file system providers for the given resource.\n    68\u2192\t */\n    69\u2192\tcanHandleResource(resource: URI): Promise<boolean>;\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192\t/**\n    72\u2192\t * Checks if the file service has a registered provider for the\n    73\u2192\t * provided resource.\n    74\u2192\t *\n    75\u2192\t * Note: this does NOT account for contributed providers from\n    76\u2192\t * extensions that have not been activated yet. To include those,\n    77\u2192\t * consider to call `await fileService.canHandleResource(resource)`.\n    78\u2192\t */\n    79\u2192\thasProvider(resource: URI): boolean;\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192\t/**\n    82\u2192\t * Checks if the provider for the provided resource has the provided file system capability.\n    83\u2192\t */\n    84\u2192\thasCapability(resource: URI, capability: FileSystemProviderCapabilities): boolean;\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192\t/**\n    87\u2192\t * List the schemes and capabilities for registered file system providers\n    88\u2192\t */\n    89\u2192\tlistCapabilities(): Iterable<{ scheme: string; capabilities: FileSystemProviderCapabilities }>;\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192\t/**\n    92\u2192\t * Allows to listen for file changes. The event will fire for every file within the opened workspace\n    93\u2192\t * (if any) as well as all files that have been watched explicitly using the #watch() API.\n    94\u2192\t */\n    95\u2192\treadonly onDidFilesChange: Event<FileChangesEvent>;\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192\t/**\n    98\u2192\t * An event that is fired upon successful completion of a certain file operation.\n    99\u2192\t */\n   100\u2192\treadonly onDidRunOperation: Event<FileOperationEvent>;\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

'../../userDataProfile/common/userDataProfile.js';\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192export interface DidChangeProfileExtensionsEvent {\n    22\u2192\treadonly added?: { readonly extensions: readonly IExtensionIdentifier[]; readonly profileLocation: URI };\n    23\u2192\treadonly removed?: { readonly extensions: readonly IExtensionIdentifier[]; readonly profileLocation: URI };\n    24\u2192}\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192export class ExtensionsWatcher extends Disposable {\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192\tprivate readonly _onDidChangeExtensionsByAnotherSource = this._register(new Emitter<DidChangeProfileExtensionsEvent>());\n    29\u2192\treadonly onDidChangeExtensionsByAnotherSource = this._onDidChangeExtensionsByAnotherSource.event;\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192\tprivate readonly allExtensions = new Map<string, ResourceSet>;\n    32\u2192\tprivate readonly extensionsProfileWatchDisposables = this._register(new DisposableMap<string>());\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192\tconstructor(\n    35\u2192\t\tprivate readonly extensionManagementService: INativeServerExtensionManagementService,\n    36\u2192\t\tprivate readonly extensionsScannerService: IExtensionsScannerService,\n    37\u2192\t\tprivate readonly userDataProfilesService: IUserDataProfilesService,\n    38\u2192\t\tprivate readonly extensionsProfileScannerService: IExtensionsProfileScannerService,\n    39\u2192\t\tprivate readonly uriIdentityService: IUriIdentityService,\n    40\u2192\t\tprivate readonly fileService: IFileService,\n    41\u2192\t\tprivate readonly logService: ILogService,\n    42\u2192\t) {\n    43\u2192\t\tsuper();\n    44\u2192\t\tthis.initialize().then(null, error => logService.error('Error while initializing Extensions Watcher', getErrorMessage(error)));\n    45\u2192\t}\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192\tprivate async initialize(): Promise<void> {\n    48\u2192\t\tawait this.extensionsScannerService.initializeDefaultProfileExtensions();\n    49\u2192\t\tawait this.onDidChangeProfiles(this.userDataProfilesService.profiles);\n    50\u2192\t\tthis.registerListeners();\n    51\u2192\t\tawait this.uninstallExtensionsNotInProfiles();\n    52\u2192\t}\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192\tprivate registerListeners(): void {\n    55\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.userDataProfilesService.onDidChangeProfiles(e => this.onDidChangeProfiles(e.added)));\n    56\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.extensionsProfileScannerService.onAddExtensions(e => this.onAddExtensions(e)));\n    57\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.extensionsProfileScannerService.onDidAddExtensions(e => this.onDidAddExtensions(e)));\n    58\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.extensionsProfileScannerService.onRemoveExtensions(e => this.onRemoveExtensions(e)));\n    59\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.extensionsProfileScannerService.onDidRemoveExtensions(e => this.onDidRemoveExtensions(e)));\n    60\u2192\t\tthis._register(this.fileService.onDidFilesChange(e => this.onDidFilesChange(e)));\n    61\u2192\t}\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192\tprivate async onDidChangeProfiles(added: readonly IUserDataProfile[]): Promise<void> {\n    64\u2192\t\ttry {\n    65\u2192\t\t\tif (added.length) {\n    66\u2192\t\t\t\tawait Promise.all(added.map(profile => {\n    67\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.extensionsProfileWatchDisposables.set(profile.id, combinedDisposable(\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.fileService.watch(this.uriIdentityService.extUri.dirname(profile.extensionsResource)),\n    69\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// Also listen to the resource incase the resource is a symlink - https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/118134\n    70\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.fileService.watch(profile.extensionsResource)\n    71\u2192\t\t\t\t\t));\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn this.populateExtensionsFromProfile(profile.extensionsResource);\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\t}));\n    74\u2192\t\t\t}\n    75\u2192\t\t} catch (error) {\n    76\u2192\t\t\tthis.logService.error(error);\n    77\u2192\t\t\tthrow error;\n    78\u2192\t\t}\n    79\u2192\t}\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192\tprivate async onAddExtensions(e: ProfileExtensionsEvent): Promise<void> {\n    82\u2192\t\tfor (const extension of e.extensions) {\n    83\u2192\t\t\tthis.addExtensionWithKey(this.getKey(extension.identifier, extension.version), e.profileLocation);\n    84\u2192\t\t}\n    85\u2192\t}\n    86\u2192\n this.getKey(extension.identifier, extension.version);\n    90\u2192\t\t\tif (e.error) {\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.removeExtensionWithKey(key, e.profileLocation);\n    92\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n    93\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.addExtensionWithKey(key, e.profileLocation);\n    94\u2192\t\t\t}\n    95\u2192\t\t}\n    96\u2192\t}\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192\tprivate async onRemoveExtensions(e: ProfileExtensionsEvent): Promise<void> {\n    99\u2192\t\tfor (const extension of e.extensions) {\n   100\u2192\t\t\tthis.removeExtensionWithKey(this.getKey(extension.identifier, extension.version), e.profileLocation);\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. "   497\u2192export interface IWatchOptionsWithoutCorrelation {\n   498\u2192\n   499\u2192\t/**\n   500\u2192\t * Set to `true` to watch for changes recursively in a folder\n   501\u2192\t * and all of its children.\n   502\u2192\t */\n   503\u2192\trecursive: boolean;\n   504\u2192\n   505\u2192\t/**\n   506\u2192\t * A set of glob patterns or paths to exclude from watching.\n   507\u2192\t * Paths can be relative or absolute and when relative are\n   508\u2192\t * resolved against the watched folder. Glob patterns are\n   509\u2192\t * always matched relative to the watched folder.\n   510\u2192\t */\n   511\u2192\texcludes: string[];\n   512\u2192\n   513\u2192\t/**\n   514\u2192\t * An optional set of glob patterns or paths to include for\n   515\u2192\t * watching. If not provided, all paths are considered for\n   516\u2192\t * events.\n   517\u2192\t * Paths can be relative or absolute and when relative are\n   518\u2192\t * resolved against the watched folder. Glob patterns are\n   519\u2192\t * always matched relative to the watched folder.\n   520\u2192\t */\n   521\u2192\tincludes?: Array<string | IRelativePattern>;\n   522\u2192\n   523\u2192\t/**\n   524\u2192\t * If provided, allows to filter the events that the watcher should consider\n   525\u2192\t * for emitting. If not provided, all events are emitted.\n   526\u2192\t *\n   527\u2192\t * For example, to emit added and updated events, set to:\n   528\u2192\t * `FileChangeFilter.ADDED | FileChangeFilter.UPDATED`.\n   529\u2192\t */\n   530\u2192\tfilter?: FileChangeFilter;\n   531\u2192}\n   532\u2192\n   533\u2192export interface IWatchOptions extends IWatchOptionsWithoutCorrelation {\n   534\u2192\n   535\u2192\t/**\n   536\u2192\t * If provided, file change events from the watcher that\n   537\u2192\t * are a result of this watch request will carry the same\n   538\u2192\t * id.\n   539\u2192\t */\n   540\u2192\treadonly correlationId?: number;\n   541\u2192}\n   542\u2192\n   543\u2192export const enum FileChangeFilter {\n   544\u2192\tUPDATED = 1 << 1,\n   545\u2192\tADDED = 1 << 2,\n   546\u2192\tDELETED = 1 << 3\n   547\u2192}\n   548\u2192\n   549\u2192export interface IWatchOptionsWithCorrelation extends IWatchOptions {\n   550\u2192\treadonly correlationId: number;\n   551\u2192}\n   552\u2192\n   553\u2192export interface IFileSystemWatcher extends IDisposable {\n   554\u2192\n   555\u2192\t/**\n   556\u2192\t * An event which fires on file/folder change only for changes\n   557\u2192\t * that correlate to the watch request with matching correlation\n   558\u2192\t * identifier.\n   559\u2192\t */\n   560\u2192\treadonly onDidChange: Event<FileChangesEvent>;\n   561\u2192}\n   562\u2192\n   563\u2192export function isFileSystemWatcher(thing: unknown): thing is IFileSystemWatcher {\n   564\u2192\tconst candidate = thing as IFileSystemWatcher | undefined;\n   565\u2192\n   566\u2192\treturn !!candidate && typeof candidate.onDidChange === 'function';\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

  "file_path": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts"

Output
"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n     3\u2192 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\n     7\u2192import { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\n     8\u2192import { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\n     9\u2192import { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\n    10\u2192import { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\n    11\u2192import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\n    12\u2192import { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics)\n    15\u2192export class MainThreadDiagnostics implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192\tprivate readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;\n    20\u2192\tprivate readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;\n    21\u2192\tprivate readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192\tconstructor(\n    24\u2192\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n    25\u2192\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,\n    26\u2192\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n    27\u2192\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n    28\u2192\t) {\n    29\u2192\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n    32\u2192\t\tthis._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);\n    33\u2192\t}\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192\tdispose(): void {\n    36\u2192\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n    37\u2192\t\tthis._fileListener.dispose();\n    38\u2192\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n    39\u2192\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n    40\u2192\t}\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n    43\u2192\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n    44\u2192\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n    45\u2192\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n    46\u2192\t\t\tif (allMarkerData.length === 0) {\n    47\u2192\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, []]);\n    48\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n    49\u2192\t\t\t\tconst forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));\n    50\u2192\t\t\t\tif (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {\n    51\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);\n    52\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    53\u2192\t\t\t}\n    54\u2192\t\t}\n    55\u2192\t\tif (data.length > 0) {\n    56\u2192\t\t\tthis._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);\n    57\u2192\t\t}\n    58\u2192\t}\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n    61\u2192\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted\n    62\u2192\t\tfor (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {\n    63\u2192\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);\n    64\u2192\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n    65\u2192\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n    66\u2192\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners\n    67\u2192\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n    69\u2192\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n    70\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    71\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    74\u2192\t\t\t}\n    75\u2192\t\t}\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis\n    78\u2192\t\t// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed\n    79\u2192\t\tfor (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {\n    80\u2192\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);\n    81\u2192\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n    82\u2192\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n    83\u2192\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis\n    84\u2192\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n    87\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    88\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    91\u2192\t\t\t}\n    92\u2192\t\t}\n    93\u2192\t}\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n    96\u2192\t\tfor (const entry of entries) {\n    97\u2192\t\t\tconst [uri, markers] = entry;\n    98\u2192\t\t\tif (markers) {\n    99\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n   100\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.relatedInformation) {\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const relatedInformation of marker.relatedInformation) {\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\trelatedInformation.resource = URI.revive(relatedInformation.resource);\n   103\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.code && typeof marker.code !== 'string') {\n   106\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmarker.code.target = URI.revive(marker.code.target);\n   107\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   108\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   109\u2192\t\t\t}\n   110\u2192\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(URI.revive(uri)), markers);\n   111\u2192\t\t}\n   112\u2192\t\tthis._activeOwners.add(owner);\n   113\u2192\t}\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n   116\u2192\t\tthis._markerService.changeAll(owner, []);\n   117\u2192\t\tthis._activeOwners.delete(owner);\n   118\u2192\t}\n   119\u2192}\n   120\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

  "newString": "import { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\nimport { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\nimport { Delayer } from '../../../base/common/async.js';",
  "oldString": "import { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\nimport { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';",
  "originalFile": "/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\nimport { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\n\n@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics)\nexport class MainThreadDiagnostics implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n\n\tprivate readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();\n\n\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;\n\tprivate readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;\n\tprivate readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;\n\n\tconstructor(\n\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,\n\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n\t) {\n\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n\n\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n\t\tthis._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);\n\t}\n\n\tdispose(): void {\n\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._fileListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n\t\t\tif (allMarkerData.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, []]);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tconst forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));\n\t\t\t\tif (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (data.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted\n\t\tfor (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed\n\t\tfor (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n\t\tfor (const entry of entries) {\n\t\t\tconst [uri, markers] = entry;\n\t\t\tif (markers) {\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const relatedInformation of marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trelatedInformation.resource = URI.revive(relatedInformation.resource);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.code && typeof marker.code !== 'string') {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmarker.code.target = URI.revive(marker.code.target);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(URI.revive(uri)), markers);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.add(owner);\n\t}\n\n\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n\t\tthis._markerService.changeAll(owner, []);\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.delete(owner);\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

      ],

IDisposable;\n\tprivate readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;\n\n\tconstructor(\n\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,\n\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n\t) {\n\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n\n\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n\t\tthis._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);\n\t}\n\n\tdispose(): void {\n\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._fileListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n\t\t\tif (allMarkerData.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, []]);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tconst forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));\n\t\t\t\tif (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (data.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted\n\t\tfor (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed\n\t\tfor (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n\t\tfor (const entry of entries) {\n\t\t\tconst [uri, markers] = entry;\n\t\t\tif (markers) {\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const relatedInformation of marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trelatedInformation.resource = URI.revive(relatedInformation.resource);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.code && typeof marker.code !== 'string') {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmarker.code.target = URI.revive(marker.code.target);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(URI.revive(uri)), markers);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.add(owner);\n\t}\n\n\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n\t\tthis._markerService.changeAll(owner, []);\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.delete(owner);\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   private readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;",
        "   private readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;",
        "   private readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;",
        "+  private readonly _fileChangeDelayer = new Delayer<void>(100);",
        "+  private _pendingFileChanges: { deleted: URI[]; updated: URI[] } = { deleted: [], updated: [] };",
        " ",
        "   constructor(",
        "     extHostContext: IExtHostContext,"
      ],
      "newLines": 8,
      "newStart": 20,

    }
  ],

ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\nimport { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\nimport { Delayer } from '../../../base/common/async.js';\n\n@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics)\nexport class MainThreadDiagnostics implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n\n\tprivate readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();\n\n\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;\n\tprivate readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;\n\tprivate readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;\n\tprivate readonly _fileChangeDelayer = new Delayer<void>(100);\n\tprivate _pendingFileChanges: { deleted: URI[]; updated: URI[] } = { deleted: [], updated: [] };\n\n\tconstructor(\n\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,\n\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n\t) {\n\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n\n\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n\t\tthis._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);\n\t}\n\n\tdispose(): void {\n\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._fileListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n\t\t\tif (allMarkerData.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, []]);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tconst forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));\n\t\t\t\tif (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (data.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted\n\t\tfor (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed\n\t\tfor (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) 130. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts",
  "new_string": "\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Batch file changes with debouncing to avoid excessive processing during bulk operations like Git branch switch\n\t\tif (event.rawDeleted.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges.deleted.push(...event.rawDeleted);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (event.rawUpdated.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges.updated.push(...event.rawUpdated);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Trigger debounced batch processing\n\t\tthis._fileChangeDelayer.trigger(async () => this._clearPendingDiagnostics());\n\t}\n\n\tprivate async _clearPendingDiagnostics(): Promise<void> {\n\t\tconst deleted = this._pendingFileChanges.deleted;\n\t\tconst updated = this._pendingFileChanges.updated;\n\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges = { deleted: [], updated: [] };\n\n\t\ttry {\n\t\t\t// Clear diagnostics for deleted files\n\t\t\tthis._clearDiagnosticsForUris(deleted);\n\t\t\t// Clear diagnostics for updated files to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\tthis._clearDiagnosticsForUris(updated);\n\t\t} catch (error) {\n\t\t\t// Log error but don't crash - file changes should not break diagnostics system\n\t\t\tconsole.error('Error clearing diagnostics for file changes:', error);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _clearDiagnosticsForUris(uris: URI[]): void {\n\t\tfor (const uri of uris) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(uri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Collect unique owners and clear diagnostics for each\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}",
  "old_string": "\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted\n\t\tfor (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed\n\t\tfor (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "newString": "\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Batch file changes with debouncing to avoid excessive processing during bulk operations like Git branch switch\n\t\tif (event.rawDeleted.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges.deleted.push(...event.rawDeleted);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (event.rawUpdated.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges.updated.push(...event.rawUpdated);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Trigger debounced batch processing\n\t\tthis._fileChangeDelayer.trigger(async () => this._clearPendingDiagnostics());\n\t}\n\n\tprivate async _clearPendingDiagnostics(): Promise<void> {\n\t\tconst deleted = this._pendingFileChanges.deleted;\n\t\tconst updated = this._pendingFileChanges.updated;\n\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges = { deleted: [], updated: [] };\n\n\t\ttry {\n\t\t\t// Clear diagnostics for deleted files\n\t\t\tthis._clearDiagnosticsForUris(deleted);\n\t\t\t// Clear diagnostics for updated files to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\tthis._clearDiagnosticsForUris(updated);\n\t\t} catch (error) {\n\t\t\t// Log error but don't crash - file changes should not break diagnostics system\n\t\t\tconsole.error('Error clearing diagnostics for file changes:', error);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _clearDiagnosticsForUris(uris: URI[]): void {\n\t\tfor (const uri of uris) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(uri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Collect unique owners and clear diagnostics for each\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}",

See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed\n\t\tfor (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n\t\tfor (const entry of entries) {\n\t\t\tconst [uri, markers] = entry;\n\t\t\tif (markers) {\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const relatedInformation of marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trelatedInformation.resource = URI.revive(relatedInformation.resource);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.code && typeof marker.code !== 'string') {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmarker.code.target = URI.revive(marker.code.target);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(URI.revive(uri)), markers);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.add(owner);\n\t}\n\n\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n\t\tthis._markerService.changeAll(owner, []);\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.delete(owner);\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   }",
        " ",
        "   private _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {",
        "-    // Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted",
        "-    for (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {",
        "-      const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);",
        "-      const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });",
        "-      if (markers.length > 0) {",
        "-        // Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners",
        "-        const owners = new Set<string>();",
        "-        for (const marker of markers) {",
        "-          owners.add(marker.owner);",
        "-        }",
        "-        for (const owner of owners) {",
        "-          this._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);",
        "-        }",
        "-      }",
        "+    // Batch file changes with debouncing to avoid excessive processing during bulk operations like Git branch switch",
        "+    if (event.rawDeleted.length > 0) {",
        "+      this._pendingFileChanges.deleted.push(...event.rawDeleted);",
        "     }",
        "+    if (event.rawUpdated.length > 0) {",
        "+      this._pendingFileChanges.updated.push(...event.rawUpdated);",
        "+    }",
        " ",
        "-    // Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis",
        "-    // This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed",
        "-    for (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {",
        "-      const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);",
        "+    // Trigger debounced batch processing",
        "+    this._fileChangeDelayer.trigger(async () => this._clearPendingDiagnostics());",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  private async _clearPendingDiagnostics(): Promise<void> {",
        "+    const deleted = this._pendingFileChanges.deleted;",
        "+    const updated = this._pendingFileChanges.updated;",
        "+    this._pendingFileChanges = { deleted: [], updated: [] };",
        "+",
        "+    try {",
        "+      // Clear diagnostics for deleted files",
        "+      this._clearDiagnosticsForUris(deleted);",
        "+      // Clear diagnostics for updated files to trigger re-analysis",
        "+      this._clearDiagnosticsForUris(updated);",
        "+    } catch (error) {",
        "+      // Log error but don't crash - file changes should not break diagnostics system",
        "+      console.error('Error clearing diagnostics for file changes:', error);",
        "+    }",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  private _clearDiagnosticsForUris(uris: URI[]): void {",
        "+    for (const uri of uris) {",
        "+      const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(uri);",
        "       const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });",
        "       if (markers.length > 0) {",
        "-        // Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis",
        "+        // Collect unique owners and clear diagnostics for each",
        "         const owners = new Set<string>();",
        "         for (const marker of markers) {",
        "           owners.add(marker.owner);"
      ],
      "newLines": 40,
      "newStart": 62,
      "oldLines": 29,
      "oldStart": 62
    }

131. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';\nimport { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\nimport { Delayer } from '../../../base/common/async.js';\n\n@extHostNamedCustomer(MainContext.MainThreadDiagnostics)\nexport class MainThreadDiagnostics implements MainThreadDiagnosticsShape {\n\n\tprivate readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();\n\n\tprivate readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;\n\tprivate readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;\n\tprivate readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;\n\tprivate readonly _fileChangeDelayer = new Delayer<void>(100);\n\tprivate _pendingFileChanges: { deleted: URI[]; updated: URI[] } = { deleted: [], updated: [] };\n\n\tconstructor(\n\t\textHostContext: IExtHostContext,\n\t\t@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,\n\t\t@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,\n\t\t@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,\n\t) {\n\t\tthis._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);\n\n\t\tthis._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);\n\t\tthis._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);\n\t}\n\n\tdispose(): void {\n\t\tthis._markerListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._fileListener.dispose();\n\t\tthis._fileChangeDelayer.dispose();\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.clear();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {\n\t\tconst data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];\n\t\tfor (const resource of resources) {\n\t\t\tconst allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });\n\t\t\tif (allMarkerData.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, []]);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tconst forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));\n\t\t\t\tif (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdata.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (data.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {\n\t\t// Batch file changes with debouncing to avoid excessive processing during bulk operations like Git branch switch\n\t\tif (event.rawDeleted.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges.deleted.push(...event.rawDeleted);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (event.rawUpdated.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges.updated.push(...event.rawUpdated);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Trigger debounced batch processing\n\t\tthis._fileChangeDelayer.trigger(async () => this._clearPendingDiagnostics());\n\t}\n\n\tprivate async _clearPendingDiagnostics(): Promise<void> {\n\t\tconst deleted = this._pendingFileChanges.deleted;\n\t\tconst updated = this._pendingFileChanges.updated;\n\t\tthis._pendingFileChanges = { deleted: [], updated: [] };\n\n\t\ttry {\n\t\t\t// Clear diagnostics for deleted files\n\t\t\tthis._clearDiagnosticsForUris(deleted);\n\t\t\t// Clear diagnostics for updated files to trigger re-analysis\n\t\t\tthis._clearDiagnosticsForUris(updated);\n\t\t} catch (error) {\n\t\t\t// Log error but don't crash - file changes should not break diagnostics system\n\t\t\tconsole.error('Error clearing diagnostics for file changes:', error);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tprivate _clearDiagnosticsForUris(uris: URI[]): void {\n\t\tfor (const uri of uris) {\n\t\t\tconst canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(uri);\n\t\t\tconst markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });\n\t\t\tif (markers.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t// Collect unique owners and clear diagnostics for each\n\t\t\t\tconst owners = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\towners.add(marker.owner);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor (const owner of owners) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t$changeMany(owner: string, entries: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]): void {\n\t\tfor (const entry of entries) {\n\t\t\tconst [uri, markers] = entry;\n\t\t\tif (markers) {\n\t\t\t\tfor (const marker of markers) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const relatedInformation of marker.relatedInformation) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trelatedInformation.resource = URI.revive(relatedInformation.resource);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (marker.code && typeof marker.code !== 'string') {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmarker.code.target = URI.revive(marker.code.target);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tthis._markerService.changeOne(owner, this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(URI.revive(uri)), markers);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.add(owner);\n\t}\n\n\t$clear(owner: string): void {\n\t\tthis._markerService.changeAll(owner, []);\n\t\tthis._activeOwners.delete(owner);\n\t}\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts",
    "numLines": 135,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 135
  },
  "type": "text"
}

See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport assert from 'assert';\nimport { timeout } from '../../../../base/common/async.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { runWithFakedTimers } from '../../../../base/test/common/timeTravelScheduler.js';\nimport { ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite } from '../../../../base/test/common/utils.js';\nimport { MarkerService } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markerService.js';\nimport { IMarkerData } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnostics } from '../../browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.js';\nimport { IExtHostContext } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { ExtensionHostKind } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extensionHostKind.js';\nimport { mock } from '../../../test/common/workbenchTestServices.js';\n\n\nsuite('MainThreadDiagnostics', function () {\n\n\tlet markerService: MarkerService;\n\n\tsetup(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService = new MarkerService();\n\t});\n\n\tteardown(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService.dispose();\n\t});\n\n\tensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite();\n\n\ttest('clear markers on dispose', function () {\n\n\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange() { }\n\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmarkerService,",

    "content": "\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[URI.file('a'), [{\n\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tmessage: 'fffff',\n\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t}]]]);\n\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 1);\n\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t});\n\n\ttest('OnDidChangeDiagnostics triggers twice on same diagnostics #136434', function () {\n\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tchangedData.push(data);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tconst markerDataStub = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'same_owner' }]]]);\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'forgein_owner' }]);\n\n\t\t\t// added one marker via the API and one via the ext host. the latter must not\n\t\t\t// trigger an event to the extension host\n\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 2);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0].length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0][0][1][0].message, 'forgein_owner');\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n\n\ttest('onDidChangeDiagnostics different behavior when \"extensionKind\" ui running on remote workspace #136955', function () {\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst markerData: IMarkerData = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me',\n\t\t\t\tmessage: 'message'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [markerData]);\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }",

See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport assert from 'assert';\nimport { timeout } from '../../../../base/common/async.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { runWithFakedTimers } from '../../../../base/test/common/timeTravelScheduler.js';\nimport { ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite } from '../../../../base/test/common/utils.js';\nimport { MarkerService } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markerService.js';\nimport { IMarkerData } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnostics } from '../../browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.js';\nimport { IExtHostContext } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { ExtensionHostKind } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extensionHostKind.js';\nimport { mock } from '../../../test/common/workbenchTestServices.js';\n\n\nsuite('MainThreadDiagnostics', function () {\n\n\tlet markerService: MarkerService;\n\n\tsetup(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService = new MarkerService();\n\t});\n\n\tteardown(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService.dispose();\n\t});\n\n\tensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite();\n\n\ttest('clear markers on dispose', function () {\n\n\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange() { }\n\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[URI.file('a'), [{\n\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tmessage: 'fffff',\n\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t}]]]);\n\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 1);\n\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t});\n\n\ttest('OnDidChangeDiagnostics triggers twice on same diagnostics #136434', function () {\n\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tchangedData.push(data);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tconst markerDataStub = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'same_owner' }]]]);\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'forgein_owner' }]);\n\n\t\t\t// added one marker via the API and one via the ext host. the latter must not\n\t\t\t// trigger an event to the extension host\n\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 2);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0].length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0][0][1][0].message, 'forgein_owner');\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n\n\ttest('onDidChangeDiagnostics different behavior when \"extensionKind\" ui running on remote workspace #136955', function () {\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst markerData: IMarkerData = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me',\n\t\t\t\tmessage: 'message'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [markerData]);\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tchangedData.push(data);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.$clear('bar');\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n});\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts",
    "numLines": 175,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 175
  },

}

}\n\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange() { }\n\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[URI.file('a'), [{\n\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tmessage: 'fffff',\n\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t}]]]);\n\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 1);\n\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t});\n\n\ttest('OnDidChangeDiagnostics triggers twice on same diagnostics #136434', function () {\n\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null;
