}\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tconst markerDataStub = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'same_owner' }]]]);\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'forgein_owner' }]);\n\n\t\t\t// added one marker via the API and one via the ext host. the latter must not\n\t\t\t// trigger an event to the extension host\n\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 2);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0].length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0][0][1][0].message, 'forgein_owner');\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n\n\ttest('onDidChangeDiagnostics different behavior when \"extensionKind\" ui running on remote workspace #136955', function () {\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst markerData: IMarkerData = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me',\n\t\t\t\tmessage: 'message'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [markerData]);\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.$clear('bar');\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n});\n",

  "originalFile": "/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport assert from 'assert';\nimport { timeout } from '../../../../base/common/async.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { runWithFakedTimers } from '../../../../base/test/common/timeTravelScheduler.js';\nimport { ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite } from '../../../../base/test/common/utils.js';\nimport { MarkerService } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markerService.js';\nimport { IMarkerData } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnostics } from '../../browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.js';\nimport { IExtHostContext } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { ExtensionHostKind } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extensionHostKind.js';\nimport { mock } from '../../../test/common/workbenchTestServices.js';\n\n\nsuite('MainThreadDiagnostics', function () {\n\n\tlet markerService: MarkerService;\n\n\tsetup(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService = new MarkerService();\n\t});\n\n\tteardown(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService.dispose();\n\t});\n\n\tensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite();\n\n\ttest('clear markers on dispose', function () {\n\n\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange() { }\n\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[URI.file('a'), [{\n\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\tmessage: 'fffff',\n\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t}]]]);\n\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 1);\n\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t});\n\n\ttest('OnDidChangeDiagnostics triggers twice on same diagnostics #136434', function () {\n\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tchangedData.push(data);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tconst markerDataStub = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'same_owner' }]]]);\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'forgein_owner' }]);\n\n\t\t\t// added one marker via the API and one via the ext host. the latter must not\n\t\t\t// trigger an event to the extension host\n\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 2);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0].length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0][0][1][0].message, 'forgein_owner');\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n\n\ttest('onDidChangeDiagnostics different behavior when \"extensionKind\" ui running on remote workspace #136955', function () {\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst markerData: IMarkerData = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me',\n\t\t\t\tmessage: 'message'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [markerData]);\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tchangedData.push(data);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.$clear('bar');\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n});\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "       markerService,",
        "       new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {",
        "         override asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }",
        "+      },",
        "+      new class extends mock<IFileService>() {",
        "+        override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });",
        "       }",
        "     );",
        " "
      ],
      "newLines": 9,
      "newStart": 51,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 51
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/fix_test.js << 'EOF'\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst path = '/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts';\nlet content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8');\n\n// Fix test 2\ncontent = content.replace(\n  /new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>\\(\\) \\{[\\s\\S]*?override asCanonicalUri\\(uri: URI\\) \\{ return uri; \\}\\s*\\}\\s*\\);[\\s]*const markerDataStub/,\n  `new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IFileService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tconst markerDataStub`\n);\n\n// Fix test 3\ncontent = content.replace(\n  /markerService\\.changeOne\\('bar', target, \\[markerData\\]\\);[\\s\\S]*?const diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics\\([\\s\\S]*?override asCanonicalUri\\(uri: URI\\) \\{ return uri; \\}\\s*\\}\\s*\\);[\\s]*diag\\.\\$clear\\('bar'\\);/,\n  (match) => {\n    return match.replace(\n      /new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>\\(\\) \\{[\\s\\S]*?override asCanonicalUri\\(uri: URI\\) \\{ return uri; \\}\\s*\\}\\s*\\);/,\n      `new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IFileService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);`\n    );\n  }\n);\n\nfs.writeFileSync(path, content);\nconsole.log('Fixed test file');\nEOF\nnode /tmp/fix_test.js\n"
}

    "content": "/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport assert from 'assert';\nimport { timeout } from '../../../../base/common/async.js';\nimport { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../../base/common/uri.js';\nimport { runWithFakedTimers } from '../../../../base/test/common/timeTravelScheduler.js';\nimport { ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite } from '../../../../base/test/common/utils.js';\nimport { MarkerService } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markerService.js';\nimport { IMarkerData } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';\nimport { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\nimport { MainThreadDiagnostics } from '../../browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.js';\nimport { IExtHostContext } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';\nimport { ExtensionHostKind } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extensionHostKind.js';\nimport { mock } from '../../../test/common/workbenchTestServices.js';\n\n\nsuite('MainThreadDiagnostics', function () {\n\n\tlet markerService: MarkerService;\n\n\tsetup(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService = new MarkerService();\n\t});\n\n\tteardown(function () {\n\t\tmarkerService.dispose();\n\t});\n\n\tensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite();\n\n\ttest('clear markers on dispose', function () {\n\n\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange() { }\n\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IFileService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tconst markerDataStub = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tdiag.$changeMany('foo', [[target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'same_owner' }]]]);\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'forgein_owner' }]);\n\n\t\t\t// added one marker via the API and one via the ext host. the latter must not\n\t\t\t// trigger an event to the extension host\n\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 2);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0].length, 1);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData[0][0][1][0].message, 'forgein_owner');\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n\n\ttest('onDidChangeDiagnostics different behavior when \"extensionKind\" ui running on remote workspace #136955', function () {\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst markerData: IMarkerData = {\n\t\t\t\tcode: '666',\n\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: 1,\n\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1,\n\t\t\t\tseverity: 1,\n\t\t\t\tsource: 'me',\n\t\t\t\tmessage: 'message'\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst target = URI.file('a');\n\t\t\tmarkerService.changeOne('bar', target, [markerData]);\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(\n\t\t\t\tnew class implements IExtHostContext {\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteAuthority = '';\n\t\t\t\t\textensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;\n\t\t\t\t\tdispose() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tassertRegistered() { }\n\t\t\t\t\tset(v: any): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t\tgetProxy(): any {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tchangedData.push(data);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tdrain(): any { return null; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tmarkerService,\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IFileService>() {\n\t\t\t\t\toverride onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.$clear('bar');\n\t\t\tawait timeout(0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t\t\tassert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);\n\n\t\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\t});\n\t});\n});\n",

151. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/fix_test.py << 'EOF'\nimport re\n\npath = '/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts'\nwith open(path, 'r') as f:\n    content = f.read()\n\n# Add import\nif 'import { IFileService }' not in content:\n    content = content.replace(\n        \"import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\",\n        \"import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../../platform/files/common/files.js';\"\n    )\n\n# Update each test to add IFileService mock\nmock_file_service = ''',\n\t\t\tnew class extends mock<IFileService>() {\n\t\t\t\toverride onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });\n\t\t\t}'''\n\n# Find all occurrences of \"}\" followed by newline followed by tabs and \");\" and add mock before it\ncontent = re.sub(\n    r'(new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>\\(\\) \\{\\s+override asCanonicalUri\\(uri: URI\\) \\{ return uri; \\}\\s+\\})\\s+\\);',\n    r'\\1' + mock_file_service + '\\n\\t\\t);',\n    content\n)\n\nwith open(path, 'w') as f:\n    f.write(content)\n\nprint('Fixed test file')\nEOF\npython3 /tmp/fix_test.py\n"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Fixed test file"
}

'me'\n\t\t}]]]);\n\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 1);\n\t\tdiag.dispose();\n\t\tassert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);\n\t});\n\n\ttest('OnDidChangeDiagnostics triggers twice on same diagnostics #136434', function () {\n\n\t\treturn runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {\n\n\t\t\tconst changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];\n\n\t\t\tconst diag = Before
	private readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();

	private readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;
	private readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;

	constructor(
		extHostContext: IExtHostContext,
		@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,
		@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,
	) {
		this._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);

		this._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);
	}
After
	private readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();

	private readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;
	private readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;
	private readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;

	constructor(
		extHostContext: IExtHostContext,
		@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,
		@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,
		@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,
	) {
		this._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);

		this._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);
		this._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);
	}

	dispose(): void {

		this._fileListener.dispose();

4. EDIT /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts
Before
	private _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {
		const data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];
		for (const resource of resources) {
			const allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });
			if (allMarkerData.length === 0) {
				data.push([resource, []]);
			} else {
				const forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));
				if (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {
					data.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);
				}
			}
		}
		if (data.length > 0) {
			this._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);
		}
	}
After
	private _forwardMarkers(resources: readonly URI[]): void {
		const data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][] = [];
		for (const resource of resources) {
			const allMarkerData = this._markerService.read({ resource });
			if (allMarkerData.length === 0) {
				data.push([resource, []]);
			} else {
				const forgeinMarkerData = allMarkerData.filter(marker => !this._activeOwners.has(marker.owner));
				if (forgeinMarkerData.length > 0) {
					data.push([resource, forgeinMarkerData]);
				}
			}
		}
		if (data.length > 0) {
			this._proxy.$acceptMarkersChange(data);
		}
	}

	private _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {
		// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted
		for (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {
			const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);
			const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });
			if (markers.length > 0) {
				// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners
				const owners = new Set<string>();
				for (const marker of markers) {
					owners.add(marker.owner);
				}
				for (const owner of owners) {
					this._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);
				}
			}
		}

		// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis
		// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed
		for (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {
			const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);
			const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });
			if (markers.length > 0) {
				// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis
				const owners = new Set<string>();
				for (const marker of markers) {
					owners.add(marker.owner);

... (truncated)

import { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';
import { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';
import { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';
import { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';

After
import { IMarkerService, IMarkerData } from '../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';
import { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../base/common/uri.js';
import { MainThreadDiagnosticsShape, MainContext, ExtHostDiagnosticsShape, ExtHostContext } from '../common/extHost.protocol.js';
import { extHostNamedCustomer, IExtHostContext } from '../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';
import { IDisposable } from '../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';
import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';
import { IFileService } from '../../../platform/files/common/files.js';
import { Delayer } from '../../../base/common/async.js';
6. EDIT /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts
Before
	private readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();

	private readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;
	private readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;
	private readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;

	constructor(
		extHostContext: IExtHostContext,
		@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,
		@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,
		@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,
	) {
		this._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);

		this._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);
		this._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);
	}
After
	private readonly _activeOwners = new Set<string>();

	private readonly _proxy: ExtHostDiagnosticsShape;
	private readonly _markerListener: IDisposable;
	private readonly _fileListener: IDisposable;
	private readonly _fileChangeDelayer = new Delayer<void>(100);
	private _pendingFileChanges: { deleted: URI[]; updated: URI[] } = { deleted: [], updated: [] };

	constructor(
		extHostContext: IExtHostContext,
		@IMarkerService private readonly _markerService: IMarkerService,
		@IUriIdentityService private readonly _uriIdentService: IUriIdentityService,
		@IFileService private readonly _fileService: IFileService,
	) {
		this._proxy = extHostContext.getProxy(ExtHostContext.ExtHostDiagnostics);

		this._markerListener = this._markerService.onMarkerChanged(this._forwardMarkers, this);
		this._fileListener = this._fileService.onDidFilesChange(this._onDidFilesChange, this);
	}
7. EDIT /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts
Before
	dispose(): void {
		this._markerListener.dispose();
		this._fileListener.dispose();
		this._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));
		this._activeOwners.clear();
	}
After
	dispose(): void {
		this._markerListener.dispose();
		this._fileListener.dispose();
		this._fileChangeDelayer.dispose();
		this._activeOwners.forEach(owner => this._markerService.changeAll(owner, []));
		this._activeOwners.clear();
	}
8. EDIT /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts
Before
	private _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {
		// Clear diagnostics for files that were deleted
		for (const deletedUri of event.rawDeleted) {
			const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(deletedUri);
			const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });
			if (markers.length > 0) {
				// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners
				const owners = new Set<string>();
				for (const marker of markers) {
					owners.add(marker.owner);
				}
				for (const owner of owners) {
					this._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);
				}
			}
		}

		// Clear diagnostics for files that were changed to trigger re-analysis
		// This ensures that if errors were fixed on disk, stale diagnostics are removed
		for (const changedUri of event.rawUpdated) {
			const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(changedUri);
			const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });
			if (markers.length > 0) {
				// Remove all diagnostics for this file from all owners to trigger re-analysis
				const owners = new Set<string>();
				for (const marker of markers) {
					owners.add(marker.owner);
				}
				for (const owner of owners) {
					this._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);
				}
			}
		}
	}
After
	private _onDidFilesChange(event: { rawAdded: URI[]; rawUpdated: URI[]; rawDeleted: URI[] }): void {
		// Batch file changes with debouncing to avoid excessive processing during bulk operations like Git branch switch
		if (event.rawDeleted.length > 0) {
			this._pendingFileChanges.deleted.push(...event.rawDeleted);
		}
		if (event.rawUpdated.length > 0) {
			this._pendingFileChanges.updated.push(...event.rawUpdated);
		}

		// Trigger debounced batch processing
		this._fileChangeDelayer.trigger(async () => this._clearPendingDiagnostics());
	}

	private async _clearPendingDiagnostics(): Promise<void> {
		const deleted = this._pendingFileChanges.deleted;
		const updated = this._pendingFileChanges.updated;
		this._pendingFileChanges = { deleted: [], updated: [] };

		try {
			// Clear diagnostics for deleted files
			this._clearDiagnosticsForUris(deleted);
			// Clear diagnostics for updated files to trigger re-analysis
			this._clearDiagnosticsForUris(updated);
		} catch (error) {
			// Log error but don't crash - file changes should not break diagnostics system
			console.error('Error clearing diagnostics for file changes:', error);
		}
	}

	private _clearDiagnosticsForUris(uris: URI[]): void {
		for (const uri of uris) {
			const canonicalUri = this._uriIdentService.asCanonicalUri(uri);
			const markers = this._markerService.read({ resource: canonicalUri });
			if (markers.length > 0) {
				// Collect unique owners and clear diagnostics for each
				const owners = new Set<string>();
				for (const marker of markers) {
					owners.add(marker.owner);
				}
				for (const owner of owners) {
					this._markerService.changeOne(owner, canonicalUri, []);
				}
			}
		}
	}

23. $ grep -n "onWillChange\|onDidChangeTextDocument\|onDidChangeFile" /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/common/extHost.api.impl.ts | head -20
24. $ find /workspace/extensions/git -name "*.ts" | xargs grep -l "diagnostic\|Diagnostic" 2>/dev/null

40. $ find /workspace/src -name "markerService.ts" -type f | grep -v test
41. $ grep -n "IWatchOptionsWithCorrelation\|IWatchOptionsWithoutCorrelation" /workspace/src/vs/platform/files/common/files.ts | head -20
42. $ grep -r "SetMap" /workspace/src/vs --include="*.ts" | head -20
43. $ npx esbuild src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts --bundle --external:vscode 2>&1 | head -50
44. $ find /workspace -path "*test*" -name "*mainThreadDiagnostics*" -type f 2>/dev/null
45. $ grep -n "IFileService\|FileService" /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts
46. $ sed -n '98,104p' /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts | cat -A
47. $ sed -n '82,102p' /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts
48. $ cat > /tmp/fix_test.js << 'EOF'
const fs = require('fs');
const path = '/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts';
let content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8');

// Fix test 2
content = content.replace(
  /new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>\(\) \{[\s\S]*?override asCanonicalUri\(uri: URI\) \{ return uri; \}\s*\}\s*\);[\s]*const markerDataStub/,
  `new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {
				override asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }
			},
			new class extends mock<IFileService>() {
				override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });
			}
		);

		const markerDataStub`
);

// Fix test 3
content = content.replace(
  /markerService\.changeOne\('bar', target, \[markerData\]\);[\s\S]*?const diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics\([\s\S]*?override asCanonicalUri\(uri: URI\) \{ return uri; \}\s*\}\s*\);[\s]*diag\.\$clear\('bar'\);/,
  (match) => {
    return match.replace(
      /new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>\(\) \{[\s\S]*?override asCanonicalUri\(uri: URI\) \{ return uri; \}\s*\}\s*\);/,
      `new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {
					override asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }
				},
				new class extends mock<IFileService>() {
					override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });
				}
			);`
    );
  }
);

fs.writeFileSync(path, content);
console.log('Fixed test file');
EOF
node /tmp/fix_test.js

49. $ git checkout /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts
50. $ cat > /tmp/fix_test.py << 'EOF'
import re

path = '/workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Add import
if 'import { IFileService }' not in content:
    content = content.replace(
        "import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';",
        "import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';\nimport { IFileService } from '../../../../platform/files/common/files.js';"
    )

# Update each test to add IFileService mock
mock_file_service = ''',
			new class extends mock<IFileService>() {
				override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });
			}'''

# Find all occurrences of "}" followed by newline followed by tabs and ");" and add mock before it
content = re.sub(
    r'(new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>\(\) \{\s+override asCanonicalUri\(uri: URI\) \{ return uri; \}\s+\})\s+\);',
    r'\1' + mock_file_service + '\n\t\t);',
    content
)

with open(path, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('Fixed test file')
EOF
python3 /tmp/fix_test.py

51. $ cat > /workspace/src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts << 'EOF'
/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.
 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

import assert from 'assert';
import { timeout } from '../../../../base/common/async.js';
import { URI, UriComponents } from '../../../../base/common/uri.js';
import { runWithFakedTimers } from '../../../../base/test/common/timeTravelScheduler.js';
import { ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite } from '../../../../base/test/common/utils.js';
import { MarkerService } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markerService.js';
import { IMarkerData } from '../../../../platform/markers/common/markers.js';
import { IUriIdentityService } from '../../../../platform/uriIdentity/common/uriIdentity.js';
import { IFileService } from '../../../../platform/files/common/files.js';
import { MainThreadDiagnostics } from '../../browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.js';
import { IExtHostContext } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extHostCustomers.js';
import { ExtensionHostKind } from '../../../services/extensions/common/extensionHostKind.js';
import { mock } from '../../../test/common/workbenchTestServices.js';


suite('MainThreadDiagnostics', function () {

	let markerService: MarkerService;

	setup(function () {
		markerService = new MarkerService();
	});

	teardown(function () {
		markerService.dispose();
	});

	ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite();

	test('clear markers on dispose', function () {

		const diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(
			new class implements IExtHostContext {
				remoteAuthority = '';
				extensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;
				dispose() { }
				assertRegistered() { }
				set(v: any): any { return null; }
				getProxy(): any {
					return {
						$acceptMarkersChange() { }
					};
				}
				drain(): any { return null; }
			},
			markerService,
			new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {
				override asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }
			},
			new class extends mock<IFileService>() {
				override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });
			}
		);

		diag.$changeMany('foo', [[URI.file('a'), [{
			code: '666',
			startLineNumber: 1,
			startColumn: 1,
			endLineNumber: 1,
			endColumn: 1,
			message: 'fffff',
			severity: 1,
			source: 'me'
		}]]]);

		assert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 1);
		diag.dispose();
		assert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);
	});

	test('OnDidChangeDiagnostics triggers twice on same diagnostics #136434', function () {

		return runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {

			const changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];

			const diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(
				new class implements IExtHostContext {
					remoteAuthority = '';
					extensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;
					dispose() { }
					assertRegistered() { }
					set(v: any): any { return null; }
					getProxy(): any {
						return {
							$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {
								changedData.push(data);
							}
						};
					}
					drain(): any { return null; }
				},
				markerService,
				new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {
					override asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }
				},
				new class extends mock<IFileService>() {
					override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });
				}
			);

			const markerDataStub = {
				code: '666',
				startLineNumber: 1,
				startColumn: 1,
				endLineNumber: 1,
				endColumn: 1,
				severity: 1,
				source: 'me'
			};
			const target = URI.file('a');
			diag.$changeMany('foo', [[target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'same_owner' }]]]);
			markerService.changeOne('bar', target, [{ ...markerDataStub, message: 'forgein_owner' }]);

			// added one marker via the API and one via the ext host. the latter must not
			// trigger an event to the extension host

			await timeout(0);
			assert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 2);
			assert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);
			assert.strictEqual(changedData[0].length, 1);
			assert.strictEqual(changedData[0][0][1][0].message, 'forgein_owner');

			diag.dispose();
		});
	});

	test('onDidChangeDiagnostics different behavior when "extensionKind" ui running on remote workspace #136955', function () {
		return runWithFakedTimers({}, async () => {

			const markerData: IMarkerData = {
				code: '666',
				startLineNumber: 1,
				startColumn: 1,
				endLineNumber: 1,
				endColumn: 1,
				severity: 1,
				source: 'me',
				message: 'message'
			};
			const target = URI.file('a');
			markerService.changeOne('bar', target, [markerData]);

			const changedData: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][][] = [];

			const diag = new MainThreadDiagnostics(
				new class implements IExtHostContext {
					remoteAuthority = '';
					extensionHostKind = ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess;
					dispose() { }
					assertRegistered() { }
					set(v: any): any { return null; }
					getProxy(): any {
						return {
							$acceptMarkersChange(data: [UriComponents, IMarkerData[]][]) {
								changedData.push(data);
							}
						};
					}
					drain(): any { return null; }
				},
				markerService,
				new class extends mock<IUriIdentityService>() {
					override asCanonicalUri(uri: URI) { return uri; }
				},
				new class extends mock<IFileService>() {
					override onDidFilesChange = (listener: any) => ({ dispose: () => { } });
				}
			);

			diag.$clear('bar');
			await timeout(0);
			assert.strictEqual(markerService.read().length, 0);
			assert.strictEqual(changedData.length, 1);

			diag.dispose();
		});
	});
});
EOF

52. $ npx tsc --noEmit src/vs/workbench/api/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.ts src/vs/workbench/api/test/browser/mainThreadDiagnostics.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -i "error\|warning" | head -20
53. $ git diff --stat
